```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/matrices")
```

### Installing/loading necessary packages

```{r message=FALSE}
library(Seurat)
library(SeuratWrappers)
library(cowplot)
library(harmony)
library(Matrix)
library(scales)
library(viridis)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(scran)     
library(cluster)
library(pbapply)
require(tsne)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggalluvial)
library(ggpubr)
library(ggrepel)
library(ggrastr)
library(ggradar)
library(ggh4x)
library(dplyr)
library(WriteXLS)
library(gplots)
library(readr)
library(edgeR)
library(data.table)
library(xlsx)
library(dplyr)
library(patchwork)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(AnnotationDbi)
library(org.Mm.eg.db)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)
library(enrichplot)
library(biomaRt)
library(pheatmap)
library(tidyverse)
library(MASS)
library(viridis)
library(rstatix)
library(NMF)
library(circlize)
library(ComplexHeatmap)
library(CellChat)
library(UCell)
library(DESeq2)
library(vsn) 
library(PCAtools)
library(tidyr)
library(reshape2)
library(monocle3)
library(enrichR)
library(Augur)
reticulate::use_python("/opt/anaconda3/bin/python", required=T)
```

### Set theme for ggplot

```{r}
theme_set(theme_linedraw(base_size = 20) +
            theme(
              axis.title.y = element_text(face = "bold", margin = margin(0,20,0,0), size = rel(1.1), color = 'black'),
              axis.title.x = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold", margin = margin(20,0,0,0), size = rel(1.1), color = 'black'),
              plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5)
            ))
```

### Formatting datafiles

1.  Set working directory to directory holding all sample folders for example (F:/Sequencing/Singlecell/Analyses/)
2.  Create new folder for output files
3.  List all directories in current directory: make sure folders containing filtered matrix files are named with Sample ID that matches metadata table

```{r}
#list dirs inside working directory
alldirs<-list.dirs(getwd(), recursive = TRUE, full.names = FALSE)
#list dirs containing filtered matrix files
alldata <- alldirs[ grepl("filtered", alldirs) ]
```

### Format metadata table with information on each sample (input_metadata.txt) with the important information

Sample_ID should match the folder names containing the data as above (typos can be painful). for example Sample_ID CRD_day Tissue Chemistry SCD1 0 Aortic Intima 3pr.V3 5dCRD1 5 Aortic Intima 3pr.V3

```{r}
meta_table<-read.table("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/input_metadata.txt", sep="\t", header = TRUE)
meta_table
```

### Loading Files

Creating a list of Seurat Objects

```{r}
#create an empty list for All samples
All_Samples<-vector(mode="list", length=length(alldata))
#create a list for sample IDs: these will later become Project names and origin identities in Seurat objects
alldata_names<-vector(mode="list", length=1)
#loading data
for (i in 1:length(alldata)){
  #Read filtered matrix files
  All_Samples[[i]]<-Read10X(data.dir=alldata[i]) 
  #Sample_ID info removed from directory name
  Sampleinfo<-strsplit(alldata[i], "/")
  Sample_ID<-Sampleinfo[[1]][1]
  #Calculate MT gene content for each cell
  MT.index <- grep(pattern = "^Mt-", x = rownames(All_Samples[[i]]), ignore.case=TRUE)
  percent.MT <- Matrix::colSums(All_Samples[[i]][MT.index, ])/Matrix::colSums(All_Samples[[i]])*100
  #Generate a metadata table with the percent.MT attached
  meta<-data.frame(percent.MT, Sample_ID)
  meta$barcode<-rownames(meta)
  #Merge MT data with input metadata table so each cell gets tagged with metadata, then reformat to fit the Seurat metadata format
  meta<-merge(meta, meta_table, by.y="Sample_ID")
  rownames(meta)<-meta$barcode
  meta[,"barcode"]<-NULL
  #Save sample IDs in a list
  alldata_names[[1]][i]<-Sample_ID
  #for each sample, create a Seurat Object and attach the appropriate metadata table
  All_Samples[i] <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = All_Samples[[i]], project = alldata_names[[1]][i], min.cells = 3, min.features=200, meta.data = meta)
}
alldata_names2<-alldata_names[[1]]
```

### Uncorrected Sample Merging

Let's merge all of our samples without correction so we can compare to after harmony batch correction

```{r}
Aorta <- merge(All_Samples[[1]], y= All_Samples[2:length(All_Samples)], merge.data=TRUE, add.cell.ids = alldata_names2, project = "Aortic Intima")
table(Idents(Aorta))
```

### Let's look to see if we need to subset cells based on gene count and percent.MT

```{r}
p1<-VlnPlot(Aorta, features = "nFeature_RNA", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
p2<-VlnPlot(Aorta, features = "percent.MT", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
p3<-VlnPlot(Aorta, features = "nCount_RNA", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
plot_grid(p1,p2,p3, nrow = 1)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_plot_QC_1.pdf", width = 15, height = 10)
plot_grid(p1,p2,p3, nrow = 1)
dev.off()

table(Idents(Aorta))

get_density <- function(x, y, ...) {
  dens <- MASS::kde2d(x, y, ...)
  ix <- findInterval(x, dens$x)
  iy <- findInterval(y, dens$y)
  ii <- cbind(ix, iy)
  return(dens$z[ii])
}
featurevsMT.data <- data.frame(nFeature_RNA = Aorta@meta.data$nFeature_RNA, percent.MT = Aorta@meta.data$percent.MT)
featurevsMT.data$density <- get_density(featurevsMT.data$nFeature_RNA, featurevsMT.data$percent.MT, n = 100)
```

### Normalization, scaling and dimentionality reduction

For these samples, a cutoff of percent.MT\<40 and nFeature_RNA\<3000 looks reasonable. let's subset based on those parameters and do prepocessing (log normalization), scaling and dimensionality reduction

```{r}
Aorta <- subset(Aorta, subset = percent.MT<40 & nFeature_RNA<3000 & nCount_RNA>500)
#Let's see how many cells remain for each sample
table(Idents(Aorta))
Harmony_all_table_QC_1 <- table(Idents(Aorta))
write.csv(Harmony_all_table_QC_1, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_table_QC_1.csv")
Aorta <- NormalizeData(Aorta, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 100000)
Aorta <- FindVariableFeatures(Aorta, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures=2000)
all.genes <- rownames(Aorta)
Aorta <- ScaleData(Aorta, features = all.genes)
Aorta <- RunPCA(Aorta, features = VariableFeatures(object = Aorta))
```

### Let's look at the distribution of percent.MT across the filtered dataset and number of features and transcripts.

```{r}

p5<-VlnPlot(Aorta, features = "percent.MT", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
p6<-VlnPlot(Aorta, features = "nCount_RNA", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
plot_grid(p4,p5,p6, nrow = 1)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_plot_QC_2.pdf", width = 15, height = 10)
plot_grid(p4,p5,p6, nrow = 1)
dev.off()
```

### Finding neighbours, clustering and visualization using UMAP

```{r}
Aorta <- FindNeighbors(Aorta, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:17)
Aorta <- FindClusters(Aorta, resolution = 0.6)
Aorta <- RunUMAP(Aorta, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:17) 
table(Idents(Aorta))
Harmony_all_table_QC_2 <- table(Idents(Aorta))
write.csv(Harmony_all_table_QC_2, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_table_QC_2.csv")
Aorta[["Clusters_uncorrected"]] <- Idents(object = Aorta)
```


### Output per cluster QC stats

```{r}
# Get cluster names from active.ident
Aorta.cluster_names <- Aorta@active.ident
# Calculate cells per cluster
Aorta.cell_counts <- table(Aorta.cluster_names)
# Calculate median nFeature_RNA per cluster
Aorta.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nFeature_RNA ~ Aorta.cluster_names, data = Aorta@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median nCount_RNA per cluster
Aorta.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nCount_RNA ~ Aorta.cluster_names, data = Aorta@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median percent.mt per cluster
Aorta.median_percent_MT_per_cluster <- aggregate(percent.MT ~ Aorta.cluster_names, data = Aorta@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Merge all information into a single dataframe
result_table <- data.frame(
    Cells_Per_Cluster = as.numeric(Aorta.cell_counts),
    Median_nFeature_RNA = Aorta.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$nFeature_RNA,
    Median_nCount_RNA = Aorta.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster$nCount_RNA,
    Median_Percent_MT = Aorta.median_percent_MT_per_cluster$percent.MT,
    row.names = Aorta.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$Aorta.cluster_names
)
# Print the result
print(result_table)
write.csv(result_table, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_table_QC_4.csv")
```

### Percent composition by Sample ID for each cluster (helps to see how well integrated the samples are)

```{r}
comp1 <- ggplot(Aorta@meta.data, aes(x=Clusters_uncorrected, fill=orig.ident)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Cluster composition - unintegrated",
       x = "Cluster",
       y = "Fraction",
       fill = "Group") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#F8766D", "#7CAE00", "#00BFC4", "#C77Cff"), labels = c("Ctrl.Wk4", "KO.Wk4", "Ctrl.Wk12", "KO.Wk12")) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.01,0))
comp2 <- comp1 + theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
              axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size=15),
              axis.text = element_text(size=15),
              axis.line = element_line(size=0.75),
              axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.75),  
              axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
              panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
              panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
              panel.border = element_blank()) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 1)) + 
  ggtitle(NULL)
comp2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_plot_QC_7.pdf", width = 17, height = 10)
```

### Look at how well the datasets are integrated in the first 2 dimensions before Harmony.

(Harmony integration is only needed if the samples are not well integrated. I find that if the samples are very similar (all control non-CRD for example) that integration isn't necessary)

```{r}
p9 <- DimPlot(object = Aorta, reduction = "pca", pt.size = .1, group.by = "orig.ident")
p10 <- VlnPlot(object = Aorta, features = "PC_1", group.by = "orig.ident", pt.size = 0)
plot_grid(p9,p10)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_plot_QC_8.pdf", width = 20, height = 10)
plot_grid(p9,p10)
dev.off()
```

### Running Harmony

<https://portals.broadinstitute.org/harmony/SeuratV3.html>

The simplest way to run Harmony is to pass the Seurat object and specify which variable(s) to integrate out. RunHarmony returns a Seurat object, updated with the corrected Harmony coordinates. Set plot_convergence to TRUE, so we can make sure that the Harmony objective function gets better with each round.

```{r}
gc()
Aorta.harmony <- RunHarmony(Aorta, "orig.ident", plot_convergence = TRUE, lambda = NULL)
```

### Load Aorta.harmony from RDS file for reproducible embeddings and clusters

```{r}
Aorta.harmony<- readRDS("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/R markdowns/Aorta.harmony.donotoverwrite.RDS")
```

### To directly access the new Harmony embeddings if necessary, use the Embeddings command.

```{r}
harmony_embeddings <- Embeddings(Aorta.harmony, 'harmony')
harmony_embeddings[1:5, 1:5]
```

### Let's make sure that the datasets are well integrated in the first 2 dimensions after Harmony.

```{r}
p11 <- DimPlot(object = Aorta.harmony, reduction = "harmony", pt.size = .1, group.by = "orig.ident")
p12 <- VlnPlot(object = Aorta.harmony, features = "harmony_1", group.by = "orig.ident", pt.size = 0)
plot_grid(p11,p12)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_plot_QC_9.pdf", width = 20, height = 10)
plot_grid(p11,p12)
dev.off()
```

### Finding Neighbours, clusters and runing UMAP

Many downstream analyses are performed on low dimensional embeddings, not gene expression. To use the corrected Harmony embeddings rather than PCs, set reduction = 'harmony'. For example, let's perform the UMAP and Nearest Neighbor analyses using the Harmony embeddings.

```{r}

ElbowPlot(Aorta.harmony)
dev.off()

#Aorta.harmony <- FindClusters(Aorta.harmony, resolution = 0.8)
#Aorta.harmony <- RunUMAP(Aorta.harmony, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:17)
DimPlot(Aorta.harmony, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters", pt.size = 0.1, label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/plots/Harmony_all_plot_UMAP_3.pdf", width = 10, height = 10)
DimPlot(Aorta.harmony, reduction = "umap", group.by = "seurat_clusters", pt.size = 0.1, label = TRUE) + NoLegend()
```

```{r}
Aorta.harmony.join.markers <- FindAllMarkers(Aorta.harmony.join, only.pos = TRUE)
```

### Output per cluster QC stats

```{r}
# Get cluster names from active.ident
Aorta.harmony.cluster_names <- Aorta.harmony@active.ident
# Calculate cells per cluster
Aorta.harmony.cell_counts <- table(Aorta.harmony.cluster_names)
# Calculate median nFeature_RNA per cluster
Aorta.harmony.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nFeature_RNA ~ Aorta.harmony.cluster_names, data = Aorta.harmony@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median nCount_RNA per cluster
Aorta.harmony.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nCount_RNA ~ Aorta.harmony.cluster_names, data = Aorta.harmony@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median percent.mt per cluster
Aorta.harmony.median_percent_MT_per_cluster <- aggregate(percent.MT ~ Aorta.harmony.cluster_names, data = Aorta.harmony@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Merge all information into a single dataframe
result_table <- data.frame(
    Cells_Per_Cluster = as.numeric(Aorta.harmony.cell_counts),
    Median_nFeature_RNA = Aorta.harmony.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$nFeature_RNA,
    Median_nCount_RNA = Aorta.harmony.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster$nCount_RNA,
    Median_Percent_MT = Aorta.harmony.median_percent_MT_per_cluster$percent.MT,
    row.names = Aorta.harmony.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$Aorta.harmony.cluster_names
)
# Print the result
print(result_table)
write.csv(result_table, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_table_QC_7.csv")
```

### T cell analysis

```{r}
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers <- FindMarkers(Aorta.harmony.join, ident.1 = "T cell 2", ident.2 = "T cell 1")
write.csv(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/Harmony_all_Tcell2vsTcell1_markers.csv")

### harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano formatting
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers %>%
  mutate(diffexp = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
prefixes_to_remove <- c("Hba", "Hbb", "mt-", "Rpl", "Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
rows_to_keep <- !(grepl(paste0("^", paste(prefixes_to_remove, collapse = "|")), rownames(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano)))
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano[rows_to_keep, ]
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano$p_val_adj[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano$p_val_adj < 1e-300] <- 1e-300

### Fig 3 - Harmony_all_plot_volcano_Tcell2vsTcell1
gene.list <- c("Cd4", "Cd8a", "Cd8b1", "Tcf7", "Ccr9", "Rag1", "Dntt", "Lck", "Ccl5", "Eomes", "Gzmk", "Ms4a4b", "Nkg7")
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano$delabel <- NA
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano) %in% gene.list
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano$diffexp[genes_in_list] <- "label"
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano$delabel[genes_in_list] <- rownames(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano)[genes_in_list]
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.volcano1 <- ggplot(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "down", ], aes(color = "T cell 1"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "up", ], aes(color = "T cell 2"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "grey", "#B79F00", "#00B9E3")) +
    labs(x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = expression("T cell 2 ("*italic("Cd8"^"+")~"cytotoxic) vs. T cell 1 ("*italic("Cd4"^"+"*"Cd8"^"+")*")")) +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-13, 13))
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.volcano2 <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.volcano1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1))

### ORA - GO - upregulated genes
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank <- sign(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$avg_log2FC) * -log10(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$p_val)
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort[order(-harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank), ]
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank > 300] <- 300
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank < -300] <- -300
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uplist <- rownames(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 1 & harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.up <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uplist)
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uplist <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uplist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.up]
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.up <- enrichGO(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uplist,
                         ont = "BP",
                         keyType = "SYMBOL",
                         OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.up@result 

### ORA - GO - downregulated genes
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank <- sign(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$avg_log2FC) * -log10(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$p_val)
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort[order(-harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank), ]
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank > 300] <- 300
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$rank < -300] <- -300
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.downlist <- rownames(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$avg_log2FC < -1 & harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.down <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.downlist)
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.downlist <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.downlist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.down]
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.down <- enrichGO(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.downlist,
                         ont = "BP",
                         keyType = "SYMBOL",
                         OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.downtable <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.down@result 

### Fig 3 - harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter formatting
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$qvalue[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$qvalue < 1e-300] <- 1e-300
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$GR <- (harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$Count)/539
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  mutate(diffexp = case_when(
    qvalue < 0.05 ~ "sig",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
GO.list <- c("GO:0001906", "GO:0001909", "GO:0031341", "GO:0001910", "GO:0042267", "GO:0002228", "GO:0031343", "GO:0030101", "GO:0042269", "GO:0002715", "GO:0050863", "GO:0046631", "GO:0050867", "GO:0002696", "GO:0002366")
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(diffexp = ifelse(any(str_detect(Description, paste(inflammation.list, collapse = "|"))) && ID %in% GO.list && qvalue < 0.05, "inflammation", diffexp)) %>%
  ungroup()
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(diffexp = ifelse(any(str_detect(Description, paste(cytotoxic.list, collapse = "|"))) && ID %in% GO.list && qvalue < 0.05, "cytotoxic", diffexp)) %>%
  ungroup()
GO_in_list <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$ID %in% GO.list
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$name.label <- NA
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$name.label[GO_in_list] <- harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$Description[GO_in_list]
write.csv(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.csv")
harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.up.scatter1 <- ggplot(harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter, aes(x = GR, y = -log10(qvalue), label = name.label)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2, alpha = 0.5), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "sig", ], aes(color = "Significant"), size = 2, alpha = 0.5), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "inflammation", ], aes(color = "Inflammation"), size = 3) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.Tcell2vsTcell1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "cytotoxic", ], aes(color = "Cytotoxic"), size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#008080", "red", "grey", "#00B9E3")) +
    labs(x = expression("GeneRatio"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = expression("T cell 2 vs. T cell 1 - ORA GO up pathways")) +
    NoLegend() +
    geom_text_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf)
```

```{r}
harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers <- FindMarkers(Aorta.harmony.join, ident.1 = "Fibroblast 2", ident.2 = "Fibroblast 1")
write.csv(harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/Harmony_all_Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1_markers.csv")

### harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano formatting
harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano <- harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers %>%
  mutate(diffexp = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
prefixes_to_remove <- c("Hba", "Hbb", "mt-", "Rpl", "Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
rows_to_keep <- !(grepl(paste0("^", paste(prefixes_to_remove, collapse = "|")), rownames(harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano)))
harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano <- harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano[rows_to_keep, ]
harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano$p_val_adj[harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano$p_val_adj < 1e-300] <- 1e-300

### Fig 3 - Harmony_all_plot_volcano_Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1
gene.list <- c("Abca8a", "Dcn", "Dpep1", "Entpd2", "Fbln1", "Gfpt2", "Gsn", "Igfbp6", "Mfap2", "Scara5", "Myocd", "Myom1", "Pcdh7", "Rbpms")
harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano$delabel <- NA
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano) %in% gene.list
harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano$diffexp[genes_in_list] <- "label"
harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano$delabel[genes_in_list] <- rownames(harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano)[genes_in_list]
harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.volcano1 <- ggplot(harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel, size = 15)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano[harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=100) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano[harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "down", ], aes(color = "Fibroblast 1"), size = 2), dpi=100) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano[harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "up", ], aes(color = "Fibroblast 2"), size = 2), dpi=100) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano[harmony.Fibroblast2vsFibroblast1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +    scale_color_manual(values = c("#FF61C3", "#619CFF", "goldenrod3", "grey")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = expression("Fibroblast 2 (Cardiomyocyte-like) vs. Fibroblast 1 (Classical)")) +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-12, 12))
```

### Macrophage analysis

```{r}
Aorta.harmony.subset.macrophage <- subset(Aorta.harmony, idents = c("SMC 1", "SMC 2", "EC 2", "EC 1", "SMC 3", "SMC 5", "EC 3", "Fibroblast 2", "SMC 4", "Fibroblast 1", "T cell 2", "T cell 1", "B cell", "Prolif. cell", "Neutrophil"), invert = TRUE)
levels(Aorta.harmony.subset.macrophage) <- c("Macrophage 1", "Macrophage 2", "Macrophage 3")
###Fig 3 - Harmony_all_plot_dotplot_integrated_macrophage
dotplot1 <- DotPlot(Aorta.harmony.subset.macrophage, c("Ctsd", "Ctsl", "Fabp5", "Lgals3", "Lpl", "Mmp12", "Spp1", "Trem2", "Ccl2", "Ccl3", "Ccl4", "Ccrl2", "Cd14", "Cxcl2", "Il1b", "Tnf", "Abca1", "Gab2", "Igf1", "Il10rb", "Mertk", "Pparg", "Sirpa", "Syk")) + RotatedAxis()
dotplot2 <- dotplot1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=16),
        axis.title = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(size=1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1),
        legend.title = element_text(size=20),
        legend.text = element_text(size=16)) +
        scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu"))) +
        scale_size(range = c(0.001, 7)) +
  ggtitle("Macrophage identity markers")
dotplot2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 3 + supp/Harmony_all_plot_dotplot_integrated_macrophage.pdf", width = 13, height = 2.3)
dotplot2
dev.off()


harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers <- FindMarkers(Aorta.harmony.join, ident.1 = "Macrophage 1", ident.2 = "Macrophage 3")
write.csv(harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/Harmony_all_Macrophage1vsMacrophage3_markers.csv")

### harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano formatting
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano <- harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers %>%
  mutate(diffexp = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
prefixes_to_remove <- c("Hba", "Hbb", "mt-", "Rpl", "Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
rows_to_keep <- !(grepl(paste0("^", paste(prefixes_to_remove, collapse = "|")), rownames(harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano)))
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano <- harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano[rows_to_keep, ]
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$p_val_adj[harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$p_val_adj < 1e-300] <- 1e-300

### Fig 3 - Harmony_all_plot_volcano_Macrophage1vsMacrophage3
gene.list <- c("Ctsd", "Fabp5", "Lgals3", "Trem2", "Ccl2", "Ccl3", "Ccl4", "Cd14", "Il1b", "Abca1", "Gab2", "Mertk", "Pparg", "Syk")
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$delabel <- NA
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano) %in% gene.list
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp[genes_in_list] <- "label"
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$delabel[genes_in_list] <- rownames(harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano)[genes_in_list]
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.volcano1 <- ggplot(harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano[harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano[harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp == "down", ], aes(color = "Macrophage 3"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano[harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp == "up", ], aes(color = "Macrophage 1"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano[harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "#DB72FB", "#D39200", "grey")) +
    labs(x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = expression("Macrophage 1 ("*italic("Trem2"^"+")~"foamy) vs. Macrophage 3 (Resident-like)")) +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-10, 10))
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.volcano2 <- harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.volcano1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1))
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.volcano2

harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.volcano2
dev.off()

### ORA - GO - upregulated genes
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort <- harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank <- sign(harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$avg_log2FC) * -log10(harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$p_val)
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort <- harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort[order(-harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank), ]
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank > 300] <- 300
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank < -300] <- -300
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uplist <- rownames(harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort[harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 1 & harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.up <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uplist)
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uplist <- harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uplist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.up]
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.up <- enrichGO(harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uplist,
                         ont = "BP",
                         keyType = "SYMBOL",
                         OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable <- harmony.Macrophage1vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.up@result

harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp[genes_in_list] <- "label"

harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.volcano1 <- ggplot(harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp == "down", ], aes(color = "Macrophage 3"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp == "up", ], aes(color = "Macrophage 1"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.volcano$diffexp == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "#00BA38", "#D39200", "grey")) +
    labs(x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = expression("Macrophage 2 (Inflammatory) vs. Macrophage 3 (Resident-like)")) +

### ORA - GO - upregulated genes
harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort <- harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers
harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank <- sign(harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$avg_log2FC) * -log10(harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$p_val)
harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort <- harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort[order(-harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank), ]
harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank > 300] <- 300
harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$rank < -300] <- -300
harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uplist <- rownames(harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 1 & harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")

harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable
harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$qvalue[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$qvalue < 1e-300] <- 1e-300

harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  mutate(diffexp = case_when(
    qvalue < 0.05 ~ "sig",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
GO.list <- c(c("GO:0002696", "GO:0050867", "GO:0050863", "GO:0051251", "GO:0050870", "GO:0002218", "GO:0034341", "GO:0019221", "GO:0002366", "GO:0002263", "GO:0035456", "GO:0050727", "GO:0046631", "GO:0001818", "GO:0002695"))
harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(diffexp = ifelse(any(str_detect(Description, paste(inflammation.list, collapse = "|"))) && ID %in% GO.list && qvalue < 0.05, "inflammation", diffexp)) %>%
  ungroup()
GO_in_list <- harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$ID %in% GO.list
harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$name.label <- NA

harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.up.scatter1 <- ggplot(harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter, aes(x = GR, y = -log10(qvalue), label = name.label)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2, alpha = 0.5), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "sig", ], aes(color = "Significant"), size = 2, alpha = 0.5), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.Macrophage2vsMacrophage3.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "inflammation", ], aes(color = "Inflammation"), size = 3) +
```

```{r}
levels(Aorta.harmony.subset.SMC) <- c("SMC 1", "SMC 2", "SMC 3", "SMC 4", "SMC 5")

### harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano formatting
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers %>%
  mutate(diffexp = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
prefixes_to_remove <- c("Hba", "Hbb", "mt-", "Rpl", "Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
rows_to_keep <- !(grepl(paste0("^", paste(prefixes_to_remove, collapse = "|")), rownames(harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano)))
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano[rows_to_keep, ]
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano$p_val_adj[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano$p_val_adj < 1e-300] <- 1e-300

### Fig 3 - Harmony_all_plot_volcano_SMC2and3vsSMC1
gene.list <- c("Acta2", "Myh11", "Myocd", "Synpo2", "Tagln", "C1qa", "C1qb", "C1qc", "Ctsd", "Ctsl", "Fapb5", "Lgals3", "Lpl", "Lyz2", "Mmp12", "Spp1", "Trem2")
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano$delabel <- NA
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano) %in% gene.list
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano$diffexp[genes_in_list] <- "label"
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano$delabel[genes_in_list] <- rownames(harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano)[genes_in_list]
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.volcano1 <- ggplot(harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "down", ], aes(color = "SMC 1"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "up", ], aes(color = "SMC 2 and 3"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.markers.volcano$diffexp == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("red", "grey", "#F8766D", "#93AA00")) +
    labs(x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = expression("SMC 2 and 3 (Macrophage-like) vs. SMC 1 (Contractile)")) +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-6, 6))

        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1))

harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.downlist <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.downlist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.down]
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.down <- enrichGO(harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.downlist,
                         ont = "BP",
                         keyType = "SYMBOL",
                         OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.downtable <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.down@result

### Fig 3 - harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter formatting
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$qvalue[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$qvalue < 1e-300] <- 1e-300
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$GR <- (harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$Count)/1500
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  mutate(diffexp = case_when(
    qvalue < 0.05 ~ "sig",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
GO.list <- c("GO:0045333", "GO:0009060", "GO:0006119", "GO:0022900", "GO:0046034", "GO:0002697", "GO:0050900", "GO:0070661", "GO:0002696", "GO:0002764", "GO:0006869", "GO:0016042", "GO:0019216", "GO:0006631", "GO:0006644")
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(diffexp = ifelse(any(str_detect(Description, paste(immune.list, collapse = "|"))) && ID %in% GO.list && qvalue < 0.05, "immune", diffexp)) %>%
  ungroup()
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(diffexp = ifelse(any(str_detect(Description, paste(lipid.list, collapse = "|"))) && ID %in% GO.list && qvalue < 0.05, "lipid", diffexp)) %>%
  ungroup()
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(diffexp = ifelse(any(str_detect(Description, paste(OXPHOS.list, collapse = "|"))) && ID %in% GO.list && qvalue < 0.05, "OXPHOS", diffexp)) %>%
  ungroup()
GO_in_list <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$ID %in% GO.list
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$name.label <- NA
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$name.label[GO_in_list] <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$Description[GO_in_list]
write.csv(harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.csv")
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.up.scatter1 <- ggplot(harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter, aes(x = GR, y = -log10(qvalue), label = name.label)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2, alpha = 0.5), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "sig", ], aes(color = "Significant"), size = 2, alpha = 0.5), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "immune", ], aes(color = "Immune"), size = 3) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "lipid", ], aes(color = "Lipid"), size = 3) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter[harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$diffexp == "OXPHOS", ], aes(color = "OXPHOS"), size = 3) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#FFA500", "#800080", "grey", "blue", "#93AA00")) +
    labs(x = expression("GeneRatio"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = expression("SMC 2 and 3 vs. SMC 1 - ORA GO up pathways")) +
    NoLegend() +
    geom_text_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf)
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.up.scatter2 <- harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.up.scatter1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        axis.line.x = element_line(size=1),
        axis.line.y = element_line(size=1),
        panel.border = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1))
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.up.scatter2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 3 + supp/Harmony_all_plot_path_SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.up.scatter.pdf", width = 6.625, height = 6.9)
harmony.SMC2and3vsSMC1.ora.GO.up.scatter2
dev.off()
```

### CellChat analysis

```{r}
### Define CellChat database
CellChatDB <- CellChatDB.mouse
CellChatDB.use <- subsetDB(CellChatDB) # use all CellChatDB except for "Non-protein Signaling" for cell-cell communication analysis

### Subset Seurat object based on sample
Aorta.harmony.CellChat <- Aorta.harmony
active_identities <- Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat)
feature_counts <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat@meta.data$nFeature_RNA
active_identities <- as.character(active_identities)
active_identities[active_identities %in% c("EC 1", "EC 2") & feature_counts >= 1000] <- "EC"
Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat) <- factor(active_identities)
Aorta.harmony.CellChat@meta.data$CellChat_clusters <- factor(active_identities)
Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join <- JoinLayers(Aorta.harmony.CellChat)
Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.sub <- subset(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join, idents = c("EC 1", "EC 2", "EC 3"), invert = TRUE)
metadata <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.sub@meta.data # Access the metadata
metadata$CellChat_clusters <- droplevels(factor(metadata$CellChat_clusters)) # Drop unused levels in 'CellChat_clusters'
Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.sub@meta.data <- metadata # Update the Seurat object with the modified metadata
Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.sub) <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.sub$orig.ident
Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_01 <- subset(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.sub, idents = c("SRB_02", "SRB_03", "SRB_04"), invert = TRUE)
Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_02 <- subset(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.sub, idents = c("SRB_01", "SRB_03", "SRB_04"), invert = TRUE)
Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_03 <- subset(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.sub, idents = c("SRB_01", "SRB_02", "SRB_04"), invert = TRUE)
Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_04 <- subset(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.sub, idents = c("SRB_01", "SRB_02", "SRB_03"), invert = TRUE)

### Run CellChat for SRB_01
Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_01) <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_01$CellChat_clusters

data.input.SRB_01 <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_01[["RNA"]]$data # normalized data matrix
labels.SRB_01 <- Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_01)
meta.SRB_01 <- data.frame(labels = labels.SRB_01, row.names = names(labels.SRB_01)) # create a dataframe of the cell labels

cellchat.SRB_01 <- createCellChat(object = Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_01, group.by = "CellChat_clusters", assay = "RNA")

cellchat.SRB_01@DB <- CellChatDB.use # set the used database in the object

# subset the expression data of signaling genes for saving computation cost
cellchat.SRB_01 <- subsetData(cellchat.SRB_01) # This step is necessary even if using the whole database
#future::plan("multisession", workers = 4) # parallelization is stalling CellChat
cellchat.SRB_01 <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat.SRB_01)
cellchat.SRB_01 <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat.SRB_01)

options(future.globals.maxSize = 8000 * 1024^2)
cellchat.SRB_01 <- computeCommunProb(cellchat.SRB_01, type = "triMean", population.size = TRUE) # Added population.size = TRUE to account for cell proportions in probability calculation (remove if needed). Try type = "truncatedMean" if needed. Receiving integer overflow error (need to resolve?).
cellchat.SRB_01 <- filterCommunication(cellchat.SRB_01, min.cells = 10)

df.net.SRB_01.LR <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.SRB_01)
df.net.SRB_01.path <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.SRB_01, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat.SRB_01 <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat.SRB_01)
cellchat.SRB_01 <- aggregateNet(cellchat.SRB_01)
cellchat.SRB_01 <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat.SRB_01)

### Run CellChat for SRB_02
Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_02) <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_02$CellChat_clusters

data.input.SRB_02 <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_02[["RNA"]]$data # normalized data matrix
labels.SRB_02 <- Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_02)
meta.SRB_02 <- data.frame(labels = labels.SRB_02, row.names = names(labels.SRB_02)) # create a dataframe of the cell labels

cellchat.SRB_02 <- createCellChat(object = Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_02, group.by = "CellChat_clusters", assay = "RNA")

cellchat.SRB_02@DB <- CellChatDB.use # set the used database in the object

# subset the expression data of signaling genes for saving computation cost
cellchat.SRB_02 <- subsetData(cellchat.SRB_02) # This step is necessary even if using the whole database
#future::plan("multisession", workers = 4) # parallelization is stalling CellChat
cellchat.SRB_02 <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat.SRB_02)
cellchat.SRB_02 <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat.SRB_02)

options(future.globals.maxSize = 8000 * 1024^2)
cellchat.SRB_02 <- computeCommunProb(cellchat.SRB_02, type = "triMean", population.size = TRUE) # Added population.size = TRUE to account for cell proportions in probability calculation (remove if needed). Try type = "truncatedMean" if needed. Receiving integer overflow error (need to resolve?).
cellchat.SRB_02 <- filterCommunication(cellchat.SRB_02, min.cells = 10)

df.net.SRB_02.LR <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.SRB_02)
df.net.SRB_02.path <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.SRB_02, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat.SRB_02 <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat.SRB_02)
cellchat.SRB_02 <- aggregateNet(cellchat.SRB_02)
cellchat.SRB_02 <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat.SRB_02)

### Run CellChat for SRB_03
Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_03) <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_03$CellChat_clusters

data.input.SRB_03 <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_03[["RNA"]]$data # normalized data matrix
labels.SRB_03 <- Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_03)
meta.SRB_03 <- data.frame(labels = labels.SRB_03, row.names = names(labels.SRB_03)) # create a dataframe of the cell labels

cellchat.SRB_03 <- createCellChat(object = Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_03, group.by = "CellChat_clusters", assay = "RNA")

cellchat.SRB_03@DB <- CellChatDB.use # set the used database in the object

# subset the expression data of signaling genes for saving computation cost
cellchat.SRB_03 <- subsetData(cellchat.SRB_03) # This step is necessary even if using the whole database
#future::plan("multisession", workers = 4) # parallelization is stalling CellChat
cellchat.SRB_03 <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat.SRB_03)
cellchat.SRB_03 <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat.SRB_03)

options(future.globals.maxSize = 8000 * 1024^2)
cellchat.SRB_03 <- computeCommunProb(cellchat.SRB_03, type = "triMean", population.size = TRUE) # Added population.size = TRUE to account for cell proportions in probability calculation (remove if needed). Try type = "truncatedMean" if needed. Receiving integer overflow error (need to resolve?).
cellchat.SRB_03 <- filterCommunication(cellchat.SRB_03, min.cells = 10)

df.net.SRB_03.LR <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.SRB_03)
df.net.SRB_03.path <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.SRB_03, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat.SRB_03 <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat.SRB_03)
cellchat.SRB_03 <- aggregateNet(cellchat.SRB_03)
cellchat.SRB_03 <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat.SRB_03)

### Run CellChat for SRB_04
Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_04) <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_04$CellChat_clusters

data.input.SRB_04 <- Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_04[["RNA"]]$data # normalized data matrix
labels.SRB_04 <- Idents(Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_04)
meta.SRB_04 <- data.frame(labels = labels.SRB_04, row.names = names(labels.SRB_04)) # create a dataframe of the cell labels

cellchat.SRB_04 <- createCellChat(object = Aorta.harmony.CellChat.join.SRB_04, group.by = "CellChat_clusters", assay = "RNA")

cellchat.SRB_04@DB <- CellChatDB.use # set the used database in the object

# subset the expression data of signaling genes for saving computation cost
cellchat.SRB_04 <- subsetData(cellchat.SRB_04) # This step is necessary even if using the whole database
#future::plan("multisession", workers = 4) # parallelization is stalling CellChat
cellchat.SRB_04 <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat.SRB_04)
cellchat.SRB_04 <- identifyOverExpressedInteractions(cellchat.SRB_04)

options(future.globals.maxSize = 8000 * 1024^2)
cellchat.SRB_04 <- computeCommunProb(cellchat.SRB_04, type = "triMean", population.size = TRUE) # Added population.size = TRUE to account for cell proportions in probability calculation (remove if needed). Try type = "truncatedMean" if needed. Receiving integer overflow error (need to resolve?).
cellchat.SRB_04 <- filterCommunication(cellchat.SRB_04, min.cells = 10)

df.net.SRB_04.LR <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.SRB_04)
df.net.SRB_04.path <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.SRB_04, slot.name = "netP")

cellchat.SRB_04 <- computeCommunProbPathway(cellchat.SRB_04)
cellchat.SRB_04 <- aggregateNet(cellchat.SRB_04)
cellchat.SRB_04 <- netAnalysis_computeCentrality(cellchat.SRB_04)

### Merge CellChat objects
object.list.all <- list(SRB_01 = cellchat.SRB_01, SRB_02 = cellchat.SRB_02, SRB_03 = cellchat.SRB_03, SRB_04 = cellchat.SRB_04)
cellchat <- mergeCellChat(object.list.all, add.names = names(object.list.all))

### Plot interactions between samples
gg1 <- compareInteractions(cellchat, show.legend = F, group = c(1,2,3,4))
gg2 <- compareInteractions(cellchat, show.legend = F, group = c(1,2,3,4), measure = "weight")
gg1 + gg2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/CellChat/Harmony_all_plot_cellchat_1.pdf")
gg1 + gg2
dev.off()

### Fig 3 - Plot differential interactions for KO vs. Ctrl (circle)
par(mfrow = c(1,2), xpd=TRUE)
netVisual_diffInteraction(cellchat, comparison = c(1, 2), weight.scale = T, color.use = c("#5EB300", "#00ADFA", "#FF61C3", "#619CFF", "#DB72FB", "#00BA38", "#D39200", "#FF699C", "#00C19F", "#F8766D", "#E88526", "#93AA00", "#00BFC4", "#F564E3", "#B79F00", "#00B9E3"))
netVisual_diffInteraction(cellchat, comparison = c(1, 2), weight.scale = T, measure = "weight", color.use = c("#5EB300", "#00ADFA", "#FF61C3", "#619CFF", "#DB72FB", "#00BA38", "#D39200", "#FF699C", "#00C19F", "#F8766D", "#E88526", "#93AA00", "#00BFC4", "#F564E3", "#B79F00", "#00B9E3"))

par(mfrow = c(1,2), xpd=TRUE)
netVisual_diffInteraction(cellchat, comparison = c(1, 2), weight.scale = T, color.use = c("#5EB300", "#00ADFA", "#FF61C3", "#619CFF", "#DB72FB", "#00BA38", "#D39200", "#FF699C", "#00C19F", "#F8766D", "#E88526", "#93AA00", "#00BFC4", "#F564E3", "#B79F00", "#00B9E3"))
netVisual_diffInteraction(cellchat, comparison = c(1, 2), weight.scale = T, measure = "weight", color.use = c("#5EB300", "#00ADFA", "#FF61C3", "#619CFF", "#DB72FB", "#00BA38", "#D39200", "#FF699C", "#00C19F", "#F8766D", "#E88526", "#93AA00", "#00BFC4", "#F564E3", "#B79F00", "#00B9E3"))

### Plot independent interactions for 4 samples (circle)

for (i in 1:length(object.list.all)) {
  netVisual_circle(object.list.all[[i]]@net$count, weight.scale = T, label.edge= F, edge.weight.max = weight.max[2], edge.width.max = 12, title.name = paste0("Number of interactions - ", names(object.list.all)[i]))
}

}

### Outgoing, incoming, and all signalling patterns (heatmap)

ht2 = netAnalysis_signalingRole_heatmap(object.list.all[[i+1]], pattern = "outgoing", signaling = pathway.union, title = names(object.list.all)[i+1], width = 5, height = 12)

### Differential ligand + receptor expression analysis for circle plots
object.list.wk4 <- list(SRB_01 = cellchat.SRB_01, SRB_02 = cellchat.SRB_02)
cellchat.wk4 <- mergeCellChat(object.list.wk4, add.names = names(object.list.wk4))
pos.dataset = "SRB_02"
features.name = paste0(pos.dataset, ".merged")
cellchat.wk4 <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat.wk4, group.dataset = "datasets", pos.dataset = pos.dataset, features.name = features.name, only.pos = FALSE, thresh.pc = 0.1, thresh.fc = 0, thresh.p = 1, group.DE.combined = FALSE)
net.wk4 <- netMappingDEG(cellchat.wk4, features.name = features.name, variable.all = TRUE)
net.wk4.Ctrl.up <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.wk4, net = net.wk4, datasets = "SRB_01", thresh = 0.05, ligand.logFC = -0.5, ligand.pvalues = 0.05)
net.wk4.Ctrl.down <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.wk4, net = net.wk4, datasets = "SRB_01", thresh = 0.05, ligand.logFC = 0.5, ligand.pvalues = 0.05)
net.wk4.KO.up <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.wk4, net = net.wk4, datasets = "SRB_02", thresh = 0.05, ligand.logFC = 0.5, ligand.pvalues = 0.05)
net.wk4.KO.down <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.wk4, net = net.wk4, datasets = "SRB_02", thresh = 0.05, ligand.logFC = -0.5, ligand.pvalues = 0.05)
write.csv(net.wk4, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/CellChat/DEGanalysis.wk4.csv")
object.list.wk12 <- list(SRB_03 = cellchat.SRB_03, SRB_04 = cellchat.SRB_04)
cellchat.wk12 <- mergeCellChat(object.list.wk12, add.names = names(object.list.wk12))
pos.dataset = "SRB_04"
features.name = paste0(pos.dataset, ".merged")
cellchat.wk12 <- identifyOverExpressedGenes(cellchat.wk12, group.dataset = "datasets", pos.dataset = pos.dataset, features.name = features.name, only.pos = FALSE, thresh.pc = 0.1, thresh.fc = 0, thresh.p = 1, group.DE.combined = FALSE)
net.wk12 <- netMappingDEG(cellchat.wk12, features.name = features.name, variable.all = TRUE)
net.wk12.Ctrl.up <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.wk12, net = net.wk12, datasets = "SRB_03", thresh = 0.05, ligand.logFC = -0.5, ligand.pvalues = 0.05)
net.wk12.Ctrl.down <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.wk12, net = net.wk12, datasets = "SRB_03", thresh = 0.05, ligand.logFC = 0.5, ligand.pvalues = 0.05)
net.wk12.KO.up <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.wk12, net = net.wk12, datasets = "SRB_04", thresh = 0.05, ligand.logFC = 0.5, ligand.pvalues = 0.05)
net.wk12.KO.down <- subsetCommunication(cellchat.wk12, net = net.wk12, datasets = "SRB_04", thresh = 0.05, ligand.logFC = -0.5, ligand.pvalues = 0.05)
write.csv(net.wk12, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/CellChat/DEGanalysis.wk12.csv")

### Fig 3 - Bubble plots for LR interactions of interest
LR.pairs.Ctrl <- data.frame(interaction_name = c("GJA5_GJA5", "CADM1_CADM1", "JAG1_NOTCH1", "ANGPT1_TEK", "COL1A2_SDC4", "COL1A1_SDC4"))
netVisual_bubble(cellchat, sources.use = c(2,5,6,7,10,11,12), targets.use = c(2), pairLR.use = LR.pairs.Ctrl, comparison = c(1, 2, 3, 4), angle.x = 45, thresh = 0.05, font.size = 12, color.text = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3"))
dotplot_LR_Ctrl.data <- netVisual_bubble(cellchat, sources.use = c(2,5,6,7,10,11,12), targets.use = c(2), pairLR.use = LR.pairs.Ctrl, comparison = c(1, 2, 3, 4), angle.x = 45, thresh = 0.05, font.size = 12, color.text = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3"), return.data = TRUE)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 3 + supp/Harmony_all_plot_cellchat_dotplot_LR_Ctrl.pdf", width = 9, height = 3)
netVisual_bubble(cellchat, sources.use = c(2,5,6,7,10,11,12), targets.use = c(2), pairLR.use = LR.pairs.Ctrl, comparison = c(1, 2, 3, 4), angle.x = 45, thresh = 0.05, font.size = 12, color.text = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3"))
dev.off()

dev.off()

LR.pairs.KO.2 <- data.frame(interaction_name = c("SPP1_CD44", "FN1_CD44", "COL4A1_CD44", "COL1A2_CD44", "THBS1_CD47", "CADM1_CADM1"))
netVisual_bubble(cellchat, targets.use = c(2,5,6,7,10,11,12), sources.use = c(2), pairLR.use = LR.pairs.KO.2, comparison = c(1, 2, 3, 4), angle.x = 45, thresh = 0.05, font.size = 12, color.text = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3"))
dotplot_LR_KO.2.data <- netVisual_bubble(cellchat, targets.use = c(2,5,6,7,10,11,12), sources.use = c(2), pairLR.use = LR.pairs.KO.2, comparison = c(1, 2, 3, 4), angle.x = 45, thresh = 0.05, font.size = 12, color.text = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3"), return.data = TRUE)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 3 + supp/Harmony_all_plot_cellchat_dotplot_LR_KO.2.pdf", width = 9, height = 3)
netVisual_bubble(cellchat, targets.use = c(2,5,6,7,10,11,12), sources.use = c(2), pairLR.use = LR.pairs.KO.2, comparison = c(1, 2, 3, 4), angle.x = 45, thresh = 0.05, font.size = 12, color.text = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3"))
dev.off()

LR.prob.max <- max(
  max(dotplot_LR_Ctrl.data$communication$prob, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(dotplot_LR_KO.1.data$communication$prob, na.rm = TRUE),
  max(dotplot_LR_KO.2.data$communication$prob, na.rm = TRUE)
)
LR.prob.max <- ceiling(LR.prob.max * 100) / 100
LR.prob.min <- min(
  min(dotplot_LR_Ctrl.data$communication$prob, na.rm = TRUE),
  min(dotplot_LR_KO.1.data$communication$prob, na.rm = TRUE),
  min(dotplot_LR_KO.2.data$communication$prob, na.rm = TRUE)
)
LR.prob.min <- floor(LR.prob.min * 100) / 100

plot <- ggplot(dotplot_LR_Ctrl.data$communication, aes(x = dotplot_LR_Ctrl.data$communication$source.target, y = dotplot_LR_Ctrl.data$communication$interaction_name_2, color = -(dotplot_LR_Ctrl.data$communication$prob))) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-(LR.prob.max), LR.prob.max)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
plot
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 3 + supp/Harmony_all_plot_cellchat_dotplot_LR_Ctrl_RdBu.pdf", width = 9, height = 3)
plot
dev.off()

plot <- ggplot(dotplot_LR_KO.1.data$communication, aes(x = dotplot_LR_KO.1.data$communication$source.target, y = dotplot_LR_KO.1.data$communication$interaction_name_2, color = dotplot_LR_KO.1.data$communication$prob)) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-(LR.prob.max), LR.prob.max)) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
plot

### Fig 3 - Violin plots for LR interaction partners
cellchat.violin <- subsetCellChat(cellchat, idents.use = c("EC", "Macrophage 1", "Macrophage 2", "Macrophage 3", "SMC 1", "SMC 2", "SMC 3"))
cellchat.violin@meta$datasets = factor(cellchat.violin@meta$datasets, levels = c("SRB_01", "SRB_02", "SRB_03", "SRB_04")) # set factor level
plotGeneExpression(cellchat.violin, features = c("Angpt1", "Tek", "Jag1", "Notch1", "Cadm1", "Gja5"), split.by = "datasets", color.use = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3"), type = "violin", angle.x = 45)

pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 3 + supp/Harmony_all_plot_cellchat_violin_DGE_KO.2.pdf", width = 8, height = 4)

plotGeneExpression(cellchat.violin, features = c("Cd47", "Col1a2", "Col4a1", "Fn1", "Spp1", "Cd44"), split.by = "datasets", color.use = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3"), type = "violin", angle.x = 45)
dev.off()
```

### Subset Harmony integrated data for EC clusters

```{r}
Aorta.harmony.subset1 <- subset(Aorta.harmony, idents = c("SMC 1", "SMC 2", "SMC 3", "SMC 5", "Macrophage 3", "Fibroblast 2", "SMC 4", "Fibroblast 1", "Macrophage 1", "T cell 2", "T cell 1", "Macrophage 2", "B cell", "Prolif. cell", "Neutrophil"), invert = TRUE)
ElbowPlot(Aorta.harmony.subset1)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_subset_plot_QC_1.pdf", width = 10, height = 10)
ElbowPlot(Aorta.harmony.subset1)
dev.off()
Aorta.harmony.subset1 <- FindNeighbors(Aorta.harmony.subset1, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:17)
Aorta.harmony.subset1 <- FindClusters(Aorta.harmony.subset1, resolution = 0.2)
Aorta.harmony.subset1 <- RunUMAP(Aorta.harmony.subset1, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:17)
new.cluster.ids3 <- c("EC 2'", "EC 3'", "EC 1'")
names(new.cluster.ids3) <- levels(Aorta.harmony.subset1)
Aorta.harmony.subset1 <- RenameIdents(Aorta.harmony.subset1, new.cluster.ids3)

### Output per cluster QC stats

# Get cluster names from active.ident
Aorta.harmony.subset1.cluster_names <- Aorta.harmony.subset1@active.ident
# Calculate cells per cluster
Aorta.harmony.subset1.cell_counts <- table(Aorta.harmony.subset1.cluster_names)
# Calculate median nFeature_RNA per cluster
Aorta.harmony.subset1.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nFeature_RNA ~ Aorta.harmony.subset1.cluster_names, data = Aorta.harmony.subset1@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median nCount_RNA per cluster
Aorta.harmony.subset1.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nCount_RNA ~ Aorta.harmony.subset1.cluster_names, data = Aorta.harmony.subset1@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median percent.mt per cluster
Aorta.harmony.subset1.median_percent_MT_per_cluster <- aggregate(percent.MT ~ Aorta.harmony.subset1.cluster_names, data = Aorta.harmony.subset1@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Merge all information into a single dataframe
result_table <- data.frame(
    Cells_Per_Cluster = as.numeric(Aorta.harmony.subset1.cell_counts),
    Median_nFeature_RNA = Aorta.harmony.subset1.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$nFeature_RNA,
    Median_nCount_RNA = Aorta.harmony.subset1.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster$nCount_RNA,
    Median_Percent_MT = Aorta.harmony.subset1.median_percent_MT_per_cluster$percent.MT,
    row.names = Aorta.harmony.subset1.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$Aorta.harmony.subset1.cluster_names
)
# Print the result
print(result_table)
write.csv(result_table, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_subset_table_QC_1.csv")

### Cell in each cluster per sample

Harmony_subset_table_QC_2 
write.csv(Harmony_subset_table_QC_2, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_subset_table_QC_2.csv")

comp1 <- ggplot(Aorta.harmony.subset1@meta.data, aes(x=harmony_subset_clusters, fill=orig.ident)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Cluster composition - integrated",
       x = "Cluster",
       y = "Fraction",
       fill = "Group") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#F8766D", "#7CAE00", "#00BFC4", "#C77Cff"), labels = c("Ctrl.Wk4", "KO.Wk4", "Ctrl.Wk12", "KO.Wk12"))
comp2 <- comp1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
                   legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
                   axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
comp2
```

```{r}
### Output per cluster QC stats

# Get cluster names from active.ident
Aorta.pca.subset.cluster_names <- Aorta.pca.subset@active.ident
# Calculate cells per cluster
Aorta.pca.subset.cell_counts <- table(Aorta.pca.subset.cluster_names)
# Calculate median nFeature_RNA per cluster
Aorta.pca.subset.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nFeature_RNA ~ Aorta.pca.subset.cluster_names, data = Aorta.pca.subset@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median nCount_RNA per cluster
Aorta.pca.subset.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nCount_RNA ~ Aorta.pca.subset.cluster_names, data = Aorta.pca.subset@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median percent.mt per cluster
Aorta.pca.subset.median_percent_MT_per_cluster <- aggregate(percent.MT ~ Aorta.pca.subset.cluster_names, data = Aorta.pca.subset@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Merge all information into a single dataframe
result_table <- data.frame(
    Cells_Per_Cluster = as.numeric(Aorta.pca.subset.cell_counts),
    Median_nFeature_RNA = Aorta.pca.subset.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$nFeature_RNA,
    Median_nCount_RNA = Aorta.pca.subset.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster$nCount_RNA,
    Median_Percent_MT = Aorta.pca.subset.median_percent_MT_per_cluster$percent.MT,
    row.names = Aorta.pca.subset.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$Aorta.pca.subset.cluster_names
)
# Print the result
print(result_table)
write.csv(result_table, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_subset_table_QC_3.csv")

Aorta.pca.subset.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nCount_RNA ~ Aorta.pca.subset.cluster_names, data = Aorta.pca.subset@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median percent.mt per cluster
Aorta.pca.subset.median_percent_MT_per_cluster <- aggregate(percent.MT ~ Aorta.pca.subset.cluster_names, data = Aorta.pca.subset@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Merge all information into a single dataframe
result_table <- data.frame(
    Cells_Per_Cluster = as.numeric(Aorta.pca.subset.cell_counts),
    Median_nFeature_RNA = Aorta.pca.subset.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$nFeature_RNA,
    Median_nCount_RNA = Aorta.pca.subset.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster$nCount_RNA,

### Percent composition by Sample ID for each cluster

Aorta.pca.subset <- AddMetaData(Aorta.pca.subset, metadata = Idents(Aorta.pca.subset), col.name = "pca_subset_clusters")
comp1 <- ggplot(Aorta.pca.subset@meta.data, aes(x=pca_subset_clusters, fill=orig.ident)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Cluster composition - unintegrated",
       x = "Cluster",
       y = "Fraction",
       fill = "Group") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#F8766D", "#7CAE00", "#00BFC4", "#C77Cff"), labels = c("Ctrl.Wk4", "KO.Wk4", "Ctrl.Wk12", "KO.Wk12"))
comp2 <- comp1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
                   legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
                   axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(ncol = 1))
comp2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_subset_plot_QC_6.pdf", width = 9.5, height = 10)
comp2
dev.off()
```

```{r}
total.counts <- t(table(Aorta.harmony@meta.data$orig.ident, Aorta.harmony@meta.data$Clusters_uncorrected))
total.counts <- apply(total.counts, 2, function(x) prop.table(x))
total.counts <- as.data.frame(total.counts)
total.counts <- rownames_to_column(total.counts, var = "Cluster")
total.counts.long <- total.counts %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -Cluster, names_to = "Group", values_to = "Freq")
total.counts.long$Cluster <- factor(total.counts.long$Cluster, levels = unique(total.counts.long$Cluster))
```
