### Between sample DE using harmony clusters

```{r}
Aorta.harmony.subset2.join <- JoinLayers(Aorta.harmony.subset2)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers <- FindMarkers(Aorta.harmony.subset2.join, ident.1 = "SRB_04", ident.2 = "SRB_03", group.by = 'Sample_ID')
write.csv(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/Harmony_subset_wk12.KOvsCtrl_markers.csv")
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers <- FindMarkers(Aorta.harmony.subset2.join, ident.1 = "SRB_02", ident.2 = "SRB_01", group.by = 'Sample_ID')
write.csv(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/Harmony_subset_wk4.KOvsCtrl_markers.csv")
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers <- FindMarkers(Aorta.harmony.subset2.join, ident.1 = "SRB_04", ident.2 = "SRB_02", group.by = 'Sample_ID')
write.csv(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/Harmony_subset_KO.wk12vswk4_markers.csv")
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers <- FindMarkers(Aorta.harmony.subset2.join, ident.1 = "SRB_03", ident.2 = "SRB_01", group.by = 'Sample_ID')
write.csv(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/Harmony_subset_Ctrl.wk12vswk4_markers.csv")
```

### DE gene lists

```{r}
all.wk4 <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers)
all.wk12 <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)
all.wk4and12 <- unique(c(all.wk4, all.wk12))
all.sig.wk4 <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers)[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05]
all.sig.wk12 <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05]
all.sig.wk4and12 <- unique(c(all.sig.wk4, all.sig.wk12))
all.sig.down.wk4 <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers)[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC < 0]
all.sig.down.wk12 <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC < 0]
all.sig.down.wk4and12 <- unique(c(all.sig.down.wk4, all.sig.down.wk12))
all.sig.up.wk4 <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers)[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC > 0]
all.sig.up.wk12 <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC > 0]
all.sig.up.wk4and12 <- unique(c(all.sig.up.wk4, all.sig.up.wk12))

matching_terms <- EC.markers.mouse[EC.markers.mouse %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers)]
EC.sig.wk4 <- matching_terms[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05]
EC.sig.down.wk4 <- matching_terms[
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "avg_log2FC"] < 0
]
EC.sig.up.wk4 <- matching_terms[
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "avg_log2FC"] > 0
]
matching_terms <- EC.markers.mouse[EC.markers.mouse %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)]
EC.sig.wk12 <- matching_terms[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05]
EC.sig.down.wk12 <- matching_terms[
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "avg_log2FC"] < 0
]
EC.sig.up.wk12 <- matching_terms[
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "avg_log2FC"] > 0
]
matching_terms_wk4 <- EC.markers.mouse[EC.markers.mouse %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers)]
matching_terms_wk12 <- EC.markers.mouse[EC.markers.mouse %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)]
filtered_terms_wk4 <- matching_terms_wk4[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05]
filtered_terms_wk12 <- matching_terms_wk12[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05]
EC.sig.wk4and12 <- unique(c(filtered_terms_wk4, filtered_terms_wk12))
filtered_terms_wk4 <- matching_terms_wk4[
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "avg_log2FC"] < 0
]
filtered_terms_wk12 <- matching_terms_wk12[
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "avg_log2FC"] < 0
]
EC.sig.down.wk4and12 <- unique(c(filtered_terms_wk4, filtered_terms_wk12))
filtered_terms_wk4 <- matching_terms_wk4[
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "avg_log2FC"] > 0
]
filtered_terms_wk12 <- matching_terms_wk12[
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "avg_log2FC"] > 0
]
EC.sig.up.wk4and12 <- unique(c(filtered_terms_wk4, filtered_terms_wk12))

matching_terms <- EndMT.markers.mouse[EndMT.markers.mouse %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers)]
EndMT.sig.wk4 <- matching_terms[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05]
EndMT.sig.down.wk4 <- matching_terms[
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "avg_log2FC"] < 0
]
EndMT.sig.up.wk4 <- matching_terms[
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "avg_log2FC"] > 0
]
matching_terms <- EndMT.markers.mouse[EndMT.markers.mouse %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)]
EndMT.sig.wk12 <- matching_terms[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05]
EndMT.sig.down.wk12 <- matching_terms[
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "avg_log2FC"] < 0
]
EndMT.sig.up.wk12 <- matching_terms[
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms, "avg_log2FC"] > 0
]
matching_terms_wk4 <- EndMT.markers.mouse[EndMT.markers.mouse %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers)]
matching_terms_wk12 <- EndMT.markers.mouse[EndMT.markers.mouse %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)]
filtered_terms_wk4 <- matching_terms_wk4[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05]
filtered_terms_wk12 <- matching_terms_wk12[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05]
EndMT.sig.wk4and12 <- unique(c(filtered_terms_wk4, filtered_terms_wk12))
filtered_terms_wk4 <- matching_terms_wk4[
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "avg_log2FC"] < 0
]
filtered_terms_wk12 <- matching_terms_wk12[
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "avg_log2FC"] < 0
]
EndMT.sig.down.wk4and12 <- unique(c(filtered_terms_wk4, filtered_terms_wk12))
filtered_terms_wk4 <- matching_terms_wk4[
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk4, "avg_log2FC"] > 0
]
filtered_terms_wk12 <- matching_terms_wk12[
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05 &
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[matching_terms_wk12, "avg_log2FC"] > 0
]
EndMT.sig.up.wk4and12 <- unique(c(filtered_terms_wk4, filtered_terms_wk12))

vectors_list <- list(
  all.wk4 = all.wk4,
  all.wk12 = all.wk12,
  all.wk4and12 = all.wk4and12,
  all.sig.wk4 = all.sig.wk4,
  all.sig.wk12 = all.sig.wk12,
  all.sig.wk4and12 = all.sig.wk4and12,
  all.sig.down.wk4 = all.sig.down.wk4,
  all.sig.down.wk12 = all.sig.down.wk12,
  all.sig.down.wk4and12 = all.sig.down.wk4and12,
  all.sig.up.wk4 = all.sig.up.wk4,
  all.sig.up.wk12 = all.sig.up.wk12,
  all.sig.up.wk4and12 = all.sig.up.wk4and12,
  EC.sig.wk4 = EC.sig.wk4,
  EC.sig.down.wk4 = EC.sig.down.wk4,
  EC.sig.up.wk4 = EC.sig.up.wk4,
  EC.sig.wk12 = EC.sig.wk12,
  EC.sig.down.wk12 = EC.sig.down.wk12,
  EC.sig.up.wk12 = EC.sig.up.wk12,
  EC.sig.wk4and12 = EC.sig.wk4and12,
  EC.sig.down.wk4and12 = EC.sig.down.wk4and12,
  EC.sig.up.wk4and12 = EC.sig.up.wk4and12,
  EndMT.sig.wk4 = EndMT.sig.wk4,
  EndMT.sig.down.wk4 = EndMT.sig.down.wk4,
  EndMT.sig.up.wk4 = EndMT.sig.up.wk4,
  EndMT.sig.wk12 = EndMT.sig.wk12,
  EndMT.sig.down.wk12 = EndMT.sig.down.wk12,
  EndMT.sig.up.wk12 = EndMT.sig.up.wk12,
  EndMT.sig.wk4and12 = EndMT.sig.wk4and12,
  EndMT.sig.down.wk4and12 = EndMT.sig.down.wk4and12,
  EndMT.sig.up.wk4and12 = EndMT.sig.up.wk4and12
)
vector_names <- names(vectors_list)
vector_counts <- sapply(vectors_list, length)
max_length <- max(vector_counts)
terms_matrix <- matrix(NA, nrow = max_length, ncol = length(vectors_list))
for (i in seq_along(vectors_list)) {
  terms_matrix[1:length(vectors_list[[i]]), i] <- vectors_list[[i]]
}
terms_df <- as.data.frame(terms_matrix, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
header <- rbind(vector_names, vector_counts)
header_df <- as.data.frame((header), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
colnames(terms_df) <- header_df[1, ]
header_df <- header_df[-1, , drop = FALSE]
final_df <- rbind(header_df, terms_df)
write.csv(final_df, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/SRB.DE.gene.lists.csv", row.names = FALSE, na = "")
```

```{r}
vlnplot <- ggplot(expr_data, aes(x = cluster, y = expression, fill = cluster)) +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.4, size = 0.1, alpha = 1, color = "black") +
    geom_violin(trim = TRUE, scale = "width") +
    labs(y = "Expression") +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0.01,0)) +
    theme(legend.position = "none",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
        axis.text = element_text(size=16, face = "plain"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20, face = "plain"),
        axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.line = element_line(size=1),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1),
        panel.border = element_blank(),

### EC composite stats
Sample.ID <- Aorta.pca.subset.join@meta.data$Sample_ID
EC.sig.wk4and12.UCell <- Aorta.pca.subset.join@meta.data$EC.sig.wk4and12.UCell
EC.composite.df <- data.frame(ID = Sample.ID, EC.sig.wk4and12.UCell = EC.sig.wk4and12.UCell)
EC.composite.df %>% 
  group_by(ID) %>%
  get_summary_stats(EC.sig.wk4and12.UCell, type = "common")
EC.kruskal <- EC.composite.df %>% kruskal_test(EC.sig.wk4and12.UCell ~ ID)
EC.kruskal
EC.kruskal.effsize <- EC.composite.df %>% kruskal_effsize(EC.sig.wk4and12.UCell ~ ID)
EC.kruskal.effsize
EC.kruskal.Dunn <- EC.composite.df %>% 
  dunn_test(EC.sig.wk4and12.UCell ~ ID, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni") 
EC.kruskal.Dunn

### EndMT composite stats
Sample.ID <- Aorta.pca.subset.join@meta.data$Sample_ID
EndMT.sig.wk4and12.UCell <- Aorta.pca.subset.join@meta.data$EndMT.sig.wk4and12.UCell
EndMT.composite.df <- data.frame(ID = Sample.ID, EndMT.sig.wk4and12.UCell = EndMT.sig.wk4and12.UCell)
EndMT.composite.df %>% 
  group_by(ID) %>%
  get_summary_stats(EndMT.sig.wk4and12.UCell, type = "common")
EndMT.kruskal <- EndMT.composite.df %>% kruskal_test(EndMT.sig.wk4and12.UCell ~ ID)
EndMT.kruskal
EndMT.kruskal.effsize <- EndMT.composite.df %>% kruskal_effsize(EndMT.sig.wk4and12.UCell ~ ID)
EndMT.kruskal.effsize
EndMT.kruskal.Dunn <- EndMT.composite.df %>% 
  dunn_test(EndMT.sig.wk4and12.UCell ~ ID, p.adjust.method = "bonferroni") 
EndMT.kruskal.Dunn
```

### Between sample DE volcano plots

```{r}
### harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano formatting
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers %>%
  mutate(diffexp.top = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.EndMT = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.EC.all = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.mes.all = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC > 10] <- Inf
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC < -10] <- -Inf
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$p_val_adj[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$p_val_adj < 1e-250] <- 1e-250
prefixes_to_remove <- c("Hba", "Hbb", "mt-", "Rpl", "Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
rows_to_keep <- !(grepl(paste0("^", paste(prefixes_to_remove, collapse = "|")), rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[rows_to_keep, ]

### Fig 4 - Harmony_subset_plot_volcano_wk12.KOvsCtrl_top
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$delabel.top <- NA
df.pos <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC > 0, ]  # subset for positive fold change
df.pos.rownames <- rownames(df.pos)[1:15]
for (value in df.pos.rownames) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
   harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano) == value, "delabel.top"] <- value
  }
}
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano) %in% df.pos.rownames
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top[genes_in_list] <- "label"
df.neg <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC < 0, ]  # subset for positive fold change
df.neg.rownames <- rownames(df.neg)[1:15]
for (value in df.neg.rownames) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
   harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano) == value, "delabel.top"] <- value
  }
}
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano) %in% df.neg.rownames
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top[genes_in_list] <- "label"
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top1 <- ggplot(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel.top, size = 15)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "down", ], aes(color = "Ctrl"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "up", ], aes(color = "KO"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("deepskyblue3", "firebrick3", "goldenrod3", "grey")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = "Week 12 - KO vs. Ctrl - Top DE transcripts") +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +  
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 250), xlim = c(-7.5, 7.5))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top2 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 4 + supp/Harmony_subset_plot_volcano_wk12.KOvsCtrl_top.pdf", width = 6.725, height = 6.95)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top2
dev.off()

### Fig 4 - Harmony_subset_plot_volcano_wk12.KOvsCtrl_EndMT
EC.markers.mouse1 <- c("Arhgap31", "Tek", "Calcrl", "Foxp1", "Vwf", "Shank3", "Stab1", "Ptprb", "Epas1", "Gja5", "Nos3", "Bmx", "Pecam1", "Vegfc", "Tie1")
EndMT.markers.mouse1 <- c("Fn1", "Ly6a", "Col8a1", "Tmsb4x", "Fbln5", "Timp2", "S100a4", "Ctsl", "Dcn", "Pdgfb", "Mmp14", "Vim", "Cd44", "Cdh13", "Mmp2")
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$delabel.EndMT <- NA
for (value in EC.markers.mouse1) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] < 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.EndMT"] <- value
    }
  }
}
for (value in EndMT.markers.mouse1) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] > 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.EndMT"] <- value
    }
  }
}
gene.list <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$delabel.EndMT[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$delabel.EndMT != ""]
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano) %in% gene.list
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT[genes_in_list] <- "label"
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.EndMT1 <- ggplot(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel.EndMT, size = 15)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
   rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "down", ], aes(color = "Ctrl"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "up", ], aes(color = "KO"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("deepskyblue3", "firebrick3", "goldenrod3", "grey")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = "Week 12 - KO vs. Ctrl - EndMT transcripts") +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +    
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 250), xlim = c(-7.5, 7.5))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.EndMT2 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.EndMT1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),

harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers %>%
  mutate(diffexp.top = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",

    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.EC.all = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.mes.all = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC > 10] <- Inf
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC < -10] <- -Inf
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$p_val_adj[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$p_val_adj < 1e-250] <- 1e-250
prefixes_to_remove <- c("Hba", "Hbb", "mt-", "Rpl", "Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
rows_to_keep <- !(grepl(paste0("^", paste(prefixes_to_remove, collapse = "|")), rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)))
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[rows_to_keep, ]

### Fig 4 - Harmony_subset_plot_volcano_wk4.KOvsCtrl_top
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$delabel.top <- NA
df.pos <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC > 0, ]  # subset for positive fold change
df.pos.rownames <- rownames(df.pos)[1:15]
for (value in df.pos.rownames) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
   harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano) == value, "delabel.top"] <- value
  }
}
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano) %in% df.pos.rownames
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top[genes_in_list] <- "label"
df.neg <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC < 0, ]  # subset for positive fold change
df.neg.rownames <- rownames(df.neg)[1:15]
for (value in df.neg.rownames) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
   harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano) == value, "delabel.top"] <- value
  }
}
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano) %in% df.neg.rownames
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top[genes_in_list] <- "label"
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top1 <- ggplot(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel.top, size = 15)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "down", ], aes(color = "Ctrl"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "up", ], aes(color = "KO"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "goldenrod3", "grey")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = "Week 4 - KO vs. Ctrl - Top DE transcripts") +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +  
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 250), xlim = c(-7.5, 7.5))
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top2 <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1))
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 4 + supp/Harmony_subset_plot_volcano_wk4.KOvsCtrl_top.pdf", width = 6.725, height = 6.95)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.top2
dev.off()

### harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano formatting
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers %>%
  mutate(diffexp.top = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.EndMT = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.EC.all = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.mes.all = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC > 10] <- Inf
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC < -10] <- -Inf
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$p_val_adj[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$p_val_adj < 1e-300] <- 1e-300
prefixes_to_remove <- c("Hba", "Hbb", "mt-", "Rpl", "Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
rows_to_keep <- !(grepl(paste0("^", paste(prefixes_to_remove, collapse = "|")), rownames(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano)))
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[rows_to_keep, ]

   harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[rownames(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano) == value, "delabel.top"] <- value
  }
}

df.neg.rownames <- rownames(df.neg)[1:15]
for (value in df.neg.rownames) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano)) {

harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano.top <- ggplot(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel.top)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
    geom_point(data = harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "down", ], aes(color = "Wk 4"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "up", ], aes(color = "Wk 12"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    geom_label_repel(max.overlaps = Inf) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("goldenrod3", "grey", "firebrick3", "lightpink1")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = "KO - Wk 12 vs. Wk 4 - Top DE transcripts") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 300), xlim = c(-7.5, 7.5))

    geom_point(data = harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("goldenrod3", "grey", "firebrick3", "lightpink1")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = "KO - Wk 12 vs. Wk 4 - EndMT transcripts") +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +  
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 300), xlim = c(-7.5, 7.5))
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano.EndMT2 <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano.EndMT1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),

        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),

### harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano formatting
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers %>%
  mutate(diffexp.top = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.EndMT = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.EC.all = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.mes.all = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC > 10] <- Inf
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC < -10] <- -Inf
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$p_val_adj[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$p_val_adj < 1e-300] <- 1e-300
prefixes_to_remove <- c("Hba", "Hbb", "mt-", "Rpl", "Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
rows_to_keep <- !(grepl(paste0("^", paste(prefixes_to_remove, collapse = "|")), rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano)))
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[rows_to_keep, ]

### Harmony_subset_plot_volcano_Ctrl.wk12vswk4_top
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$delabel.top <- NA
df.pos <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC > 0, ]  # subset for positive fold change
df.pos.rownames <- rownames(df.pos)[1:15]
for (value in df.pos.rownames) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano)) {
   harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano) == value, "delabel.top"] <- value
  }
}
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano) %in% df.pos.rownames
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top[genes_in_list] <- "label"
df.neg <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC < 0, ]  # subset for positive fold change
df.neg.rownames <- rownames(df.neg)[1:15]
for (value in df.neg.rownames) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano)) {
   harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano) == value, "delabel.top"] <- value
  }
}
genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano) %in% df.neg.rownames
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top[genes_in_list] <- "label"
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano.top <- ggplot(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel.top)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
    geom_point(data = harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "down", ], aes(color = "Wk 4"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "up", ], aes(color = "Wk 12"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.top == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    geom_label_repel(max.overlaps = Inf) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("goldenrod3", "grey", "deepskyblue3", "lightskyblue")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = "Ctrl - Wk 12 vs. Wk 4 - Top DE transcripts") +
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 300), xlim = c(-7.5, 7.5))
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano.top

        harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.EndMT"] <- value
    }
  }
}
for (value in EndMT.markers.mouse1) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] > 0 &&
        harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.EndMT"] <- value

  }
}

genes_in_list <- rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano) %in% gene.list

    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "down", ], aes(color = "Wk 4"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
```

### Correlation plots

```{r}
### Harmony_subset_plot_correlation_KO.wk12vsCtrl.EndMT
### Extract row names from input dataframes
row.names.wk12.KOvsCtrl <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)
row.names.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 <- rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers)
common.row.names <- intersect(row.names.wk12.KOvsCtrl, row.names.Ctrl.wk12vswk4)

### Filter dataframes based on common row names
df.wk12.KOvsCtrl <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[common.row.names, c("avg_log2FC","p_val_adj"), drop = FALSE]
df.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers[common.row.names, c("avg_log2FC","p_val_adj"), drop = FALSE]

### Create new dataframe for correlation
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table <- data.frame(
  FC.wk12.KOvsCtrl = df.wk12.KOvsCtrl$avg_log2FC,
  FDR.wk12.KOvsCtrl = df.wk12.KOvsCtrl$p_val_adj,
  FC.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 = df.Ctrl.wk12vswk4$avg_log2FC,
  FDR.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 = df.Ctrl.wk12vswk4$p_val_adj,
  row.names = common.row.names
)
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$score.wk12.KOvsCtrl <- sign(harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$FC.wk12.KOvsCtrl) * -log10(harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$FDR.wk12.KOvsCtrl)
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$score.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 <- sign(harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$FC.Ctrl.wk12vswk4) * -log10(harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$FDR.Ctrl.wk12vswk4)
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table <- harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table[, c("FC.wk12.KOvsCtrl", "FDR.wk12.KOvsCtrl", "score.wk12.KOvsCtrl",
             "FC.Ctrl.wk12vswk4", "FDR.Ctrl.wk12vswk4", "score.Ctrl.wk12vswk4")]
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table <- harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table %>%
  mutate(sig = case_when(
    score.wk12.KOvsCtrl > -log10(0.05) & score.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 > -log10(0.05) & row.names(.) %in% EndMT.markers.mouse ~ "up",
    score.wk12.KOvsCtrl < log10(0.05) & score.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 < log10(0.05) & row.names(.) %in% EC.markers.mouse ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$label <- NA
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table <- harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse(sig %in% c("up", "down"), row.names(harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table), NA))
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$sig <- factor(harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$sig, levels = c("no", "down", "up"))
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table <- harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table[order(harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table$sig), ]
write.csv(harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/Harmony_subset_correlation_KO.wk12vsCtrl.EndMT.csv")

### Plot correlation
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.correlation <- ggplot(data = harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.corr.table, aes(x = score.wk12.KOvsCtrl, y = score.Ctrl.wk12vswk4, col = sig, label = label)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, col = "black") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, col = "black") + 
    geom_smooth(method = lm, formula = y ~ x, aes(group=1)) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_label_repel(max.overlaps = Inf) + 
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-300, 300)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("grey", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3"),
        labels = c("no", "down", "up")) +
    stat_cor(aes(group=1, label = paste(..rr.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~"))) +
    labs(x = "ERG KO enrichment score", y = "Ctrl EndMT enrichment score",
        title = "ERG KO (Wk 12) vs. Ctrl EndMT (Time)")
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.correlation
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/plots/Harmony_subset_plot_correlation_KO.wk12vsCtrl.EndMT.pdf", width = 12.5, height = 10)
harmony.ERGKOvsCtrlEndMTtime.wk12.correlation
dev.off()

df.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers[common.row.names, c("avg_log2FC","p_val_adj"), drop = FALSE]

### Create new dataframe for correlation

  FC.KO.wk12vswk4 = df.KO.wk12vswk4$avg_log2FC,
  FDR.KO.wk12vswk4 = df.KO.wk12vswk4$p_val_adj,
  FC.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 = df.Ctrl.wk12vswk4$avg_log2FC,
  FDR.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 = df.Ctrl.wk12vswk4$p_val_adj,
  row.names = common.row.names
)
harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$score.KO.wk12vswk4 <- sign(harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$FC.KO.wk12vswk4) * -log10(harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$FDR.KO.wk12vswk4)
harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$score.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 <- sign(harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$FC.Ctrl.wk12vswk4) * -log10(harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$FDR.Ctrl.wk12vswk4)
harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table <- harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table[, c("FC.KO.wk12vswk4", "FDR.KO.wk12vswk4", "score.KO.wk12vswk4",
             "FC.Ctrl.wk12vswk4", "FDR.Ctrl.wk12vswk4", "score.Ctrl.wk12vswk4")]
harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table <- harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table %>%
  mutate(sig = case_when(
    score.KO.wk12vswk4 > -log10(0.05) & score.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 > -log10(0.05) & row.names(.) %in% EndMT.markers.mouse ~ "up",
    score.KO.wk12vswk4 < log10(0.05) & score.Ctrl.wk12vswk4 < log10(0.05) & row.names(.) %in% EC.markers.mouse ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$label <- NA
EC.corr.list <- c("Pkhd1l1", "Tmtc1", "Galnt15")
EndMT.corr.list <- c("Tmsb4x", "Mgp", "Ctsl", "Ly6a", "Sparc", "Vim", "Gpnmb", "Lgals3", "Ccn2", "Acta2")
harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table <- harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse((row.names(.) %in% EC.corr.list) | (row.names(.) %in% EndMT.corr.list), row.names(harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table), NA))
harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$sig <- factor(harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$sig, levels = c("no", "down", "up"))
harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table <- harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table[order(harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$sig), ]
write.csv(harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/markers/Harmony_subset_correlation_KO.EndMTvsCtrl.EndMTtime.csv")

### Plot correlation

    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, col = "black") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, col = "black") + 
    geom_smooth(method = lm, formula = y ~ x, aes(group=1)) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table[harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$sig == "no", ], aes(color = "No"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table[harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$sig == "down", ], aes(color = "EC"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table[harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$sig == "up", ], aes(color = "Mes"), size = 2) +
    geom_label_repel(data = harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table[harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$sig == "down", ], xlim = c(0, -300), ylim = c(0, -300), size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    geom_label_repel(data = harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table[harmony.KOEndMTvsCtrlEndMTtime.corr.table$sig == "up", ], xlim = c(0, 300), ylim = c(0, 300), size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-300, 300)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("deepskyblue3", "firebrick3", "grey"),
        labels = c("EC", "Mes", "No")) +
    stat_cor(aes(group=1, label = paste(..rr.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~"))) +
    labs(x = "KO longitudinal enrichment score", y = "Ctrl longitudinal enrichment score",
        title = "ERG KO (Time) vs. Ctrl EndMT (Time)")

        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size=20),
```

### ORA

```{r}
### harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers

### ORA - GO - upregulated genes
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank <- sign(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$avg_log2FC) * -log10(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$p_val)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[order(-harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank), ]
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank > 300] <- 300
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank < -300] <- -300
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 0.5 & harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.up <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.up]
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.up <- enrichGO(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist,
                         ont = "BP",
                         keyType = "SYMBOL",
                         OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.up@result

### Fig 4 - harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.up.scatter.1 formatting
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$GR <- (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter$Count)/1081
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter %>%
  mutate(diffexp = case_when(
    qvalue < 0.05 ~ "sig",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))

  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(diffexp = ifelse(any(str_detect(Description, paste(endothelial.list, collapse = "|"))) && qvalue < 0.05, "endothelial", diffexp)) %>%
  ungroup()
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(diffexp = ifelse(any(str_detect(Description, paste(mesenchymal.list, collapse = "|"))) && qvalue < 0.05, "mesenchymal", diffexp)) %>%
  ungroup()
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1 %>%
  rowwise() %>%
  mutate(diffexp = ifelse(any(str_detect(Description, paste(adhesion.list, collapse = "|"))) && qvalue < 0.05, "adhesion", diffexp)) %>%

harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1 %>%

write.csv(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.1.csv")
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.up.scatter1 <- ggplot(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1, aes(x = GR, y = -log10(qvalue))) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1$diffexp == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 1, alpha = 0.5), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1$diffexp == "sig", ], aes(color = "Significant"), size = 1, alpha = 0.5), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1$diffexp == "adhesion", ], aes(color = "Adhesion"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1$diffexp == "migration", ], aes(color = "Migration"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1$diffexp == "endothelial", ], aes(color = "Endothelial"), size = 1) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable.scatter.1$diffexp == "mesenchymal", ], aes(color = "Mesenchymal"), size = 1) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("#008000", "blue", "#800000", "magenta", "grey", "grey")) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim= c(0,0.1), ylim = c(0,17)) +
    labs(x = expression("GeneRatio"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = expression("Week 12 - KO vs. WT - ORA GO up pathways"))

### ORA - GO - up+downregulated genes
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 0.5 | harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$avg_log2FC < -0.5) & harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps")
Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both <- grep(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist)
if (length(Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both) > 0) {
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist[-Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both]
}
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.both <- enrichGO(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist,
                         ont = "BP",
                         keyType = "SYMBOL",
                         OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.both@result

### harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers
### ORA - GO - upregulated genes
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank <- sign(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$avg_log2FC) * -log10(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$p_val)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[order(-harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank), ]
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank > 300] <- 300
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$rank < -300] <- -300
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 0.5 & harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.up <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.up]
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.up <- enrichGO(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uplist,
                         ont = "BP",
                         keyType = "SYMBOL",
                         OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.up@result 

### Fig s4.1n - harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.up.scatter.1 formatting

### ORA - GO - downregulated genes
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downlist <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$avg_log2FC < -0.5 & harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.down <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downlist)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downlist <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downlist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.down]
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downlist <- rev(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downlist)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.down <- enrichGO(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downlist,
                                              ont = "BP",
                                              keyType = "SYMBOL",
                                              OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.down@result

### ORA - GO - up+downregulated genes
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 0.5 | harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$avg_log2FC < -0.5) & harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps")
Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both <- grep(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist)
if (length(Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both) > 0) {
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist[-Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both]
}
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.both <- enrichGO(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothlist,
                                              ont = "BP",
                                              keyType = "SYMBOL",
                                              OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.both@result

### harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers
### ORA - GO - upregulated genes
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank <- sign(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC) * -log10(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$p_val)
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort[order(-harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank), ]
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank > 300] <- 300
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank < -300] <- -300
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist <- rownames(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 0.5 & harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.up <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist)
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.up]
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.up <- enrichGO(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist,
                                            ont = "BP",
                                            keyType = "SYMBOL",
                                            OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uptable <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.up@result 
write.csv(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uptable, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uptable.csv")

### ORA - GO - downregulated genes
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist <- rownames(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort[harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC < -0.5 & harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.down <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist)
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.down]
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist <- rev(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist)
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.down <- enrichGO(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist,
                                              ont = "BP",
                                              keyType = "SYMBOL",
                                              OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downtable <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.down@result 
write.csv(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downtable, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downtable.csv")

### ORA - GO - up+downregulated genes
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist <- rownames(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort[(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 0.5 | harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC < -0.5) & harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps")
Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both <- grep(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist)
if (length(Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both) > 0) {
  harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist[-Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both]
}
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.both <- enrichGO(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist,
                                              ont = "BP",
                                              keyType = "SYMBOL",
                                              OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothtable <- harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.both@result 
write.csv(harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothtable, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.KO.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothtable.csv")


### harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers
### ORA - GO - upregulated genes
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank <- sign(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC) * -log10(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$p_val)
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort[order(-harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank), ]
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank > 300] <- 300
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$rank < -300] <- -300
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist <- rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 0.5 & harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.up <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist)
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.up]
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.up <- enrichGO(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uplist,
                                            ont = "BP",
                                            keyType = "SYMBOL",
                                            OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uptable <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.up@result 
write.csv(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uptable, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.uptable.csv")

### ORA - GO - downregulated genes
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist <- rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort[harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC < -0.5 & harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^Hba", "^Hbb", "^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps", "Gm42418", "AY036118")
indices_to_exclude.GO.down <- grepl(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist)
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist[!indices_to_exclude.GO.down]
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist <- rev(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist)
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.down <- enrichGO(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downlist,
                                              ont = "BP",
                                              keyType = "SYMBOL",
                                              OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downtable <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.down@result 
write.csv(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downtable, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.downtable.csv")

### ORA - GO - up+downregulated genes
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist <- rownames(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort[(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC > 0.5 | harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$avg_log2FC < -0.5) & harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.markers.sort$p_val_adj < 0.05, ])
exclude.list <- c("^mt-", "^Rpl", "^Rps")
Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both <- grep(paste(exclude.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist)
if (length(Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both) > 0) {
  harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist[-Ctrl_wk4.indices_to_exclude.GO.both]
}
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.both <- enrichGO(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothlist,
                                              ont = "BP",
                                              keyType = "SYMBOL",
                                              OrgDb = "org.Mm.eg.db")
harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothtable <- harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.both@result 
write.csv(harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothtable, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.Ctrl.wk12vswk4.ora.GO.bothtable.csv")


### Fig 4 - Pathway dotplot 1
# Select relevant columns from both dataframes
wk4 <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable.scatter.1 %>%
  select(ID, Description, qvalue, geneID, GR, diffexp) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(., ".wk4"), -ID)  # Add suffix .wk4 to all columns except ID
wk12 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable.scatter.1 %>%
  select(ID, Description, qvalue, geneID, GR, diffexp) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(., ".wk12"), -ID)  # Add suffix .wk12 to all columns except ID
# Merge the dataframes on ID
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1 <- merge(wk4, wk12, by = "ID", all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE)
# Merge the Description columns (if values differ, keep the non-empty one)
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1$Description <- coalesce(KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1$Description.wk4, KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1$Description.wk12)
# Remove the redundant Description columns
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1 <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1 %>%
  select(-Description.wk4, -Description.wk12)
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1 <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1 %>%
  arrange(desc(GR.wk4))
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1 <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1 %>%
  select(-diffexp.wk4) %>%
  rename(diffexp = diffexp.wk12)

# Define the list of terms we want to process
terms <- c("endothelial", "mesenchymal", "adhesion", "migration")
# Define an empty list to store Description values
pathway_list <- list()
# Loop through each term
for (term in terms) {
  # Process "term" for GR.wk12
  term_wk12 <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1 %>%
    filter(grepl(term, diffexp)) %>%
    arrange(desc(GR.wk12)) %>%
    head(4) %>%
    pull(Description)
  # Add "term" wk12 descriptions to the list
  pathway_list <- c(pathway_list, term_wk12)
}

# Filter the rows based on description_list
filtered_data <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.1 %>%
  filter(Description %in% pathway_list)
# Reshape the data properly using pivot_longer for both GR and qvalue columns
plot_data <- filtered_data %>%
  select(ID, Description, GR.wk4, GR.wk12, qvalue.wk4, qvalue.wk12, diffexp) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(GR.wk4, GR.wk12, qvalue.wk4, qvalue.wk12),
               names_to = c(".value", "Week"),
               names_pattern = "(.*)\\.(wk[0-9]+)") %>%
  mutate(qvalue = -log10(qvalue))
plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  mutate(Description = factor(Description, levels = pathway_list)) %>%
  arrange(Description)  # Sort the data by the custom factor levels

# Create a list of color gradients to loop through
color_gradients <- list(
  c("grey85", "blue"),
  c("grey85", "#800000"),
  c("grey85", "#008000"),
  c("grey85", "magenta")
)
# Loop through each gradient and assign the plots to p1, p2, p3, p4
for (i in 1:length(color_gradients)) {
  # Create the plot with the current color gradient
  plot_name <- paste0("p", i)  # Create plot variable name as p1, p2, p3, p4
  assign(plot_name, ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Week, y = Description, color = qvalue, size = GR)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_gradient(low = color_gradients[[i]][1], high = color_gradients[[i]][2]) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 7)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(levels(plot_data$Description))) +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = c("wk4", "wk12")) +
    labs(title = paste("KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.1"),
         color = "-log(P.adj)",
         size = "Gene ratio") +
    force_panelsizes(rows = unit(4, "in"), cols = unit(1, "in")) +
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 16),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  )
}
p1 + p2 + p3 + p4
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 4 + supp/Harmony_subset_plot_pathway_KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.1.pdf", width = 20, height = 15)
p1 + p2 + p3 + p4
dev.off()


### Fig 4 - Pathway dotplot 2
# Select relevant columns from both dataframes
wk4 <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable.scatter.2 %>%
  select(ID, Description, qvalue, geneID, GR, diffexp) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(., ".wk4"), -ID)  # Add suffix .wk4 to all columns except ID
wk12 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable.scatter.2 %>%
  select(ID, Description, qvalue, geneID, GR, diffexp) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(., ".wk12"), -ID)  # Add suffix .wk12 to all columns except ID
# Merge the dataframes on ID
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2 <- merge(wk4, wk12, by = "ID", all.x = TRUE, all.y = TRUE)
# Merge the Description columns (if values differ, keep the non-empty one)
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2$Description <- coalesce(KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2$Description.wk4, KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2$Description.wk12)
# Remove the redundant Description columns
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2 <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2 %>%
  select(-Description.wk4, -Description.wk12)
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2 <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2 %>%
  arrange(desc(GR.wk4))
KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2 <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2 %>%
  select(-diffexp.wk4) %>%
  rename(diffexp = diffexp.wk12)

# Define the list of terms we want to process
terms <- c("proliferation", "angiogenesis", "immune", "inflammation", "lipid")
# Define an empty list to store Description values
pathway_list <- list()
# Loop through each term
for (term in terms) {
  # Process "term" for GR.wk12
  term_wk12 <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2 %>%
    filter(grepl(term, diffexp)) %>%
    arrange(desc(GR.wk12)) %>%
    head(3) %>%
    pull(Description)
  # Add "term" wk12 descriptions to the list
  pathway_list <- c(pathway_list, term_wk12)
}

# Filter the rows based on description_list
filtered_data <- KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.table.2 %>%
  filter(Description %in% pathway_list)
# Reshape the data properly using pivot_longer for both GR and qvalue columns
plot_data <- filtered_data %>%
  select(ID, Description, GR.wk4, GR.wk12, qvalue.wk4, qvalue.wk12, diffexp) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(GR.wk4, GR.wk12, qvalue.wk4, qvalue.wk12),
               names_to = c(".value", "Week"),
               names_pattern = "(.*)\\.(wk[0-9]+)") %>%
  mutate(qvalue = -log10(qvalue))
plot_data <- plot_data %>%
  mutate(Description = factor(Description, levels = pathway_list)) %>%
  arrange(Description)  # Sort the data by the custom factor levels

# Create a list of color gradients to loop through
color_gradients <- list(
  c("grey85", "#37C871"),
  c("grey85", "orange"),
  c("grey85", "#800080"),
  c("grey85", "blue"),
  c("grey85", "red")
)
# Loop through each gradient and assign the plots to p1, p2, p3, p4, p5
for (i in 1:length(color_gradients)) {
  # Create the plot with the current color gradient
  plot_name <- paste0("p", i)  # Create plot variable name as p1, p2, p3, p4, p5
  assign(plot_name, ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = Week, y = Description, color = qvalue, size = GR)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_gradient(low = color_gradients[[i]][1], high = color_gradients[[i]][2]) +
    scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 7)) +
    scale_y_discrete(limits = rev(levels(plot_data$Description))) +
    scale_x_discrete(limits = c("wk4", "wk12")) +
    labs(title = paste("KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.dotplot.2"),
         color = "-log(P.adj)",
         size = "Gene ratio") +
    force_panelsizes(rows = unit(4, "in"), cols = unit(1, "in")) +
    theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
          axis.title.y = element_blank(),
          plot.title = element_text(size = 16),
          legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
          axis.ticks.y = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
          panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  )
}
```
