### Radar plots for pathway categories

```{r}
##Version 1
## harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count
lists <- list(
  endothelial = endothelial.list,
  mesenchymal = mesenchymal.list,
  adhesion = adhesion.list,
  migration = migration.list,
  immune = immune.list,
  inflammation = inflammation.list,
  lipid = lipid.list,
  proliferation = proliferation.list,
  angiogenesis = angiogenesis.list
)
pathway_counts <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_counts) <- names(lists)

filtered_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  pathway_counts[list_name] <- sum(grepl(pattern, filtered_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
}
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count <- data.frame(pathway.up = pathway_counts)

filtered_down_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
pathway_counts_down <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_counts_down) <- names(lists)
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  pathway_counts_down[list_name] <- sum(grepl(pattern, filtered_down_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
}
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count$pathway.down <- pathway_counts_down

filtered_both_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
pathway_counts_both <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_counts_both) <- names(lists)
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  pathway_counts_both[list_name] <- sum(grepl(pattern, filtered_both_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
}
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count$pathway.both <- pathway_counts_both
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count <- t(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count <- as.data.frame(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count)

harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count[, c("endothelial", "mesenchymal", "adhesion", "migration", "proliferation", "angiogenesis", "immune", "inflammation", "lipid")]
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count$group <- rownames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count[, c("group", setdiff(names(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count), "group"))]
rownames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count) <- NULL
new_colnames <- c(names(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count)[1], LETTERS[1:9])
colnames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count) <- new_colnames

harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count.filter <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count %>% filter(group %in% c("pathway.up", "pathway.down", "pathway.both"))
radar1 <- ggradar(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.count.filter, base.size = 10, grid.label.size = 0, gridline.mid.colour = "grey60", group.point.size = 3, group.line.width = 1.25, fill = TRUE, fill.alpha = 0.15, group.colours = c("goldenrod3", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3")) +
  ggtitle("Week 12: Pathway count") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")


## harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg
# Initialize a vector to store the average counts for each pathway
pathway_avg_up <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_avg_up) <- names(lists)

pathway_avg_down <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_avg_down) <- names(lists)

pathway_avg_both <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_avg_both) <- names(lists)

# Calculate the average "Count" for the up-regulated pathways
filtered_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the average of the "Count" column for matching rows
  pathway_avg_up[list_name] <- mean(filtered_df$Count[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Calculate the average "Count" for the down-regulated pathways
filtered_down_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_down_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the average of the "Count" column for matching rows
  pathway_avg_down[list_name] <- mean(filtered_down_df$Count[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Calculate the average "Count" for the both-regulated pathways
filtered_both_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_both_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the average of the "Count" column for matching rows
  pathway_avg_both[list_name] <- mean(filtered_both_df$Count[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Create the final dataframe to store the average counts
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg <- data.frame(
  pathway.up = pathway_avg_up,
  pathway.down = pathway_avg_down,
  pathway.both = pathway_avg_both
)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg <- t(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg <- as.data.frame(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg)

harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg[, c("endothelial", "mesenchymal", "adhesion", "migration", "proliferation", "angiogenesis", "immune", "inflammation", "lipid")]
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg$group <- rownames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg[, c("group", setdiff(names(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg), "group"))]
rownames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg) <- NULL
new_colnames <- c(names(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg)[1], LETTERS[1:9])
colnames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg) <- new_colnames

harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg.filter <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg %>% filter(group %in% c("pathway.up", "pathway.down", "pathway.both"))
radar2 <- ggradar(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.avg.filter, base.size = 10, grid.label.size = 0, gridline.mid.colour = "grey60", group.point.size = 3, group.line.width = 1.25, fill = TRUE, fill.alpha = 0.15, group.colours = c("goldenrod3", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3")) +
  ggtitle("Week 12: Average gene ratio") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")


## harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median
# Initialize a vector to store the median counts for each pathway
pathway_median_up <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_median_up) <- names(lists)

pathway_median_down <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_median_down) <- names(lists)

pathway_median_both <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_median_both) <- names(lists)

# Calculate the median "Count" for the up-regulated pathways
filtered_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the median of the "Count" column for matching rows
  pathway_median_up[list_name] <- median(filtered_df$Count[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Calculate the median "Count" for the down-regulated pathways
filtered_down_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_down_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the median of the "Count" column for matching rows
  pathway_median_down[list_name] <- median(filtered_down_df$Count[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Calculate the median "Count" for the both-regulated pathways
filtered_both_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_both_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the median of the "Count" column for matching rows
  pathway_median_both[list_name] <- median(filtered_both_df$Count[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Create the final dataframe to store the median counts
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median <- data.frame(
  pathway.up = pathway_median_up,
  pathway.down = pathway_median_down,
  pathway.both = pathway_median_both
)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median <- t(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median <- as.data.frame(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median)

harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median[, c("endothelial", "mesenchymal", "adhesion", "migration", "proliferation", "angiogenesis", "immune", "inflammation", "lipid")]
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median$group <- rownames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median[, c("group", setdiff(names(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median), "group"))]
rownames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median) <- NULL
new_colnames <- c(names(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median)[1], LETTERS[1:9])
colnames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median) <- new_colnames

harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median.filter <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median %>% filter(group %in% c("pathway.up", "pathway.down", "pathway.both"))
radar3 <- ggradar(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.GR.median.filter, base.size = 10, grid.label.size = 0, gridline.mid.colour = "grey60", group.point.size = 3, group.line.width = 1.25, fill = TRUE, fill.alpha = 0.15, group.colours = c("goldenrod3", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3")) +
  ggtitle("Week 12: Median gene ratio") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5))


## harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg
# Initialize a vector to store the average qvalues for each pathway
pathway_qvalue_avg_up <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_qvalue_avg_up) <- names(lists)

pathway_qvalue_avg_down <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_qvalue_avg_down) <- names(lists)

pathway_qvalue_avg_both <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_qvalue_avg_both) <- names(lists)

# Calculate the average "qvalue" for the up-regulated pathways
filtered_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the average of the "qvalue" column for matching rows
  pathway_qvalue_avg_up[list_name] <- mean(filtered_df$qvalue[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Calculate the average "qvalue" for the down-regulated pathways
filtered_down_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_down_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the average of the "qvalue" column for matching rows
  pathway_qvalue_avg_down[list_name] <- mean(filtered_down_df$qvalue[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Calculate the average "qvalue" for the both-regulated pathways
filtered_both_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_both_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the average of the "qvalue" column for matching rows
  pathway_qvalue_avg_both[list_name] <- mean(filtered_both_df$qvalue[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Create the final dataframe to store the avg qvalues
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg <- data.frame(
  pathway.up = pathway_qvalue_avg_up,
  pathway.down = pathway_qvalue_avg_down,
  pathway.both = pathway_qvalue_avg_both
)

# Apply the -log10 transformation to the avg qvalue values
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg <- -log10(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg <- t(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg <- as.data.frame(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg)

harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg[, c("endothelial", "mesenchymal", "adhesion", "migration", "proliferation", "angiogenesis", "immune", "inflammation", "lipid")]
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg$group <- rownames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg)
harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg[, c("group", setdiff(names(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg), "group"))]
rownames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg) <- NULL
new_colnames <- c(names(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg)[1], LETTERS[1:9])
colnames(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg) <- new_colnames

harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg.filter <- harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg %>% filter(group %in% c("pathway.up", "pathway.down", "pathway.both"))
radar4 <- ggradar(harmony.radar.wk12.pathway.qvalue.avg.filter, base.size = 10, grid.label.size = 0, gridline.mid.colour = "grey60", group.point.size = 3, group.line.width = 1.25, fill = TRUE, fill.alpha = 0.15, group.colours = c("goldenrod3", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3")) +
  ggtitle("Week 12: Average enrichment score") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")

## harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count
lists <- list(
  endothelial = endothelial.list,
  mesenchymal = mesenchymal.list,
  adhesion = adhesion.list,
  migration = migration.list,
  immune = immune.list,
  inflammation = inflammation.list,
  lipid = lipid.list,
  proliferation = proliferation.list,
  angiogenesis = angiogenesis.list
)
pathway_counts <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_counts) <- names(lists)

filtered_df <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  pathway_counts[list_name] <- sum(grepl(pattern, filtered_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
}
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count <- data.frame(pathway.up = pathway_counts)

filtered_down_df <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
pathway_counts_down <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_counts_down) <- names(lists)
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  pathway_counts_down[list_name] <- sum(grepl(pattern, filtered_down_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
}
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count$pathway.down <- pathway_counts_down

filtered_both_df <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
pathway_counts_both <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_counts_both) <- names(lists)
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  pathway_counts_both[list_name] <- sum(grepl(pattern, filtered_both_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
}
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count$pathway.both <- pathway_counts_both
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count <- t(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count)
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count <- as.data.frame(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count)

harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count <- harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count[, c("endothelial", "mesenchymal", "adhesion", "migration", "proliferation", "angiogenesis", "immune", "inflammation", "lipid")]
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count$group <- rownames(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count)
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count <- harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count[, c("group", setdiff(names(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count), "group"))]
rownames(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count) <- NULL
new_colnames <- c(names(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count)[1], LETTERS[1:9])
colnames(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count) <- new_colnames

harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count.filter <- harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count %>% filter(group %in% c("pathway.up", "pathway.down", "pathway.both"))
radar6 <- ggradar(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.count.filter, base.size = 10, grid.label.size = 0, gridline.mid.colour = "grey60", group.point.size = 3, group.line.width = 1.25, fill = TRUE, fill.alpha = 0.15, group.colours = c("goldenrod3", "lightskyblue", "lightpink1")) +
  ggtitle("Week 4: Pathway count") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")

  pathway.down = pathway_qvalue_avg_down,
  pathway.both = pathway_qvalue_avg_both
)

# Apply the -log10 transformation to the avg qvalue values
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg <- -log10(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg)
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg <- t(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg)
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg <- as.data.frame(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg)

harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg <- harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg[, c("endothelial", "mesenchymal", "adhesion", "migration", "proliferation", "angiogenesis", "immune", "inflammation", "lipid")]
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg$group <- rownames(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg)
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg <- harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg[, c("group", setdiff(names(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg), "group"))]
rownames(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg) <- NULL
new_colnames <- c(names(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg)[1], LETTERS[1:9])
colnames(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg) <- new_colnames

harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg.filter <- harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg %>% filter(group %in% c("pathway.up", "pathway.down", "pathway.both"))
radar9 <- ggradar(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.avg.filter, base.size = 10, grid.label.size = 0, gridline.mid.colour = "grey60", group.point.size = 3, group.line.width = 1.25, fill = TRUE, fill.alpha = 0.15, group.colours = c("goldenrod3", "lightskyblue", "lightpink1")) +
  ggtitle("Week 4: Average enrichment score") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")


## harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median
# Initialize a vector to store the median qvalues for each pathway
pathway_qvalue_median_up <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_qvalue_median_up) <- names(lists)

pathway_qvalue_median_down <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_qvalue_median_down) <- names(lists)

pathway_qvalue_median_both <- numeric(length(lists))
names(pathway_qvalue_median_both) <- names(lists)

# Calculate the median "qvalue" for the up-regulated pathways
filtered_df <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.uptable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the median of the "qvalue" column for matching rows
  pathway_qvalue_median_up[list_name] <- median(filtered_df$qvalue[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Calculate the median "qvalue" for the down-regulated pathways
filtered_down_df <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.downtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_down_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the median of the "qvalue" column for matching rows
  pathway_qvalue_median_down[list_name] <- median(filtered_down_df$qvalue[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Calculate the median "qvalue" for the both-regulated pathways
filtered_both_df <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$qvalue < 0.05, ]
for (list_name in names(lists)) {
  terms <- lists[[list_name]]
  pattern <- paste(terms, collapse = "|")
  matched_rows <- grepl(pattern, filtered_both_df$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  
  # Calculate the median of the "qvalue" column for matching rows
  pathway_qvalue_median_both[list_name] <- median(filtered_both_df$qvalue[matched_rows], na.rm = TRUE)
}

# Create the final dataframe to store the median qvalues
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median <- data.frame(
  pathway.up = pathway_qvalue_median_up,
  pathway.down = pathway_qvalue_median_down,
  pathway.both = pathway_qvalue_median_both
)

# Apply the -log10 transformation to the median qvalue values
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median <- -log10(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median)
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median <- t(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median)
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median <- as.data.frame(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median)

harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median <- harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median[, c("endothelial", "mesenchymal", "adhesion", "migration", "proliferation", "angiogenesis", "immune", "inflammation", "lipid")]
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median$group <- rownames(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median)
harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median <- harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median[, c("group", setdiff(names(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median), "group"))]
rownames(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median) <- NULL
new_colnames <- c(names(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median)[1], LETTERS[1:9])
colnames(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median) <- new_colnames

harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median.filter <- harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median %>% filter(group %in% c("pathway.up", "pathway.down", "pathway.both"))
radar10 <- ggradar(harmony.radar.wk4.pathway.qvalue.median.filter, base.size = 10, grid.label.size = 0, gridline.mid.colour = "grey60", group.point.size = 3, group.line.width = 1.25, fill = TRUE, fill.alpha = 0.15, group.colours = c("goldenrod3", "lightskyblue", "lightpink1")) +
  ggtitle("Week 4: Median enrichment score") +
  theme(plot.title = element_text(size = 14, hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")
```

### Pathway-gene plots for ORA

```{r}
### Fig 4 - harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.both
endothelial.genes <- character(0)
for (term in endothelial.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  endothelial.genes <- union(endothelial.genes, genes)
}
mesenchymal.genes <- character(0)
for (term in mesenchymal.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  mesenchymal.genes <- union(mesenchymal.genes, genes)
}
adhesion.genes <- character(0)
for (term in adhesion.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  adhesion.genes <- union(adhesion.genes, genes)
}
migration.genes <- character(0)
for (term in migration.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  migration.genes <- union(migration.genes, genes)
}
all.genes <- c(endothelial.genes, mesenchymal.genes, adhesion.genes, migration.genes)
all.genes <- unique(all.genes)
matrix1 <- data.frame(
  endothelial = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  mesenchymal = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  adhesion = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  migration = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  row.names = all.genes,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% endothelial.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "endothelial"] <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% mesenchymal.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "mesenchymal"] <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% adhesion.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "adhesion"] <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% migration.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "migration"] <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
matrix1 <- matrix1[!(is.na(matrix1$adhesion) & is.na(matrix1$migration)), ]
row_averages <- rowMeans(matrix1, na.rm = TRUE)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix <- matrix1[order(row_averages), ]
write.csv(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.csv")
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1 <- t(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1[, c(1:20, (ncol(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1) - 19):ncol(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1))]

fold_changes <- setNames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[["avg_log2FC"]],
                          rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1
for (col in colnames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)) {
  fold_change_value <- fold_changes[col]
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2[, col] <- ifelse(
    is.na(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1[, col]),
    NA,
    fold_change_value
  )
}
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1 <- 
  as.data.frame(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1$category <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2 <- 
  as.data.frame(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2$category <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)
df1_long <- melt(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "foldchange")
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
cat_order <- c("migration", "adhesion", "mesenchymal", "endothelial")
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge$category <- 
  factor(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge$category, 
         levels = cat_order)
dotplot <- ggplot(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge, aes(x = gene, y = category, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(1.137, "in"),
                   cols = unit(10.899, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-300,300)) +
  labs(title = "Week 12: Gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
dotplot
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 4 + supp/Harmony_subset_plot_pathway-gene_wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.both.pdf", width = 20, height = 20)
dotplot

for (term in endothelial.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  endothelial.genes <- union(endothelial.genes, genes)
}
mesenchymal.genes <- character(0)
for (term in mesenchymal.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  mesenchymal.genes <- union(mesenchymal.genes, genes)
}
adhesion.genes <- character(0)
for (term in adhesion.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  adhesion.genes <- union(adhesion.genes, genes)
}
migration.genes <- character(0)
for (term in migration.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  migration.genes <- union(migration.genes, genes)
}
all.genes <- c(endothelial.genes, mesenchymal.genes, adhesion.genes, migration.genes)
all.genes <- unique(all.genes)
matrix1 <- data.frame(
  endothelial = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  mesenchymal = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  adhesion = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  migration = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  row.names = all.genes,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% endothelial.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "endothelial"] <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% mesenchymal.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "mesenchymal"] <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% adhesion.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "adhesion"] <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% migration.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "migration"] <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
matrix1 <- matrix1[!(is.na(matrix1$adhesion) & is.na(matrix1$migration)), ]
row_averages <- rowMeans(matrix1, na.rm = TRUE)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix <- matrix1[order(row_averages), ]
write.csv(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.csv")
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1 <- t(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1 <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1[, c(1:20, (ncol(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1) - 19):ncol(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1))]

fold_changes <- setNames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[["avg_log2FC"]],
                          rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort))
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2 <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1
for (col in colnames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)) {
  fold_change_value <- fold_changes[col]
  harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2[, col] <- ifelse(
    is.na(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1[, col]),
    NA,
    fold_change_value
  )
}
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1 <- 
  as.data.frame(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1$category <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2 <- 
  as.data.frame(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2$category <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)
df1_long <- melt(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "foldchange")
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
cat_order <- c("migration", "adhesion", "mesenchymal", "endothelial")
harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge$category <- 
  factor(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge$category, 
         levels = cat_order)
dotplot <- ggplot(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge, aes(x = gene, y = category, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(1.137, "in"),
                   cols = unit(10.899, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-100,100)) +
  labs(title = "Week 4: Gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
dotplot
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 4 + supp/Harmony_subset_plot_pathway-gene_wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.both.pdf", width = 20, height = 20)
dotplot
dev.off()


### migration gene-pathway plots
## migration.wk4.all
migration.genes <- character(0)
for (term in migration.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  migration.genes <- union(migration.genes, genes)
}
rank_values <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[migration.genes, "rank", drop = FALSE]
migration_genes_with_rank <- data.frame(gene = rownames(rank_values), rank = rank_values[, 1])
sorted_migration_genes <- migration_genes_with_rank[order(-migration_genes_with_rank$rank), ]
migration.genes <- sorted_migration_genes$gene
filtered_df <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[grepl(paste(migration.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE), ]
filtered_df <- filtered_df[order(-filtered_df$Count), ]
matrix1.wk4 <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(migration.genes), ncol = nrow(filtered_df))
rownames(matrix1.wk4) <- migration.genes
colnames(matrix1.wk4) <- filtered_df$Description
matrix2.wk4 <- matrix1.wk4
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1.wk4)) {
  match_row <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == col_name, ]
  if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
    gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
    for (row_name in rownames(matrix1.wk4)) {
      if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
        if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
          rank_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
          matrix1.wk4[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
for (col_name in colnames(matrix2.wk4)) {
  match_row <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == col_name, ]
  if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
    gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
    for (row_name in rownames(matrix2.wk4)) {
      if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
        if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
          FC_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
          matrix2.wk4[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
num_cols_to_select <- min(100, ncol(matrix1.wk4))
matrix1.wk4 <- matrix1.wk4[, 1:num_cols_to_select]
matrix1.wk4.top <- matrix1.wk4[1:20, ]
matrix1.wk4.bottom <- matrix1.wk4[(nrow(matrix1.wk4) - 19):nrow(matrix1.wk4), ]
matrix1.wk4 <- rbind(matrix1.wk4.top, matrix1.wk4.bottom)
matrix1.wk4 <- t(matrix1.wk4)
matrix1.wk4 <- as.data.frame(matrix1.wk4)
matrix1.wk4$category <- rownames(matrix1.wk4)
num_cols_to_select <- min(100, ncol(matrix2.wk4))
matrix2.wk4 <- matrix2.wk4[, 1:num_cols_to_select]
matrix2.wk4.top <- matrix2.wk4[1:20, ]
matrix2.wk4.bottom <- matrix2.wk4[(nrow(matrix2.wk4) - 19):nrow(matrix2.wk4), ]
matrix2.wk4 <- rbind(matrix2.wk4.top, matrix2.wk4.bottom)
matrix2.wk4 <- t(matrix2.wk4)
matrix2.wk4 <- as.data.frame(matrix2.wk4)
matrix2.wk4$category <- rownames(matrix2.wk4)

                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "enrichment_score")

                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "foldchange")

dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge.wk4, aes(x = gene, y = factor(category, levels = rev(rownames(matrix1.wk4))), size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-100,100)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = rev(unique(matrix.merge.wk4$gene))) +
  labs(title = "Week 4: Migration gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +

  theme(text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),

        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),

        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))

rank_values <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[migration.genes, "rank", drop = FALSE]
migration_genes_with_rank <- data.frame(gene = rownames(rank_values), rank = rank_values[, 1])
sorted_migration_genes <- migration_genes_with_rank[order(-migration_genes_with_rank$rank), ]
migration.genes <- sorted_migration_genes$gene
pathways <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description %in% migration.list.top
filtered_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[pathways, ]
filtered_df <- filtered_df[order(-filtered_df$Count), ]
matrix1.wk12 <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(migration.genes), ncol = nrow(filtered_df))
rownames(matrix1.wk12) <- migration.genes
colnames(matrix1.wk12) <- filtered_df$Description
matrix2.wk12 <- matrix1.wk12
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1.wk12)) {
  match_row <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == col_name, ]
  if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
    gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
    for (row_name in rownames(matrix1.wk12)) {
      if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
        if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
          rank_value <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
          matrix1.wk12[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
for (col_name in colnames(matrix2.wk12)) {
  match_row <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == col_name, ]
  if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
    gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
    for (row_name in rownames(matrix2.wk12)) {
      if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
        if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
          FC_value <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
          matrix2.wk12[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
matrix1.wk12.top <- matrix1.wk12[1:20, ]
matrix1.wk12.bottom <- matrix1.wk12[(nrow(matrix1.wk12) - 19):nrow(matrix1.wk12), ]
matrix1.wk12 <- rbind(matrix1.wk12.top, matrix1.wk12.bottom)
matrix1.wk12 <- t(matrix1.wk12)
matrix1.wk12 <- as.data.frame(matrix1.wk12)
matrix1.wk12$category <- rownames(matrix1.wk12)
matrix2.wk12.top <- matrix2.wk12[1:20, ]
matrix2.wk12.bottom <- matrix2.wk12[(nrow(matrix2.wk12) - 19):nrow(matrix2.wk12), ]
matrix2.wk12 <- rbind(matrix2.wk12.top, matrix2.wk12.bottom)
matrix2.wk12 <- t(matrix2.wk12)
matrix2.wk12 <- as.data.frame(matrix2.wk12)
matrix2.wk12$category <- rownames(matrix2.wk12)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1.wk12, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2.wk12, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge.wk12 <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge.wk12, aes(x = gene, y = factor(category, levels = rev(rownames(matrix1.wk12))), size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(2.7574, "in"),
                   cols = unit(10.899, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-300,300)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = rev(unique(matrix.merge.wk12$gene))) +
  labs(title = "Week 12: Migration gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
dotplot
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 4 + supp/Harmony_subset_plot_pathway-gene_migration_wk12_top.pdf", width = 20, height = 20)
dotplot
dev.off()

matrix1.wk12 <- rbind(matrix1.wk12.top, matrix1.wk12.bottom)
matrix1.wk12 <- t(matrix1.wk12)
matrix1.wk12 <- as.data.frame(matrix1.wk12)
matrix1.wk12$category <- rownames(matrix1.wk12)
matrix2.wk12.top <- matrix2.wk12[1:20, ]
matrix2.wk12.bottom <- matrix2.wk12[(nrow(matrix2.wk12) - 19):nrow(matrix2.wk12), ]
matrix2.wk12 <- rbind(matrix2.wk12.top, matrix2.wk12.bottom)
matrix2.wk12 <- t(matrix2.wk12)
matrix2.wk12 <- as.data.frame(matrix2.wk12)
matrix2.wk12$category <- rownames(matrix2.wk12)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1.wk12, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2.wk12, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge.wk12 <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge.wk12, aes(x = gene, y = factor(category, levels = rev(rownames(matrix1.wk12))), size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(2.7574, "in"),
                   cols = unit(10.899, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-300,300)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = rev(unique(matrix.merge.wk12$gene))) +
  labs(title = "Week 12: Adhesion gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))

### endothelial gene-pathway plots
## endothelial.wk4.all
endothelial.genes <- character(0)
for (term in endothelial.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  endothelial.genes <- union(endothelial.genes, genes)
}
endothelial.genes <- endothelial.genes[endothelial.genes %in% EC.markers.mouse]
rank_values <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[endothelial.genes, "rank", drop = FALSE]
endothelial_genes_with_rank <- data.frame(gene = rownames(rank_values), rank = rank_values[, 1])
sorted_endothelial_genes <- endothelial_genes_with_rank[order(-endothelial_genes_with_rank$rank), ]
endothelial.genes <- sorted_endothelial_genes$gene
filtered_df <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[grepl(paste(endothelial.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE), ]
filtered_df <- filtered_df[order(-filtered_df$Count), ]
matrix1.wk4 <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(endothelial.genes), ncol = nrow(filtered_df))
rownames(matrix1.wk4) <- endothelial.genes
colnames(matrix1.wk4) <- filtered_df$Description
matrix2.wk4 <- matrix1.wk4
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1.wk4)) {
  match_row <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == col_name, ]
  if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
    gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
    for (row_name in rownames(matrix1.wk4)) {
      if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
        if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
          rank_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
          matrix1.wk4[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
for (col_name in colnames(matrix2.wk4)) {
  match_row <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == col_name, ]
  if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
    gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
    for (row_name in rownames(matrix2.wk4)) {
      if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
        if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
          FC_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
          matrix2.wk4[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
num_cols_to_select <- min(100, ncol(matrix1.wk4))
matrix1.wk4 <- matrix1.wk4[, 1:num_cols_to_select]
matrix1.wk4.top <- matrix1.wk4[1:20, ]
matrix1.wk4.bottom <- matrix1.wk4[(nrow(matrix1.wk4) - 19):nrow(matrix1.wk4), ]
matrix1.wk4 <- rbind(matrix1.wk4.top, matrix1.wk4.bottom)
matrix1.wk4 <- t(matrix1.wk4)
matrix1.wk4 <- as.data.frame(matrix1.wk4)
matrix1.wk4$category <- rownames(matrix1.wk4)
num_cols_to_select <- min(100, ncol(matrix2.wk4))
matrix2.wk4 <- matrix2.wk4[, 1:num_cols_to_select]
matrix2.wk4.top <- matrix2.wk4[1:20, ]
matrix2.wk4.bottom <- matrix2.wk4[(nrow(matrix2.wk4) - 19):nrow(matrix2.wk4), ]
matrix2.wk4 <- rbind(matrix2.wk4.top, matrix2.wk4.bottom)
matrix2.wk4 <- t(matrix2.wk4)
matrix2.wk4 <- as.data.frame(matrix2.wk4)
matrix2.wk4$category <- rownames(matrix2.wk4)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1.wk4,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2.wk4,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge.wk4 <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge.wk4, aes(x = gene, y = factor(category, levels = rev(rownames(matrix1.wk4))), size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-100,100)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = rev(unique(matrix.merge.wk4$gene))) +
  labs(title = "Week 4: Endothelial gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +

### mesenchymal gene-pathway plots
## mesenchymal.wk4.all
mesenchymal.genes <- character(0)
for (term in mesenchymal.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  mesenchymal.genes <- union(mesenchymal.genes, genes)
}
mesenchymal.genes <- mesenchymal.genes[mesenchymal.genes %in% EndMT.markers.mouse]
rank_values <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[mesenchymal.genes, "rank", drop = FALSE]
mesenchymal_genes_with_rank <- data.frame(gene = rownames(rank_values), rank = rank_values[, 1])
sorted_mesenchymal_genes <- mesenchymal_genes_with_rank[order(-mesenchymal_genes_with_rank$rank), ]
mesenchymal.genes <- sorted_mesenchymal_genes$gene
filtered_df <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[grepl(paste(mesenchymal.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE), ]
filtered_df <- filtered_df[order(-filtered_df$Count), ]
matrix1.wk4 <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(mesenchymal.genes), ncol = nrow(filtered_df))
rownames(matrix1.wk4) <- mesenchymal.genes
colnames(matrix1.wk4) <- filtered_df$Description
matrix2.wk4 <- matrix1.wk4
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1.wk4)) {
  match_row <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == col_name, ]
  if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
    gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
    for (row_name in rownames(matrix1.wk4)) {
      if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
        if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
          rank_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
          matrix1.wk4[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
for (col_name in colnames(matrix2.wk4)) {
  match_row <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == col_name, ]
  if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
    gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
    for (row_name in rownames(matrix2.wk4)) {
      if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
        if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
          FC_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
          matrix2.wk4[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
num_cols_to_select <- min(100, ncol(matrix1.wk4))
matrix1.wk4 <- matrix1.wk4[, 1:num_cols_to_select]
matrix1.wk4.top <- matrix1.wk4[1:18, ]
matrix1.wk4.bottom <- matrix1.wk4[(nrow(matrix1.wk4) - 17):nrow(matrix1.wk4), ]
matrix1.wk4 <- rbind(matrix1.wk4.top, matrix1.wk4.bottom)
matrix1.wk4 <- t(matrix1.wk4)
matrix1.wk4 <- as.data.frame(matrix1.wk4)
matrix1.wk4$category <- rownames(matrix1.wk4)
num_cols_to_select <- min(100, ncol(matrix2.wk4))
matrix2.wk4 <- matrix2.wk4[, 1:num_cols_to_select]
matrix2.wk4.top <- matrix2.wk4[1:18, ]
matrix2.wk4.bottom <- matrix2.wk4[(nrow(matrix2.wk4) - 17):nrow(matrix2.wk4), ]
matrix2.wk4 <- rbind(matrix2.wk4.top, matrix2.wk4.bottom)
matrix2.wk4 <- t(matrix2.wk4)
matrix2.wk4 <- as.data.frame(matrix2.wk4)
matrix2.wk4$category <- rownames(matrix2.wk4)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1.wk4,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2.wk4,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge.wk4 <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge.wk4, aes(x = gene, y = factor(category, levels = rev(rownames(matrix1.wk4))), size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-100,100)) +
  scale_x_discrete(limits = rev(unique(matrix.merge.wk4$gene))) +
  labs(title = "Week 4: Mesenchymal gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 10, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 10, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
dotplot

dotplot
dev.off()

  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  mesenchymal.genes.wk12 <- union(mesenchymal.genes.wk12, genes)
}
adhesion.genes.wk12 <- character(0)
for (term in adhesion.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  adhesion.genes.wk12 <- union(adhesion.genes.wk12, genes)
}
migration.genes.wk12 <- character(0)
for (term in migration.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  migration.genes.wk12 <- union(migration.genes.wk12, genes)
}
all.genes <- c(endothelial.genes.wk4, endothelial.genes.wk12, mesenchymal.genes.wk4, mesenchymal.genes.wk12, adhesion.genes.wk4, adhesion.genes.wk12, migration.genes.wk4, migration.genes.wk12)
all.genes <- unique(all.genes)
matrix1 <- data.frame(
  endothelial.wk4 = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  endothelial.wk12 = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  mesenchymal.wk4 = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  mesenchymal.wk12 = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  adhesion.wk4 = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  adhesion.wk12 = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  migration.wk4 = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  migration.wk12 = rep(NA, length(all.genes)),
  row.names = all.genes,
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE
)
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% endothelial.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "endothelial.wk4"] <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% mesenchymal.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "mesenchymal.wk4"] <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% adhesion.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "adhesion.wk4"] <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% migration.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "migration.wk4"] <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% endothelial.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "endothelial.wk12"] <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% mesenchymal.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "mesenchymal.wk12"] <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% adhesion.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "adhesion.wk12"] <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
for (gene in rownames(matrix1)) {
  if (gene %in% migration.genes) {
    if (gene %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
      matrix1[gene, "migration.wk12"] <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[gene, "rank"]
    }
  }
}
matrix1 <- matrix1[
  !(is.na(matrix1$adhesion.wk12) & is.na(matrix1$migration.wk12)) & 
  !((is.na(matrix1$adhesion.wk4) & !is.na(matrix1$adhesion.wk12)) | 
    (!is.na(matrix1$adhesion.wk4) & is.na(matrix1$adhesion.wk12)) |
    (is.na(matrix1$migration.wk4) & !is.na(matrix1$migration.wk12)) | 
    (!is.na(matrix1$migration.wk4) & is.na(matrix1$migration.wk12))),
]
wk12_columns <- matrix1[, c("endothelial.wk12", "mesenchymal.wk12", "adhesion.wk12", "migration.wk12")]
wk12_averages <- rowMeans(wk12_columns, na.rm = TRUE)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix <- matrix1[order(wk12_averages), ]
write.csv(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.csv")
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1 <- t(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1 <- harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1[, c(1:10, (ncol(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1) - 9):ncol(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1))]

# Create fold changes for wk12 markers
fold_changes_wk12 <- setNames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[["avg_log2FC"]],
                              rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort))
# Create fold changes for wk4 markers
fold_changes_wk4 <- setNames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[["avg_log2FC"]],
                              rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort))
# Copy the original matrix
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2 <- harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1
# Loop through each column in the matrix
for (col in colnames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)) {
  # Loop over rows in the current column
  for (i in seq_along(rownames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2))) {
    row_name <- rownames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)[i]
    # Check if the row name ends with "wk12" or "wk4"
    if (grepl("wk12$", row_name)) {
      # For rows ending with "wk12", use fold_changes_wk12
      fold_change_value <- fold_changes_wk12[col]
    } else if (grepl("wk4$", row_name)) {
      # For rows ending with "wk4", use fold_changes_wk4
      fold_change_value <- fold_changes_wk4[col]
    } else {
      # If it doesn't match either, set fold_change_value to NA (or handle as needed)
      fold_change_value <- NA
    }
    # Update the value in the current column for the current row
    harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2[i, col] <- ifelse(
      is.na(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1[i, col]),
      NA,   # If original matrix value is NA, assign NA
      fold_change_value  # Otherwise, assign the fold change value
    )
  }
}
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1 <- as.data.frame(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1$category <- rownames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2 <- as.data.frame(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2$category <- rownames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2)
df1_long <- melt(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "foldchange")
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
cat_order <- c("endothelial.wk4", "endothelial.wk12", "mesenchymal.wk4", "mesenchymal.wk12", "adhesion.wk4", "adhesion.wk12", "migration.wk4", "migration.wk12")
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge$category <- 
  factor(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge$category, 
         levels = cat_order)

min_value <- min(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_value <- max(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_abs_value <- max(abs(min_value), abs(max_value))

dotplot <- ggplot(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge, aes(x = category, y = gene, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(5.32, "in"),
                   cols = unit(2, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)) +
  labs(title = "Top: Gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
dotplot
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 4 + supp/Harmony_subset_plot_pathway-gene.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.both.pdf", width = 20, height = 20)
dotplot
dev.off()

                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EC, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "foldchange")
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EC <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
cat_order <- c("endothelial.wk4", "endothelial.wk12", "mesenchymal.wk4", "mesenchymal.wk12", "adhesion.wk4", "adhesion.wk12", "migration.wk4", "migration.wk12")

         levels = cat_order)

max_value <- max(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EC$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_abs_value <- max(abs(min_value), abs(max_value))

# Add the absolute value of the minimum value to all values in the 'enrichment_score' column
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EC$enrichment_score <- 
  harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EC$enrichment_score + abs(min_value)
# Multiply all values in the 'enrichment_score' column by -1
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EC$enrichment_score <- 
  harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EC$enrichment_score * -1

dotplot <- ggplot(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EC, aes(x = category, y = gene, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +

  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)) +

        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),

    (!is.na(matrix1$migration.wk4) & is.na(matrix1$migration.wk12))),
]
wk12_columns <- matrix1[, c("endothelial.wk12", "mesenchymal.wk12", "adhesion.wk12", "migration.wk12")]
wk12_averages <- rowMeans(wk12_columns, na.rm = TRUE)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.EndMT <- matrix1[order(wk12_averages), ]
write.csv(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.EndMT, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pathway/harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.EndMT.csv")
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT <- t(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.EndMT)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT <- harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT[, (ncol(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT) - 9):ncol(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT)]

# Create fold changes for wk12 markers
fold_changes_wk12 <- setNames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[["avg_log2FC"]],
                              rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort))
# Create fold changes for wk4 markers
fold_changes_wk4 <- setNames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[["avg_log2FC"]],
                              rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort))
# Copy the original matrix
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT <- harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT
# Loop through each column in the matrix
for (col in colnames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT)) {
  # Loop over rows in the current column
  for (i in seq_along(rownames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT))) {
    row_name <- rownames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT)[i]
    # Check if the row name ends with "wk12" or "wk4"
    if (grepl("wk12$", row_name)) {
      # For rows ending with "wk12", use fold_changes_wk12
      fold_change_value <- fold_changes_wk12[col]
    } else if (grepl("wk4$", row_name)) {
      # For rows ending with "wk4", use fold_changes_wk4
      fold_change_value <- fold_changes_wk4[col]
    } else {
      # If it doesn't match either, set fold_change_value to NA (or handle as needed)
      fold_change_value <- NA
    }
    # Update the value in the current column for the current row
    harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT[i, col] <- ifelse(
      is.na(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT[i, col]),
      NA,   # If original matrix value is NA, assign NA
      fold_change_value  # Otherwise, assign the fold change value
    )
  }
}
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT <- as.data.frame(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT$category <- rownames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT <- as.data.frame(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT)
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT$category <- rownames(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT)
df1_long <- melt(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix1.EndMT, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix2.EndMT, 
                  id.vars = "category", 
                  variable.name = "gene", 
                  value.name = "foldchange")
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EndMT <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
cat_order <- c("endothelial.wk4", "endothelial.wk12", "mesenchymal.wk4", "mesenchymal.wk12", "adhesion.wk4", "adhesion.wk12", "migration.wk4", "migration.wk12")
harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EndMT$category <- 
  factor(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EndMT$category, 
         levels = cat_order)

min_value <- min(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EndMT$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_value <- max(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EndMT$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_abs_value <- max(abs(min_value), abs(max_value))

dotplot <- ggplot(harmony.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.category.bothmatrix.merge.EndMT, aes(x = category, y = gene, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(2.66, "in"),
                   cols = unit(2, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)) +
  labs(title = "EndMT: Gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2),
        panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
dotplot

endothelial.genes.wk4 <- character(0)
for (term in endothelial.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  endothelial.genes.wk4 <- union(endothelial.genes.wk4, genes)
}
endothelial.genes.wk12 <- character(0)
for (term in endothelial.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  endothelial.genes.wk12 <- union(endothelial.genes.wk12, genes)
}
endothelial.genes <- unique(c(endothelial.genes.wk4, endothelial.genes.wk12))
endothelial.genes <- endothelial.genes[endothelial.genes %in% EC.markers.mouse]

endothelial.genes <- endothelial.genes[endothelial.genes %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)]
rank_values <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[endothelial.genes, "rank", drop = FALSE]
endothelial_genes_with_rank <- data.frame(gene = rownames(rank_values), rank = rank_values[, 1])
sorted_endothelial_genes <- endothelial_genes_with_rank[order(-endothelial_genes_with_rank$rank), ]
endothelial.genes <- sorted_endothelial_genes$gene

filtered_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[grepl(paste(endothelial.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE), ]
filtered_df <- filtered_df[order(-filtered_df$Count), ]
filtered_df <- filtered_df %>% filter(qvalue < 0.05)
matrix1 <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(endothelial.genes), ncol = nrow(filtered_df))
rownames(matrix1) <- endothelial.genes
colnames(matrix1) <- filtered_df$Description
# Loop through each column in matrix1
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1)) {
  # Check if there's a match in the Description column of harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable
  matching_row <- which(grepl(col_name, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
  if (length(matching_row) > 0) {
    # Add new columns for .wk4 and .wk12 by duplicating the existing column
    # First, extend matrix1 by adding new columns
    matrix1 <- cbind(matrix1, 
                     matrix1[, col_name],  # Duplicate the column
                     matrix1[, col_name])   # Duplicate the column again
    # Assign the new column names
    colnames(matrix1)[ncol(matrix1)-1] <- paste(col_name, ".wk4", sep = "")
    colnames(matrix1)[ncol(matrix1)] <- paste(col_name, ".wk12", sep = "")
  }
}
# Keep only columns that end with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
cols_to_keep <- grep("\\.wk4$|\\.wk12$", colnames(matrix1), value = TRUE)
# Subset the matrix to keep only the desired columns
matrix1 <- matrix1[, cols_to_keep]

# Create matrix2 as a copy of matrix1
matrix2 <- matrix1
# Loop through the columns of matrix1 to populate rank values
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1)) {
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk4$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk4" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk4$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable
    match_row <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs and populate the matrix1 with rank values
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix1)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            rank_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
            matrix1[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } 
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk12$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk12" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk12$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable
    match_row <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs and populate the matrix1 with rank values
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix1)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            rank_value <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
            matrix1[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
# Loop through the columns of matrix2 to populate FC values
for (col_name in colnames(matrix2)) {
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk4$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk4" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk4$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable

  if (grepl("\\.wk12$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk12" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk12$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable
    match_row <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {

      for (row_name in rownames(matrix2)) {

            matrix2[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
extract_non_empty_rows <- function(mat) {
  non_empty_rows <- mat[rowSums(is.na(mat)) < ncol(mat), ]
  return(non_empty_rows)
}
matrix1 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix1[, 1:20])
matrix2 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix2[, 1:20])
matrix1 <- matrix1[(nrow(matrix1) - 19):nrow(matrix1), ]
matrix1 <- t(matrix1)
matrix1 <- as.data.frame(matrix1)
matrix1$category <- rownames(matrix1)
matrix2 <- matrix2[(nrow(matrix2) - 19):nrow(matrix2), ]
matrix2 <- t(matrix2)
matrix2 <- as.data.frame(matrix2)
matrix2$category <- rownames(matrix2)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
matrix.merge$category <- factor(matrix.merge$category, levels = rev(unique(matrix.merge$category)))

min_value <- min(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_value <- max(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_abs_value <- max(abs(min_value), abs(max_value))

# Add the absolute value of the minimum value to all values in the 'enrichment_score' column
matrix.merge$enrichment_score <- matrix.merge$enrichment_score + abs(min_value)
# Multiply all values in the 'enrichment_score' column by -1
matrix.merge$enrichment_score <- matrix.merge$enrichment_score * -1

dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge, aes(x = gene, y = category, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(5.5, "in"),
                   cols = unit(5.5, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)) +
  labs(title = "Endothelial gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
dotplot

extract_non_empty_rows <- function(mat) {
  non_empty_rows <- mat[rowSums(is.na(mat)) < ncol(mat), ]
  return(non_empty_rows)
}
matrix1 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix1[, 1:20])
matrix2 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix2[, 1:20])
matrix1 <- matrix1[1:20, ]
matrix1 <- t(matrix1)
matrix1 <- matrix1[, rev(1:ncol(matrix1))]
matrix1 <- as.data.frame(matrix1)
matrix1$category <- rownames(matrix1)
matrix2 <- matrix2[1:20, ]
matrix2 <- t(matrix2)
matrix2 <- matrix2[, rev(1:ncol(matrix2))]
matrix2 <- as.data.frame(matrix2)
matrix2$category <- rownames(matrix2)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
matrix.merge$category <- factor(matrix.merge$category, levels = rev(unique(matrix.merge$category)))

min_value <- min(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_value <- max(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_abs_value <- max(abs(min_value), abs(max_value))

dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge, aes(x = gene, y = category, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(5.5, "in"),
                   cols = unit(5.5, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)) +
  labs(title = "Mesenchymal gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
dotplot
```
