```{r}
dotplot
dev.off()


### Fig 4 - Harmony_subset_plot_pathway-gene.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.mig.both
migration.genes.wk4 <- character(0)
for (term in migration.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  migration.genes.wk4 <- union(migration.genes.wk4, genes)
}
migration.genes.wk12 <- character(0)
for (term in migration.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  migration.genes.wk12 <- union(migration.genes.wk12, genes)
}
migration.genes <- unique(c(migration.genes.wk4, migration.genes.wk12))

migration.genes <- migration.genes[migration.genes %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)]
rank_values <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[migration.genes, "rank", drop = FALSE]
migration_genes_with_rank <- data.frame(gene = rownames(rank_values), rank = rank_values[, 1])
sorted_migration_genes <- migration_genes_with_rank[order(-migration_genes_with_rank$rank), ]
migration.genes <- sorted_migration_genes$gene

filtered_df <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[grepl(paste(migration.list, collapse = "|"), harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE), ]
filtered_df <- filtered_df[order(-filtered_df$Count), ]
filtered_df <- filtered_df %>% filter(qvalue < 0.05)
matrix1 <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(migration.genes), ncol = nrow(filtered_df))
rownames(matrix1) <- migration.genes
colnames(matrix1) <- filtered_df$Description
# Loop through each column in matrix1
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1)) {
  # Check if there's a match in the Description column of harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable
  matching_row <- which(grepl(col_name, harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE))
  if (length(matching_row) > 0) {
    # Add new columns for .wk4 and .wk12 by duplicating the existing column
    # First, extend matrix1 by adding new columns
    matrix1 <- cbind(matrix1, 
                     matrix1[, col_name],  # Duplicate the column
                     matrix1[, col_name])   # Duplicate the column again
    # Assign the new column names
    colnames(matrix1)[ncol(matrix1)-1] <- paste(col_name, ".wk4", sep = "")
    colnames(matrix1)[ncol(matrix1)] <- paste(col_name, ".wk12", sep = "")
  }
}
# Keep only columns that end with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
cols_to_keep <- grep("\\.wk4$|\\.wk12$", colnames(matrix1), value = TRUE)
# Subset the matrix to keep only the desired columns
matrix1 <- matrix1[, cols_to_keep]

# Create matrix2 as a copy of matrix1
matrix2 <- matrix1
# Loop through the columns of matrix1 to populate rank values
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1)) {
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk4$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk4" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk4$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable
    match_row <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs and populate the matrix1 with rank values
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix1)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            rank_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
            matrix1[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } 
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk12$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk12" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk12$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable
    match_row <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs and populate the matrix1 with rank values
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix1)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            rank_value <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
            matrix1[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
# Loop through the columns of matrix2 to populate FC values
for (col_name in colnames(matrix2)) {
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk4$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk4" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk4$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable
    match_row <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs and populate the matrix2 with FC values
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix2)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            FC_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
            matrix2[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } 
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk12$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk12" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk12$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable
    match_row <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs and populate the matrix2 with FC values
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$geneID), "/"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix2)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            FC_value <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
            matrix2[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
extract_non_empty_rows <- function(mat) {
  non_empty_rows <- mat[rowSums(is.na(mat)) < ncol(mat), ]
  return(non_empty_rows)
}
matrix1 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix1[, 1:20])
matrix2 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix2[, 1:20])
matrix1.top <- matrix1[1:15, ]
matrix1.bottom <- matrix1[(nrow(matrix1) - 14):nrow(matrix1), ]
matrix1.comb <- rbind(matrix1.top, matrix1.bottom)
matrix1.comb <- t(matrix1.comb)
matrix1.comb <- matrix1.comb[, rev(1:ncol(matrix1.comb))]
matrix1.comb <- as.data.frame(matrix1.comb)
matrix1.comb$category <- rownames(matrix1.comb)
matrix2.top <- matrix2[1:15, ]
matrix2.bottom <- matrix2[(nrow(matrix2) - 14):nrow(matrix2), ]
matrix2.comb <- rbind(matrix2.top, matrix2.bottom)
matrix2.comb <- t(matrix2.comb)
matrix2.comb <- matrix2.comb[, rev(1:ncol(matrix2.comb))]
matrix2.comb <- as.data.frame(matrix2.comb)
matrix2.comb$category <- rownames(matrix2.comb)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1.comb,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2.comb,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
matrix.merge$category <- factor(matrix.merge$category, levels = rev(unique(matrix.merge$category)))

min_value <- min(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_value <- max(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_abs_value <- max(abs(min_value), abs(max_value))

dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge, aes(x = gene, y = category, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(5.5, "in"),
                   cols = unit(8.25, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)) +
  labs(title = "Migration gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
dotplot

extract_non_empty_rows <- function(mat) {
  non_empty_rows <- mat[rowSums(is.na(mat)) < ncol(mat), ]
  return(non_empty_rows)
}
matrix1 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix1[, 1:20])
matrix2 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix2[, 1:20])
matrix1.top <- matrix1[1:15, ]
matrix1.bottom <- matrix1[(nrow(matrix1) - 14):nrow(matrix1), ]
matrix1.comb <- rbind(matrix1.top, matrix1.bottom)
matrix1.comb <- t(matrix1.comb)
matrix1.comb <- matrix1.comb[, rev(1:ncol(matrix1.comb))]
matrix1.comb <- as.data.frame(matrix1.comb)
matrix1.comb$category <- rownames(matrix1.comb)
matrix2.top <- matrix2[1:15, ]
matrix2.bottom <- matrix2[(nrow(matrix2) - 14):nrow(matrix2), ]
matrix2.comb <- rbind(matrix2.top, matrix2.bottom)
matrix2.comb <- t(matrix2.comb)
matrix2.comb <- matrix2.comb[, rev(1:ncol(matrix2.comb))]
matrix2.comb <- as.data.frame(matrix2.comb)
matrix2.comb$category <- rownames(matrix2.comb)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1.comb,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2.comb,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
matrix.merge$category <- factor(matrix.merge$category, levels = rev(unique(matrix.merge$category)))

min_value <- min(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_value <- max(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_abs_value <- max(abs(min_value), abs(max_value))

dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge, aes(x = gene, y = category, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(5.5, "in"),
                   cols = unit(8.25, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)) +
  labs(title = "Adhesion gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),

        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
```

### Migration analysis

```{r}
### Fig 4 - Harmony_subset_plot_volcano_wk12.KOvsCtrl_migration
migration.labels <- c("Angpt1", "Camk1d", "Ptprj", "Stard13", "Dmd", "Apbb2", "Sgcd", "Cacna1a", "Foxp1", "Myrip", "Tek", "Tns1", "Plxna4", "Itga9", "Vegfc", "Lgmn", "Fn1", "Spp1", "Cdh13", "Sparc", "Cd63", "Cd9", "Sfrp1", "Frmd5", "Tmsb4x", "Pde4d", "Kif26b", "Ppia", "Sdc4", "Tspo")
migration.genes.mouse <- character(0)
for (term in migration.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  migration.genes.mouse <- union(migration.genes.mouse, genes)
}
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.migration = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$delabel.migration <- NA
for (value in migration.genes.mouse) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] < 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "diffexp.migration"] <- "migration"
    }
  }
}
for (value in migration.genes.mouse) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] > 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "diffexp.migration"] <- "migration"
    }
  }
}
for (value in migration.labels) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] < 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "diffexp.migration"] <- "label"
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.migration"] <- value
    }
  }
}
for (value in migration.labels) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] > 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "diffexp.migration"] <- "label"
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.migration"] <- value
    }
  }
}
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.migration1 <- ggplot(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), size = 15, label = delabel.migration)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migration == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migration == "down", ], aes(color = "Ctrl"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migration == "up", ], aes(color = "KO"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migration == "migration", ], aes(color = "Migration"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migration == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("grey65", "grey65", "#800080", "#800080", "grey")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = "Week 12 - KO vs. Ctrl - Migration transcripts") +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +    
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 250), xlim = c(-7.5, 7.5))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.migration2 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.migration1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.migration2
```

```{r}
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  adhesion.genes.mouse <- union(adhesion.genes.mouse, genes)
}

  mutate(diffexp.adhesion = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",

        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {

}
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.adhesion1 <- ggplot(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), size = 15, label = delabel.adhesion)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.adhesion == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.adhesion == "down", ], aes(color = "Ctrl"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
```

### Migration + adhesion analysis

```{r}
### Fig 4 - Harmony_subset_plot_volcano_wk12.KOvsCtrl_migradh
migradh.labels <- c("Cadm1", "Cgnl1", "Gja5", "Angpt1", "Tek", "Vegfc", "Myh11", "Camk1d", "Ptprj", "Stard13", "Pde3a", "Dmd", "Apbb2", "Sgcd", "Cacna1a", "Cdh13", "Lgmn", "Sdc4", "Sox4", "Col8a1", "Ecm1", "Efemp1", "Fn1", "Spp1", "Sparc", "Cd63", "Cd9", "Sfrp1", "Frmd5", "Tmsb4x")
migradh.genes.mouse <- character(0)
for (term in migration.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  migradh.genes.mouse <- union(migradh.genes.mouse, genes)
}
for (term in adhesion.list) {
  matching_rows <- grepl(term, harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$Description, ignore.case = TRUE)
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.ora.GO.bothtable$geneID[matching_rows], "/"))
  migradh.genes.mouse <- union(migradh.genes.mouse, genes)
}
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano %>%
  mutate(diffexp.migradh = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$delabel.migradh <- NA
for (value in migradh.genes.mouse) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] < 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "diffexp.migradh"] <- "migradh"
    }
  }
}
for (value in migradh.genes.mouse) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] > 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "diffexp.migradh"] <- "migradh"
    }
  }
}
for (value in migradh.labels) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] < 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "diffexp.migradh"] <- "label"
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.migradh"] <- value
    }
  }
}
for (value in migradh.labels) {
  if (value %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano)) {
    if (harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] > 0 &&
        harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "diffexp.migradh"] <- "label"
      harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.migradh"] <- value
    }
  }
}
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.migradh1 <- ggplot(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), size = 15, label = delabel.migradh)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migradh == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migradh == "down", ], aes(color = "Ctrl"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migradh == "up", ], aes(color = "KO"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migradh == "migradh", ], aes(color = "migradh"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano$diffexp.migradh == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("grey65", "grey65", "#008080", "#008080", "grey")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = "Week 12 - KO vs. Ctrl - Migration + adhesion transcripts") +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +    
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 250), xlim = c(-7.5, 7.5))
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.migradh2 <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.migradh1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1),
        panel.grid = element_blank())
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.migradh2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 4 + supp/Harmony_subset_plot_volcano_wk12.KOvsCtrl_migradh.pdf", width = 6.725, height = 6.95)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.volcano.migradh2
dev.off()
```

### Monocle 3 analysis

```{r}
### Figures for manuscript
Aorta.harmony.monocle <- as.cell_data_set(Aorta.pca.subset.join, assay = "RNA")
Aorta.harmony.monocle <- estimate_size_factors(Aorta.harmony.monocle)
Aorta.harmony.monocle <- preprocess_cds(Aorta.harmony.monocle, num_dim = 100)
Aorta.harmony.monocle <- cluster_cells(Aorta.harmony.monocle, resolution = 5e-3)

p1 <- plot_cells(Aorta.harmony.monocle, color_cells_by = "Sample_ID", show_trajectory_graph = FALSE) + ggtitle("UMAP - Group")
p2 <- plot_cells(Aorta.harmony.monocle, color_cells_by = "cluster", show_trajectory_graph = FALSE) + ggtitle("UMAP - Cluster")
p3 <- plot_cells(Aorta.harmony.monocle, color_cells_by = "partition", show_trajectory_graph = FALSE) + ggtitle("UMAP - Partition")
wrap_plots(p1, p2, p3)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/Monocle 3/Harmony_subset_plot_monocle_1.pdf", width = 15, height = 5)
wrap_plots(p1, p2, p3)
dev.off()

Aorta.harmony.monocle <- learn_graph(Aorta.harmony.monocle, use_partition = TRUE, verbose = FALSE)

p1 <- plot_cells(Aorta.harmony.monocle, color_cells_by = "Sample_ID", cell_size = 0.75, cell_stroke = 0, label_groups_by_cluster=FALSE, label_leaves=TRUE, label_branch_points=FALSE, label_principal_points = FALSE, rasterize = TRUE) + scale_color_manual(values = c("lightskyblue", "lightpink1", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3")) +
theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20, face = "plain"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20, face = "plain"),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"))
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 4 + supp/Harmony_subset_plot_monocle_trajectory.pdf", width = 10, height = 10)
p1
dev.off()

Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12 <- choose_graph_segments(Aorta.harmony.monocle, starting_pr_node = "Y_233", ending_pr_nodes = "Y_293")
Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12 <- Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12[ ,colData(Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12)$Sample_ID %in% c("SRB_03", "SRB_04")]
Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12 <- preprocess_cds(Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12, num_dim = 100)
Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12 <- reduce_dimension(Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12, reduction_method = "UMAP")
Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12 <- cluster_cells(Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12, resolution = 5e-3)
Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12 <- learn_graph(Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12, use_partition = FALSE, verbose = FALSE)
Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12 <- order_cells(Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12, root_pr_nodes = "Y_6")

p1 <- plot_cells(Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12, color_cells_by = "Sample_ID", show_trajectory_graph = TRUE) + ggtitle("UMAP - Group")
p2 <- plot_cells(Aorta.harmony.monocle.wk12, color_cells_by = "cluster", show_trajectory_graph = TRUE) + ggtitle("UMAP - Cluster")
```

```{r}
### enrichR DisGeNET
DGN.wk4.down.genes <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC < -0.5, ])
DGN.wk4.up.genes <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC > 0.5, ])
DGN.wk4.all.genes <- rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers[harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC < -0.5 | harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC > 0.5, ])
DGN.wk12.down.genes <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC < -0.5, ])
DGN.wk12.up.genes <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC > 0.5, ])
DGN.wk12.all.genes <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$p_val_adj < 0.05 & harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC < -0.5 | harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers$avg_log2FC > 0.5, ])

DGN.wk4.down.out <- enrichr(DGN.wk4.down.genes, "DisGeNET")
DGN.wk4.up.out <- enrichr(DGN.wk4.up.genes, "DisGeNET")
DGN.wk4.all.out <- enrichr(DGN.wk4.all.genes, "DisGeNET")
DGN.wk12.down.out <- enrichr(DGN.wk12.down.genes, "DisGeNET")
DGN.wk12.up.out <- enrichr(DGN.wk12.up.genes, "DisGeNET")
DGN.wk12.all.out <- enrichr(DGN.wk12.all.genes, "DisGeNET")

write.csv(DGN.wk4.down.out, file='/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/DGN/DGN.wk4.down.out.csv')
write.csv(DGN.wk4.up.out, file='/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/DGN/DGN.wk4.up.out.csv')
write.csv(DGN.wk4.all.out, file='/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/DGN/DGN.wk4.all.out.csv')
write.csv(DGN.wk12.down.out, file='/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/DGN/DGN.wk12.down.out.csv')
write.csv(DGN.wk12.up.out, file='/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/DGN/DGN.wk12.up.out.csv')
write.csv(DGN.wk12.all.out, file='/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/DGN/DGN.wk12.all.out.csv')

DGN.wk4.down <- as.data.frame(DGN.wk4.down.out)
DGN.wk4.up <- as.data.frame(DGN.wk4.up.out)
DGN.wk4.all <- as.data.frame(DGN.wk4.all.out)
DGN.wk12.down <- as.data.frame(DGN.wk12.down.out)
DGN.wk12.up <- as.data.frame(DGN.wk12.up.out)
DGN.wk12.all <- as.data.frame(DGN.wk12.all.out)

# Define the function to process overlap
process_overlap <- function(df) {
  # Ensure Overlap is a character column, then calculate Overlap.ratio
  df <- df %>%
    mutate(
      DisGeNET.Overlap = as.character(DisGeNET.Overlap),  # Ensure Overlap is a character vector
      Overlap.ratio = {
        # Extract the numbers before and after the '/' in Overlap
        target_genes <- as.numeric(sub("/.*", "", DisGeNET.Overlap))  # Get the part before '/'
        total_genes <- as.numeric(sub(".*/", "", DisGeNET.Overlap))    # Get the part after '/'
        # Compute the ratio
        target_genes / total_genes
      }
    )
  return(df)  # Return the modified data frame
}

# List of data frames to process
df_list <- list(DGN.wk4.down, DGN.wk4.up, DGN.wk4.all, DGN.wk12.down, DGN.wk12.up, DGN.wk12.all)

# Apply the process_overlap function to each data frame in the list
df_list <- lapply(df_list, process_overlap)

# Function to sort and add Rank
process_df <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    arrange(DisGeNET.P.value) %>%                # Sort dataframe by P.value in ascending order
    mutate(Rank = row_number() / n())    # Add Rank column (row number divided by total rows)
}
# Apply the function to each dataframe in df_list
df_list <- lapply(df_list, process_df)

# Assign the modified data frames back to their original variable names
DGN.wk4.down <- df_list[[1]]
DGN.wk4.up <- df_list[[2]]
DGN.wk4.all <- df_list[[3]]
DGN.wk12.down <- df_list[[4]]
DGN.wk12.up <- df_list[[5]]
DGN.wk12.all <- df_list[[6]]

# List of data frames to process
df_down_list <- list(DGN.wk4.down, DGN.wk12.down)
# Create an empty list to store the ranks from all dataframes
rank_list <- list()
# List of dataframe names for labeling
df_down_names <- c("DGN.wk4.down", "DGN.wk12.down")
# Loop through each dataframe in df_list and extract Rank along with Rowname, Adjusted.P.value, and Overlap.ratio
for (i in 1:length(df_down_list)) {
  df <- df_down_list[[i]]
  # Extract Rank, Adjusted.P.value, and Overlap.ratio columns, along with Rowname
  rank_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
    Rowname = df$DisGeNET.Term,
    Rank = df$Rank, 
    Adjusted.P.value = df$DisGeNET.Adjusted.P.value,   # Include Adjusted.P.value column
    Overlap.ratio = df$Overlap.ratio,         # Include Overlap.ratio column
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  # Rename the 'Rank' column to include the dataframe name for clarity
  colnames(rank_list[[i]]) <- c(
    "Rowname", 
    paste0(df_down_names[i], "_Rank"), 
    paste0(df_down_names[i], "_P.adj"),  # Adjusted.P.value column renamed
    paste0(df_down_names[i], "_OR")      # Overlap.ratio column renamed
  )
}
# Merge all the dataframes in rank_list into one, using Rowname as the key
rank_df_down <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Rowname", all = TRUE), rank_list)
# Set the row names of the final dataframe to be the unique rownames
rownames(rank_df_down) <- rank_df_down$Rowname
# Drop the Rowname column from the dataframe
rank_df_down <- rank_df_down[, -1]
# Create the "Avg.rank" column by calculating the row means across all rank columns
rank_columns <- grep("_Rank$", colnames(rank_df_down), value = TRUE)  # Get all rank column names
# Calculate the average across the rank columns
rank_df_down$Avg.rank <- rowMeans(rank_df_down[, rank_columns], na.rm = TRUE)
# Sort the dataframe by Avg.rank in increasing order
rank_df_down <- rank_df_down %>% arrange(DGN.wk12.down_P.adj)
rank_df_down <- rank_df_down %>% filter(DGN.wk4.down_P.adj < 0.05 | DGN.wk12.down_P.adj < 0.05)

# List of data frames to process
df_up_list <- list(DGN.wk4.up, DGN.wk12.up)
# Create an empty list to store the ranks from all dataframes
rank_list <- list()
# List of dataframe names for labeling
df_up_names <- c("DGN.wk4.up", "DGN.wk12.up")
# Loop through each dataframe in df_list and extract Rank along with Rowname, Adjusted.P.value, and Overlap.ratio
for (i in 1:length(df_up_list)) {
  df <- df_up_list[[i]]
  # Extract Rank, Adjusted.P.value, and Overlap.ratio columns, along with Rowname
  rank_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
    Rowname = df$DisGeNET.Term,
    Rank = df$Rank, 
    Adjusted.P.value = df$DisGeNET.Adjusted.P.value,   # Include Adjusted.P.value column
    Overlap.ratio = df$Overlap.ratio,         # Include Overlap.ratio column
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  # Rename the 'Rank' column to include the dataframe name for clarity
  colnames(rank_list[[i]]) <- c(
    "Rowname", 
    paste0(df_up_names[i], "_Rank"), 
    paste0(df_up_names[i], "_P.adj"),  # Adjusted.P.value column renamed
    paste0(df_up_names[i], "_OR")      # Overlap.ratio column renamed
  )
}
# Merge all the dataframes in rank_list into one, using Rowname as the key
rank_df_up <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Rowname", all = TRUE), rank_list)
# Set the row names of the final dataframe to be the unique rownames
rownames(rank_df_up) <- rank_df_up$Rowname
# Drop the Rowname column from the dataframe
rank_df_up <- rank_df_up[, -1]
# Create the "Avg.rank" column by calculating the row means across all rank columns
rank_columns <- grep("_Rank$", colnames(rank_df_up), value = TRUE)  # Get all rank column names
# Calculate the average across the rank columns
rank_df_up$Avg.rank <- rowMeans(rank_df_up[, rank_columns], na.rm = TRUE)
# Sort the dataframe by Avg.rank in increasing order
rank_df_up <- rank_df_up %>% arrange(DGN.wk12.up_P.adj)
rank_df_up <- rank_df_up %>% filter(DGN.wk4.up_P.adj < 0.05 | DGN.wk12.up_P.adj < 0.05)

# List of data frames to process
df_all_list <- list(DGN.wk4.all, DGN.wk12.all)
# Create an empty list to store the ranks from all dataframes
rank_list <- list()
# List of dataframe names for labeling
df_all_names <- c("DGN.wk4.all", "DGN.wk12.all")
# Loop through each dataframe in df_list and extract Rank along with Rowname, Adjusted.P.value, and Overlap.ratio
for (i in 1:length(df_all_list)) {
  df <- df_all_list[[i]]
  # Extract Rank, Adjusted.P.value, and Overlap.ratio columns, along with Rowname
  rank_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
    Rowname = df$DisGeNET.Term,
    Rank = df$Rank, 
    Adjusted.P.value = df$DisGeNET.Adjusted.P.value,   # Include Adjusted.P.value column
    Overlap.ratio = df$Overlap.ratio,         # Include Overlap.ratio column
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
  # Rename the 'Rank' column to include the dataframe name for clarity
  colnames(rank_list[[i]]) <- c(
    "Rowname", 
    paste0(df_all_names[i], "_Rank"), 
    paste0(df_all_names[i], "_P.adj"),  # Adjusted.P.value column renamed
    paste0(df_all_names[i], "_OR")      # Overlap.ratio column renamed
  )
}
# Merge all the dataframes in rank_list into one, using Rowname as the key
rank_df_all <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Rowname", all = TRUE), rank_list)
# Set the row names of the final dataframe to be the unique rownames
rownames(rank_df_all) <- rank_df_all$Rowname
# Drop the Rowname column from the dataframe
rank_df_all <- rank_df_all[, -1]
# Create the "Avg.rank" column by calculating the row means across all rank columns
rank_columns <- grep("_Rank$", colnames(rank_df_all), value = TRUE)  # Get all rank column names
# Calculate the average across the rank columns
rank_df_all$Avg.rank <- rowMeans(rank_df_all[, rank_columns], na.rm = TRUE)
# Sort the dataframe by Avg.rank in increasing order
rank_df_all <- rank_df_all %>% arrange(DGN.wk12.all_P.adj)
rank_df_all <- rank_df_all %>% filter(DGN.wk4.all_P.adj < 0.05 | DGN.wk12.all_P.adj < 0.05)

## DGN.top.down
# Step 1: Reshape the data into long format
long_df <- rank_df_down %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "Pathway") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("DGN"),
               names_to = c("Timepoint", "Type"),
               names_pattern = "DGN\\.(wk4|wk12)\\.down_(.*)",  # Capture "wk4" or "wk12" as Timepoint
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Type, values_from = Value) %>%
  filter(Pathway %in% head(rownames(rank_df_down), 15))  # Filtering the first 15 pathways from row names

long_df$Timepoint <- factor(long_df$Timepoint, levels = c("wk4", "wk12"))

# Step 2: Calculate -log(P.adj)
long_df$NegLogP.adj <- -log10(long_df$P.adj)
# Filter the data for Timepoint "wk12"
wk12_data <- subset(long_df, Timepoint == "wk12")
# Calculate the order of Pathway based on P.adj (ascending or descending, as needed)
pathway_order <- names(sort(tapply(wk12_data$P.adj, wk12_data$Pathway, mean), decreasing = TRUE))  # Use decreasing = TRUE for ascending order
# Apply the new order to the Pathway factor in the full dataset
long_df$Pathway <- factor(long_df$Pathway, levels = pathway_order)

# Step 3: Create the ggplot
p1 <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Timepoint, y = Pathway, color = NegLogP.adj, size = OR)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "grey85", high = "#347db7") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 8)) +
  labs(title = "Downregulated transcripts - Top pathways",
       color = "-log(P.adj)",
       size = "Overlap") +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(4, "in"), cols = unit(1.5, "in")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size=16),
        legend.title = element_text(size=16),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),

## DGN.top.up
# Step 1: Reshape the data into long format
long_df <- rank_df_up %>%
  rownames_to_column(var = "Pathway") %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("DGN"),
               names_to = c("Timepoint", "Type"),
               names_pattern = "DGN\\.(wk4|wk12)\\.up_(.*)",  # Capture "wk4" or "wk12" as Timepoint
               values_to = "Value") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = Type, values_from = Value) %>%
  filter(Pathway %in% head(rownames(rank_df_up), 15))  # Filtering the first 15 pathways from row names

long_df$Timepoint <- factor(long_df$Timepoint, levels = c("wk4", "wk12"))

# Step 2: Calculate -log(P.adj)
long_df$NegLogP.adj <- -log10(long_df$P.adj)
# Filter the data for Timepoint "wk12"
wk12_data <- subset(long_df, Timepoint == "wk12")
# Calculate the order of Pathway based on P.adj (ascending or descending, as needed)
pathway_order <- names(sort(tapply(wk12_data$P.adj, wk12_data$Pathway, mean), decreasing = TRUE))  # Use decreasing = TRUE for ascending order
# Apply the new order to the Pathway factor in the full dataset
long_df$Pathway <- factor(long_df$Pathway, levels = pathway_order)

# Step 3: Create the ggplot
p2 <- ggplot(long_df, aes(x = Timepoint, y = Pathway, color = NegLogP.adj, size = OR)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient(low = "grey85", high = "#e3191b") +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 8)) +
  labs(title = "Upregulated transcripts - Top pathways",
       color = "-log(P.adj)",
       size = "Overlap") +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(4, "in"), cols = unit(1.5, "in")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_blank(),
        axis.title.y = element_blank(),
        plot.title = element_text(size=16),
        legend.title = element_text(size=16),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks.y = element_blank())
print(p2)

### Pathway-gene plots for DGN enrichment

# Function to capitalize the first letter and lowercase the rest
capitalize_genes <- function(genes_list) {
  # Split the gene list by ";"
  genes <- strsplit(genes_list, ";")[[1]]
  # Apply the transformation to each gene
  genes <- sapply(genes, function(gene) {
    paste0(toupper(substr(gene, 1, 1)), tolower(substr(gene, 2, nchar(gene))))
  })
  # Recombine the genes back into a single string with ";"
  paste(genes, collapse = ";")
}
DGN.wk12.all.mouse <- DGN.wk12.all
DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Genes <- sapply(DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Genes, capitalize_genes)
DGN.wk4.all.mouse <- DGN.wk4.all
DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Genes <- sapply(DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Genes, capitalize_genes)

## Cancer enrichment
cancer.pathways <- c("Mammary Neoplasms", "Tumor Progression", "Breast Carcinoma", "Neoplasm Metastasis", "melanoma", "Meningioma", "Stomach Neoplasms", "Prostatic Neoplasms", "Malignant neoplasm of breast", "Glioblastoma", "Colorectal Carcinoma", "Glioma", "Carcinogenesis", "Malignant neoplasm of prostate", "Mammary Neoplasms, Human")
cancer.genes.wk4 <- character(0)
for (term in cancer.pathways) {
  matching_rows <- DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == term
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Genes[matching_rows], ";"))
  cancer.genes.wk4 <- union(cancer.genes.wk4, genes)
}
cancer.genes.wk12 <- character(0)
for (term in cancer.pathways) {
  matching_rows <- DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == term
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Genes[matching_rows], ";"))
  cancer.genes.wk12 <- union(cancer.genes.wk12, genes)
}
cancer.genes <- unique(c(cancer.genes.wk4, cancer.genes.wk12))
cancer.genes <- sapply(cancer.genes, function(x) {
  paste0(toupper(substr(x, 1, 1)), tolower(substr(x, 2, nchar(x))))
})

cancer.genes <- cancer.genes[cancer.genes %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)]
filtered_df <- DGN.wk12.all.mouse
filtered_df$DisGeNET.Term <- factor(filtered_df$DisGeNET.Term, levels = cancer.pathways)
filtered_df <- filtered_df %>% filter(DisGeNET.Adjusted.P.value < 0.05)
filtered_df <- filtered_df[order(filtered_df$DisGeNET.Term), ]
rank_values <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[cancer.genes, "rank", drop = FALSE]
cancer_genes_with_rank <- data.frame(gene = rownames(rank_values), rank = rank_values[, 1])
sorted_cancer_genes <- cancer_genes_with_rank[order(-cancer_genes_with_rank$rank), ]
cancer.genes <- sorted_cancer_genes$gene

matrix1 <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(cancer.genes), ncol = nrow(filtered_df))
rownames(matrix1) <- cancer.genes
colnames(matrix1) <- filtered_df$DisGeNET.Term

# Loop through each column in matrix1
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1)) {
  # Check if there's a match in the Description column of DGN.wk4.all.mouse
  matching_row <- which(grepl(col_name, DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term, ignore.case = TRUE))
  if (length(matching_row) > 0) {
    # Add new columns for .wk4 and .wk12 by duplicating the existing column
    # First, extend matrix1 by adding new columns, but avoid duplicating rows
    matrix1 <- cbind(matrix1, 
                     matrix(NA, nrow = nrow(matrix1), ncol = 2))   # Create two columns for .wk4 and .wk12
    # Assign the new column names
    colnames(matrix1)[ncol(matrix1)-1] <- paste(col_name, ".wk4", sep = "")
    colnames(matrix1)[ncol(matrix1)] <- paste(col_name, ".wk12", sep = "")
  }
}
# Keep only columns that end with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
cols_to_keep <- grep("\\.wk4$|\\.wk12$", colnames(matrix1), value = TRUE)
matrix1 <- matrix1[, cols_to_keep]
# Create matrix2 as a copy of matrix1
matrix2 <- matrix1
# Loop through the columns of matrix1 to populate rank values
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1)) {
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk4"
  if (grepl("\\.wk4$", col_name)) {
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk4$", "", col_name)
    match_row <- DGN.wk4.all.mouse[DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$DisGeNET.Genes), ";"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix1)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            rank_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
            matrix1[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } 
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk12$", col_name)) {
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk12$", "", col_name)
    match_row <- DGN.wk12.all.mouse[DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$DisGeNET.Genes), ";"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix1)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            rank_value <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
            matrix1[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
# Loop through the columns of matrix2 to populate FC values
for (col_name in colnames(matrix2)) {
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk4$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk4" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk4$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in DGN.wk4.all.mouse
    match_row <- DGN.wk4.all.mouse[DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$DisGeNET.Genes), ";"))
      # Loop through the rows of matrix2 and update with FC values
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix2)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          # Only update the matrix if the row exists in the markers data
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            FC_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
            matrix2[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } 
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk12$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk12" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk12$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in DGN.wk12.all.mouse
    match_row <- DGN.wk12.all.mouse[DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$DisGeNET.Genes), ";"))
      # Loop through the rows of matrix2 and update with FC values
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix2)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          # Only update the matrix if the row exists in the markers data
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            FC_value <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
            matrix2[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
extract_non_empty_rows <- function(mat) {
  non_empty_rows <- mat[rowSums(is.na(mat)) < ncol(mat), ]
  return(non_empty_rows)
}
matrix1 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix1[, 1:20])
matrix2 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix2[, 1:20])
matrix1.top <- matrix1[1:15, ]
matrix1.bottom <- matrix1[(nrow(matrix1) - 14):nrow(matrix1), ]
matrix1.comb <- rbind(matrix1.top, matrix1.bottom)
matrix1.comb <- t(matrix1.comb)
matrix1.comb <- matrix1.comb[, rev(1:ncol(matrix1.comb))]
matrix1.comb <- as.data.frame(matrix1.comb)
matrix1.comb$category <- rownames(matrix1.comb)
matrix2.top <- matrix2[1:15, ]
matrix2.bottom <- matrix2[(nrow(matrix2) - 14):nrow(matrix2), ]
matrix2.comb <- rbind(matrix2.top, matrix2.bottom)
matrix2.comb <- t(matrix2.comb)
matrix2.comb <- matrix2.comb[, rev(1:ncol(matrix2.comb))]
matrix2.comb <- as.data.frame(matrix2.comb)
matrix2.comb$category <- rownames(matrix2.comb)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1.comb,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2.comb,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
matrix.merge$category <- factor(matrix.merge$category, levels = rev(unique(matrix.merge$category)))

min_value <- min(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_value <- max(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_abs_value <- max(abs(min_value), abs(max_value))

dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge, aes(x = gene, y = category, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(5.5, "in"),
                   cols = unit(8.25, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)) +
  labs(title = "Cancer gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
dotplot

##CVD enrichment
CVD.pathways <- c("Arteriosclerosis", "Atherosclerosis", "Vascular Diseases", "Coronary Artery Disease", "Cardiomyopathy, Dilated", "Hypertensive disease", "Brain Ischemia", "Heart failure", "Myocardial Ischemia", "Cardiomegaly", "Marfan Syndrome", "Congestive heart failure", "Cerebrovascular accident", "Cerebral Ischemia")
CVD.genes.wk4 <- character(0)
for (term in CVD.pathways) {
  matching_rows <- DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == term
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Genes[matching_rows], ";"))
  CVD.genes.wk4 <- union(CVD.genes.wk4, genes)
}
CVD.genes.wk12 <- character(0)
for (term in CVD.pathways) {
  matching_rows <- DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == term
  genes <- unlist(strsplit(DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Genes[matching_rows], ";"))
  CVD.genes.wk12 <- union(CVD.genes.wk12, genes)
}
CVD.genes <- unique(c(CVD.genes.wk4, CVD.genes.wk12))
CVD.genes <- sapply(CVD.genes, function(x) {
  paste0(toupper(substr(x, 1, 1)), tolower(substr(x, 2, nchar(x))))
})

CVD.genes <- CVD.genes[CVD.genes %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)]
filtered_df <- DGN.wk12.all.mouse
filtered_df$DisGeNET.Term <- factor(filtered_df$DisGeNET.Term, levels = CVD.pathways)
filtered_df <- filtered_df %>% filter(DisGeNET.Adjusted.P.value < 0.05)
filtered_df <- filtered_df[order(filtered_df$DisGeNET.Term), ]
rank_values <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[CVD.genes, "rank", drop = FALSE]
CVD_genes_with_rank <- data.frame(gene = rownames(rank_values), rank = rank_values[, 1])
sorted_CVD_genes <- CVD_genes_with_rank[order(-CVD_genes_with_rank$rank), ]
CVD.genes <- sorted_CVD_genes$gene

matrix1 <- matrix(NA, nrow = length(CVD.genes), ncol = nrow(filtered_df))
rownames(matrix1) <- CVD.genes
colnames(matrix1) <- filtered_df$DisGeNET.Term

# Loop through each column in matrix1
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1)) {
  # Check if there's a match in the Description column of DGN.wk4.all.mouse
  matching_row <- which(grepl(col_name, DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term, ignore.case = TRUE))
  if (length(matching_row) > 0) {
    # Add new columns for .wk4 and .wk12 by duplicating the existing column
    # First, extend matrix1 by adding new columns, but avoid duplicating rows
    matrix1 <- cbind(matrix1, 
                     matrix(NA, nrow = nrow(matrix1), ncol = 2))   # Create two columns for .wk4 and .wk12
    # Assign the new column names
    colnames(matrix1)[ncol(matrix1)-1] <- paste(col_name, ".wk4", sep = "")
    colnames(matrix1)[ncol(matrix1)] <- paste(col_name, ".wk12", sep = "")
  }
}
# Keep only columns that end with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
cols_to_keep <- grep("\\.wk4$|\\.wk12$", colnames(matrix1), value = TRUE)
matrix1 <- matrix1[, cols_to_keep]
# Create matrix2 as a copy of matrix1
matrix2 <- matrix1
# Loop through the columns of matrix1 to populate rank values
for (col_name in colnames(matrix1)) {
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk4"
  if (grepl("\\.wk4$", col_name)) {
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk4$", "", col_name)
    match_row <- DGN.wk4.all.mouse[DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$DisGeNET.Genes), ";"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix1)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            rank_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
            matrix1[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } 
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk12$", col_name)) {
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk12$", "", col_name)
    match_row <- DGN.wk12.all.mouse[DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$DisGeNET.Genes), ";"))
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix1)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            rank_value <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "rank"]
            matrix1[row_name, col_name] <- rank_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
# Loop through the columns of matrix2 to populate FC values
for (col_name in colnames(matrix2)) {
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk4" or ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk4$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk4" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk4$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in DGN.wk4.all.mouse
    match_row <- DGN.wk4.all.mouse[DGN.wk4.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$DisGeNET.Genes), ";"))
      # Loop through the rows of matrix2 and update with FC values
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix2)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          # Only update the matrix if the row exists in the markers data
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            FC_value <- harmony.wk4.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
            matrix2[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  } 
  # Check if the column name ends with ".wk12"
  if (grepl("\\.wk12$", col_name)) {
    # Remove ".wk12" to get the base name for matching
    base_name <- sub("\\.wk12$", "", col_name)
    # Search for matching row in DGN.wk12.all.mouse
    match_row <- DGN.wk12.all.mouse[DGN.wk12.all.mouse$DisGeNET.Term == base_name, ]
    if (nrow(match_row) > 0) {
      # Extract gene IDs
      gene_ids <- unlist(strsplit(as.character(match_row$DisGeNET.Genes), ";"))
      # Loop through the rows of matrix2 and update with FC values
      for (row_name in rownames(matrix2)) {
        if (row_name %in% gene_ids) {
          # Only update the matrix if the row exists in the markers data
          if (row_name %in% rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort)) {
            FC_value <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.sort[row_name, "avg_log2FC"]
            matrix2[row_name, col_name] <- FC_value
          }
        }
      }
    }
  }
}
extract_non_empty_rows <- function(mat) {
  non_empty_rows <- mat[rowSums(is.na(mat)) < ncol(mat), ]
  return(non_empty_rows)
}
matrix1 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix1[, 1:20])
matrix2 <- extract_non_empty_rows(matrix2[, 1:20])
matrix1.top <- matrix1[1:15, ]
matrix1.bottom <- matrix1[(nrow(matrix1) - 14):nrow(matrix1), ]
matrix1.comb <- rbind(matrix1.top, matrix1.bottom)
matrix1.comb <- t(matrix1.comb)
matrix1.comb <- matrix1.comb[, rev(1:ncol(matrix1.comb))]
matrix1.comb <- as.data.frame(matrix1.comb)
matrix1.comb$category <- rownames(matrix1.comb)
matrix2.top <- matrix2[1:15, ]
matrix2.bottom <- matrix2[(nrow(matrix2) - 14):nrow(matrix2), ]
matrix2.comb <- rbind(matrix2.top, matrix2.bottom)
matrix2.comb <- t(matrix2.comb)
matrix2.comb <- matrix2.comb[, rev(1:ncol(matrix2.comb))]
matrix2.comb <- as.data.frame(matrix2.comb)
matrix2.comb$category <- rownames(matrix2.comb)
df1_long <- melt(matrix1.comb,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "enrichment_score")
df2_long <- melt(matrix2.comb,
                 id.vars = "category",
                 variable.name = "gene",
                 value.name = "foldchange")
matrix.merge <- inner_join(df1_long, df2_long, by = c("category", "gene"))
matrix.merge$category <- factor(matrix.merge$category, levels = rev(unique(matrix.merge$category)))

min_value <- min(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_value <- max(matrix.merge$enrichment_score, na.rm = TRUE)
max_abs_value <- max(abs(min_value), abs(max_value))

dotplot <- ggplot(matrix.merge, aes(x = gene, y = category, size = abs(foldchange), color = enrichment_score)) +
  geom_point() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(5.5, "in"),
                   cols = unit(8.25, "in")) +
  scale_size(range = c(2, 7)) +  # Adjust size range
  scale_colour_gradientn(colours = rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdBu")), limits = c(-max_abs_value, max_abs_value)) +
  labs(title = "Cardiovascular disease gene-pathway associations", x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(text = element_text(size = 20, color = "black"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 20, hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, color = "black"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(color = "black"),
        panel.border = element_rect(color = "black", fill = NA, size = 2))
dotplot
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 6 + supp/DGN.pathway-gene.CVD.pdf", width = 20, height = 20)
dotplot
dev.off()



### GWAS correlation plots
GWAS.cat.cancer <- read.delim("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/Clint Miller collab/GWAS Catalog/gwas-association-downloaded_2025-02-25-MONDO_0004992-withChildTraits.cancer.tsv", header = TRUE)
GWAS.cat.cancer.genes <- GWAS.cat.cancer[!is.na(GWAS.cat.cancer$MAPPED_GENE) & GWAS.cat.cancer$MAPPED_GENE != "", c("MAPPED_GENE", "P.VALUE")]
GWAS.cat.fibrosis <- read.delim("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/Clint Miller collab/GWAS Catalog/gwas-association-downloaded_2025-02-25-EFO_0006890-withChildTraits.fibrosis.tsv", header = TRUE)
GWAS.cat.fibrosis.genes <- GWAS.cat.fibrosis[!is.na(GWAS.cat.fibrosis$MAPPED_GENE) & GWAS.cat.fibrosis$MAPPED_GENE != "", c("MAPPED_GENE", "P.VALUE")]
GWAS.cat.CVD <- read.delim("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/Clint Miller collab/GWAS Catalog/gwas-association-downloaded_2025-02-25-EFO_0000319-withChildTraits.CVD.tsv", header = TRUE)
GWAS.cat.CVD.genes <- GWAS.cat.CVD[!is.na(GWAS.cat.CVD$MAPPED_GENE) & GWAS.cat.CVD$MAPPED_GENE != "", c("MAPPED_GENE", "P.VALUE")]
GWAS.cat.CAD <- read.delim("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/Clint Miller collab/GWAS Catalog/gwas-association-downloaded_2025-02-25-EFO_0001645-withChildTraits.CAD.tsv", header = TRUE)
GWAS.cat.CAD.genes <- GWAS.cat.CAD[!is.na(GWAS.cat.CAD$MAPPED_GENE) & GWAS.cat.CAD$MAPPED_GENE != "", c("MAPPED_GENE", "P.VALUE")]
GWAS.cat.atherosclerosis <- read.delim("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/Clint Miller collab/GWAS Catalog/gwas-association-downloaded_2025-02-25-EFO_0003914-withChildTraits.atherosclerosis.tsv", header = TRUE)
GWAS.cat.atherosclerosis.genes <- GWAS.cat.atherosclerosis[!is.na(GWAS.cat.atherosclerosis$MAPPED_GENE) & GWAS.cat.atherosclerosis$MAPPED_GENE != "", c("MAPPED_GENE", "P.VALUE")]
GWAS.cat.aorticaneurysm <- read.delim("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/Clint Miller collab/GWAS Catalog/gwas-association-downloaded_2025-02-25-EFO_0001666-withChildTraits.aorticaneurysm.tsv", header = TRUE)
GWAS.cat.aorticaneurysm.genes <- GWAS.cat.aorticaneurysm[!is.na(GWAS.cat.aorticaneurysm$MAPPED_GENE) & GWAS.cat.aorticaneurysm$MAPPED_GENE != "", c("MAPPED_GENE", "P.VALUE")]

harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS$rank <- sign(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS$avg_log2FC) * -log10(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS$p_val)
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS[order(-harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS$rank), ]
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS$rank[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS$rank > 300] <- 300
harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS$rank[harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS$rank < -300] <- -300

# Function to split a single gene string based on delimiters surrounded by whitespaces (comma followed by space, hyphen, or x)
split_genes <- function(gene_string) {
  # Split by ", ", "- ", or " x " only when flanked by whitespaces (using a regular expression)
  split_genes <- unlist(str_split(gene_string, "[;,](?=\\s)|(?<=\\s)[\\-x](?=\\s)"))
  # Trim any leading/trailing whitespace from the resulting split parts
  split_genes <- trimws(split_genes)
  return(split_genes)
}

# List of dataset names and corresponding terms to replace in the code
dataset_list <- c("cancer", "fibrosis", "CVD", "CAD", "atherosclerosis", "aorticaneurysm")
# Loop over each dataset
for (dataset in dataset_list) {
  # Construct the data frame and column names dynamically
  GWAS.cat <- get(paste0("GWAS.cat.", dataset, ".genes"))
  GWAS.cat.min <- paste0("GWAS.cat.", dataset, ".genes.min")
  # Create new dataframe for split rows if necessary
  split_rows <- data.frame(MAPPED_GENE = character(), P.VALUE = numeric())
  # Loop through the rows in the dataframe
  for (i in 1:nrow(GWAS.cat)) {
    if (grepl("[;,](?=\\s)|(?<=\\s)[\\-x](?=\\s)", GWAS.cat$MAPPED_GENE[i], perl = TRUE)) {
      split_genes_parts <- split_genes(GWAS.cat$MAPPED_GENE[i])
      new_rows <- data.frame(MAPPED_GENE = split_genes_parts, P.VALUE = rep(GWAS.cat$P.VALUE[i], length(split_genes_parts)))
      split_rows <- rbind(split_rows, new_rows)
    } else {
      split_rows <- rbind(split_rows, GWAS.cat[i, ])
    }
  }
  # Create a new dataframe with split rows
  GWAS.cat <- split_rows
  # Capitalize the MAPPED_GENE column as per original code
  GWAS.cat <- GWAS.cat %>%
    mutate(MAPPED_GENE = paste0(toupper(substr(MAPPED_GENE, 1, 1)), tolower(substr(MAPPED_GENE, 2, nchar(MAPPED_GENE)))))
  
  # Filter by the minimum P.VALUE for each MAPPED_GENE
  GWAS.cat.min <- GWAS.cat %>%
    group_by(MAPPED_GENE) %>%
    filter(P.VALUE == min(P.VALUE)) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()
  # Match P.VALUE from GWAS.cat.min to the harmony dataframe
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS %>%
    mutate(!!paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.p") := GWAS.cat.min$P.VALUE[match(rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS), GWAS.cat.min$MAPPED_GENE)])
  # Compute negative log of the p-values
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS %>%
    mutate(!!paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.neglogp") := -log10(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.p"))))
  # Limit extreme values for the negative log p-values
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS[[paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.neglogp")]][harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS[[paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.neglogp")]] > 200] <- 200
  # Assign colors based on rank for min GWAS p-value
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS %>%
         mutate(!!paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.color") := case_when(
             !is.na(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.neglogp"))) & rank %in% head(rank[!is.na(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.neglogp")))], 8) ~ "firebrick3",    # Top 8 ranks with non-NA values get red
             !is.na(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.neglogp"))) & rank %in% tail(rank[!is.na(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.neglogp")))], 8) ~ "deepskyblue3",  # Bottom 8 ranks with non-NA values get blue
             TRUE ~ "black"  # Otherwise, black
         ))

  # Compute average p-value for the dataset
  GWAS.cat.avg <- GWAS.cat %>%
    group_by(MAPPED_GENE) %>%
    summarise(P.VALUE = mean(P.VALUE, na.rm = TRUE)) %>%
    ungroup()
  # Match average p-value to the harmony dataframe
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS %>%
    mutate(!!paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.p") := GWAS.cat.avg$P.VALUE[match(rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS), GWAS.cat.avg$MAPPED_GENE)])
  # Compute negative log of the average p-values
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS %>%
    mutate(!!paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.neglogp") := -log10(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.p"))))
  # Limit extreme values for the negative log p-values
  harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS[[paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.neglogp")]][harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS[[paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.neglogp")]] > 200] <- 200
  # Assign colors based on rank for average GWAS p-value
   harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS %>%
         mutate(!!paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.color") := case_when(
             !is.na(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.neglogp"))) & rank %in% head(rank[!is.na(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.neglogp")))], 8) ~ "firebrick3",    # Top 8 ranks with non-NA values get red
             !is.na(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.neglogp"))) & rank %in% tail(rank[!is.na(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.neglogp")))], 8) ~ "deepskyblue3",  # Bottom 8 ranks with non-NA values get blue
             TRUE ~ "black"  # Otherwise, black
         ))

  # Generate the plot for the min GWAS p-values
  GWAS.min.corr <- ggplot(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS, aes(x = !!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.neglogp")), y = rank)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, col = "black") +
    geom_point(aes(color = !!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.color"))), size = 2) +
    geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.color")) %in% c("firebrick3", "deepskyblue3"), as.character(rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS)), "")), max.overlaps = Inf, size = 6) +
    coord_cartesian(c(0,NA)) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3")) +
    labs(x = expression(paste("GWAS SNP: -log"[10] * "(P.value)")), y = "ERG KO enrichment score", title = paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.corr")) +
    NoLegend() +
    force_panelsizes(rows = unit(4, "in"), cols = unit(4, "in"))
  # Apply the theme
  GWAS.min.corr <- GWAS.min.corr + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
                                         axis.text = element_text(size=20),
                                         axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size=20),
                                         axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size=20),
                                         panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
                                         axis.ticks = element_line(size=1),
                                         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                                         panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  # Assign plot to a variable dynamically (e.g., GWAS.cancer.min.corr)
  assign(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".min.corr"), GWAS.min.corr)
  # Save the plot for the min GWAS p-values
  pdf(paste0("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/GWAS/", "GWAS.", dataset, ".min.corr.pdf"), width = 10, height = 10)
  print(GWAS.min.corr)
  dev.off()

  # Generate the plot for the avg GWAS p-values
  GWAS.avg.corr <- ggplot(data = harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS, aes(x = !!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.neglogp")), y = rank)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, col = "black") +
    geom_point(aes(color = !!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.color"))), size = 2) +
    geom_label_repel(aes(label = ifelse(!!sym(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.color")) %in% c("firebrick3", "deepskyblue3"), as.character(rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers.GWAS)), "")), max.overlaps = Inf, size = 6) +
    coord_cartesian(c(0,NA)) +
    scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("black", "deepskyblue3", "firebrick3")) +
    labs(x = expression(paste("GWAS SNP: -log"[10] * "(P.value)")), y = "ERG KO enrichment score", title = paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.corr")) +
    NoLegend() +
    force_panelsizes(rows = unit(4, "in"), cols = unit(4, "in"))
  # Apply the theme
  GWAS.avg.corr <- GWAS.avg.corr + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
                                         axis.text = element_text(size=20),
                                         axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size=20),
                                         axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size=20),
                                         panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
                                         axis.ticks = element_line(size=1),
                                         panel.grid.major = element_blank(),
                                         panel.grid.minor = element_blank())
  # Assign plot to a variable dynamically (e.g., GWAS.cancer.avg.corr)
  assign(paste0("GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.corr"), GWAS.avg.corr)
  # Save the plot for the avg GWAS p-values
  pdf(paste0("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/GWAS/", "GWAS.", dataset, ".avg.corr.pdf"), width = 10, height = 10)
  print(GWAS.avg.corr)
  dev.off()
}
```

### Alsaigh human carotid scRNA-seq

```{r}
### Set up scRNA-seq data
meta.table.alsaigh <-read.table("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/meta.data.txt", sep="\t", header = TRUE)
meta.table.alsaigh
# List directories containing filtered matrix files with full paths
alldirs.alsaigh <- list.dirs("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/matrices", recursive = TRUE, full.names = TRUE)
# List dirs containing 'filtered' in the name
alldata.alsaigh <- alldirs.alsaigh[grepl("filtered", alldirs.alsaigh)]
# Create an empty list for All samples
All_Samples.alsaigh <- vector(mode="list", length=length(alldata.alsaigh))
# Create a list for sample IDs: these will later become Project names and origin identities in Seurat objects
alldata_names.alsaigh<-vector(mode="list", length=1)
# Load the data
for (i in 1:length(alldata.alsaigh)) {
  print(paste("Reading data from", alldata.alsaigh[i]))  # Print the current directory being processed
  All_Samples.alsaigh[[i]] <- Read10X(data.dir = alldata.alsaigh[i])  # Read data from directory
  Sampleinfo <- strsplit(alldata.alsaigh[i], "/")
  Sample_ID <- Sampleinfo[[1]][length(Sampleinfo[[1]]) - 1]  # Extract second last part of the path
  # Calculate MT gene content for each cell
  MT.index <- grep(pattern = "^Mt-", x = rownames(All_Samples.alsaigh[[i]]), ignore.case = TRUE)
  percent.MT <- Matrix::colSums(All_Samples.alsaigh[[i]][MT.index, ]) / Matrix::colSums(All_Samples.alsaigh[[i]]) * 100
  # Create metadata table with percent.MT
  meta <- data.frame(percent.MT, Sample_ID)
  meta$barcode <- rownames(meta)
  meta <- merge(meta, meta.table.alsaigh, by.y = "Sample_ID")
  rownames(meta) <- meta$barcode
  meta[,"barcode"] <- NULL
  # Store sample ID in list
  alldata_names.alsaigh[[1]][i] <- Sample_ID
  # Create Seurat object for each sample and attach metadata
  All_Samples.alsaigh[i] <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = All_Samples.alsaigh[[i]], project = alldata_names.alsaigh[[1]][i], min.cells = 3, min.features = 200, meta.data = meta)
}
# Merge Seurat objects
alldata_names2.alsaigh <- alldata_names.alsaigh[[1]]
alsaigh <- merge(All_Samples.alsaigh[[1]], y = All_Samples.alsaigh[2:length(All_Samples.alsaigh)], merge.data = TRUE, add.cell.ids = alldata_names2.alsaigh, project = "Alsaigh human carotid scRNA-seq")
table(Idents(alsaigh))

p1<-VlnPlot(alsaigh, features = "nFeature_RNA", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
p2<-VlnPlot(alsaigh, features = "percent.MT", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
p3<-VlnPlot(alsaigh, features = "nCount_RNA", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
plot_grid(p1,p2,p3, nrow = 1)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/QC/alsaigh_all_plot_QC_1.pdf", width = 15, height = 10)
plot_grid(p1,p2,p3, nrow = 1)
dev.off()
table(Idents(alsaigh))

alsaigh <- subset(alsaigh, subset = percent.MT<10 & nFeature_RNA<4000 & nCount_RNA>500)
#Let's see how many cells remain for each sample
table(Idents(alsaigh))
alsaigh_all_table_QC_1 <- table(Idents(alsaigh))
write.csv(alsaigh_all_table_QC_1, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/QC/alsaigh_all_table_QC_1.csv")

# Downsample seurat object based on smallest sample
sample_counts <- table(alsaigh$Sample_ID)
min_cells_per_sample <- min(sample_counts)
# Randomly select the minimum number of cells for each sample ID
set.seed(123)  # Set seed for reproducibility
cells_to_keep <- unlist(lapply(names(sample_counts), function(sample_id) {
  # Get the cells associated with the current Sample_ID
  sample_cells <- which(alsaigh$Sample_ID == sample_id)
  # Randomly select 'min_cells_per_sample' cells for this Sample_ID
  sampled_cells <- sample(sample_cells, min_cells_per_sample, replace = FALSE)
  return(sampled_cells)
}))
# Subset the Seurat object
alsaigh.down <- subset(alsaigh, cells = cells_to_keep)

alsaigh.down <- NormalizeData(alsaigh.down, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 100000)
alsaigh.down <- FindVariableFeatures(alsaigh.down, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures=2000)
all.genes <- rownames(alsaigh.down)
alsaigh.down <- ScaleData(alsaigh.down, features = all.genes)
alsaigh.down <- RunPCA(alsaigh.down, features = VariableFeatures(object = alsaigh.down))

p4<-VlnPlot(alsaigh.down, features = "nFeature_RNA", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
p5<-VlnPlot(alsaigh.down, features = "percent.MT", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
p6<-VlnPlot(alsaigh.down, features = "nCount_RNA", group.by="orig.ident", pt.size=0.01)
plot_grid(p4,p5,p6, nrow = 1)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/QC/alsaigh_all_plot_QC_2.pdf", width = 15, height = 10)
plot_grid(p4,p5,p6, nrow = 1)
dev.off()

ElbowPlot(alsaigh.down)
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/QC/alsaigh_all_plot_QC_3.pdf", width = 10, height = 10)
ElbowPlot(alsaigh.down)
dev.off()

alsaigh.down <- FindNeighbors(alsaigh.down, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:17)
alsaigh.down <- FindClusters(alsaigh.down, resolution = 0.3)
alsaigh.down <- RunUMAP(alsaigh.down, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:17)

Harmony_all_table_QC_2 <- table(Idents(alsaigh.down))

alsaigh.down[["Clusters_uncorrected"]] <- Idents(object = alsaigh.down)

DimPlot(alsaigh.down, reduction = "umap", pt.size = 0.1, label=TRUE) +NoLegend()
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/plots/alsaigh_all_plot_UMAP_1.pdf", width = 10, height = 10)
DimPlot(alsaigh.down, reduction = "umap", pt.size = 0.1, label=TRUE) +NoLegend()

alsaigh.down.join.markers <- FindAllMarkers(alsaigh.down.join, only.pos = TRUE)

# Unintegrated UMAP
new.cluster.ids <- c("T cell 1", "EC 1", "T cell 2", "SMC 1", "Macrophage 1", "Fibroblast", "Macrophage 2", "SMC 2", "Neutrophil", "NK cell", "B cell 1", "SMC 3", "EC 2", "B cell 2", "Mast cell", "Macrophage 3", "Prolif. cell", "DC")

ggtitle("Unintegrated UMAP") +
theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),

# Per cluster QC stats

alsaigh.down.cluster_names <- alsaigh.down@active.ident
# Calculate cells per cluster
alsaigh.down.cell_counts <- table(alsaigh.down.cluster_names)
# Calculate median nFeature_RNA per cluster
alsaigh.down.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nFeature_RNA ~ alsaigh.down.cluster_names, data = alsaigh.down@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median nCount_RNA per cluster
alsaigh.down.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nCount_RNA ~ alsaigh.down.cluster_names, data = alsaigh.down@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median percent.mt per cluster
alsaigh.down.median_percent_MT_per_cluster <- aggregate(percent.MT ~ alsaigh.down.cluster_names, data = alsaigh.down@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Merge all information into a single dataframe
result_table <- data.frame(
    Cells_Per_Cluster = as.numeric(alsaigh.down.cell_counts),
    Median_nFeature_RNA = alsaigh.down.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$nFeature_RNA,
    Median_nCount_RNA = alsaigh.down.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster$nCount_RNA,
    Median_Percent_MT = alsaigh.down.median_percent_MT_per_cluster$percent.MT,

)

# Output per cluster QC stats for EC subset
# Get cluster names from active.ident
alsaigh.EC.cluster_names <- alsaigh.EC@active.ident
# Calculate cells per cluster
alsaigh.EC.cell_counts <- table(alsaigh.EC.cluster_names)
# Calculate median nFeature_RNA per cluster
alsaigh.EC.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nFeature_RNA ~ alsaigh.EC.cluster_names, data = alsaigh.EC@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median nCount_RNA per cluster
alsaigh.EC.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster <- aggregate(nCount_RNA ~ alsaigh.EC.cluster_names, data = alsaigh.EC@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Calculate median percent.mt per cluster
alsaigh.EC.median_percent_MT_per_cluster <- aggregate(percent.MT ~ alsaigh.EC.cluster_names, data = alsaigh.EC@meta.data, FUN = median)
# Merge all information into a single dataframe
result_table <- data.frame(
    Cells_Per_Cluster = as.numeric(alsaigh.EC.cell_counts),
    Median_nFeature_RNA = alsaigh.EC.median_nfeature_rna_per_cluster$nFeature_RNA,
    Median_nCount_RNA = alsaigh.EC.median_ncount_rna_per_cluster$nCount_RNA,
    Median_Percent_MT = alsaigh.EC.median_percent_MT_per_cluster$percent.MT,

)
# Print the result
print(result_table)
write.csv(result_table, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/QC/alsaigh_EC_table_QC_1.csv")

# Cells in each cluster per sample
```
