```{r}
# Markers for EC subset (AC vs. PA)
alsaigh.EC.join <- JoinLayers(alsaigh.EC)
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers <- FindMarkers(alsaigh.EC.join, group.by = "Region", ident.1 = "AC", ident.2 = "PA")
write.csv(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/markers/aslaigh_EC_ACvsPA_markers.csv")

### AC vs. PA volcano plot
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano <- aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers %>%
  mutate(diffexp.EndMT = case_when(
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC > 0 ~ "up",
    p_val_adj < 0.05 & avg_log2FC < 0 ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC > 12.5] <- Inf
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC[aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$avg_log2FC < -12.5] <- -Inf
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$p_val_adj[aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$p_val_adj < 1e-250] <- 1e-250
EC.markers.human1 <- c("SPARCL1", "TSPAN7", "LIFR", "RASSF9", "KANK3", "ADAM15", "GBP4", "POSTN", "CAVIN2", "IL33", "F8", "SHANK3", "FOXP1", "EPAS1", "VEGFC")
EndMT.markers.human1 <- c("BGN", "FN1", "MMP2", "DKK2", "S100A4", "LTBP2", "EFEMP1", "COL8A1", "TIMP1", "HSPG2", "MGP", "LAMB1", "FBLN5", "COL1A2", "CDH13")
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$delabel.EndMT <- NA
for (value in EC.markers.human1) {
  if (value %in% rownames(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano)) {
    if (aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] < 0 &&
        aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.EndMT"] <- value
    }
  }
}
for (value in EndMT.markers.human1) {
  if (value %in% rownames(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano)) {
    if (aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[value, "avg_log2FC"] > 0 &&
        aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[value, "p_val_adj"] < 0.05) {
      aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[value, "delabel.EndMT"] <- value
    }
  }
}
gene.list <- aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$delabel.EndMT[aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$delabel.EndMT != ""]
genes_in_list <- rownames(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano) %in% gene.list
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT[genes_in_list] <- "label"
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano.EndMT1 <- ggplot(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj), label = delabel.EndMT, size = 15)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(0.05), col = "gray", linetype = 'dashed') + 
   rasterize(geom_point(data = aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "no", ], aes(color = "Not significant"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "down", ], aes(color = "Ctrl"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "up", ], aes(color = "KO"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano[aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano$diffexp.EndMT == "label", ], aes(color = "Label"), size = 2) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("deepskyblue3", "firebrick3", "goldenrod3", "grey")) +
    labs(color = 'Enrichment',
         x = expression("avg.log"[2]*"FC"), y = expression("-log"[10]*"p.adj"),
         title = "AC vs. PA - EndMT transcripts") +
    geom_label_repel(size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() + 
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 250), xlim = c(-12.5, 12.5))
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano.EndMT2 <- aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano.EndMT1 + force_panelsizes(rows = unit(5.24, "in"), cols = unit(5.24, "in")) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank())
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano.EndMT2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/plots/alsaigh_EC_plot_volcano_EndMT.pdf")
aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers.volcano.EndMT2
dev.off()

# Correlation plot (alsaigh vs. mouse scRNAeq)
rownames(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers) <- paste0(toupper(substr(rownames(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers), 1, 1)), tolower(substr(rownames(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers), 2, nchar(rownames(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers)))))
### Extract row names from input dataframes
row.names.wk12.KOvsCtrl <- rownames(harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers)
row.names.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers <- rownames(aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers)
common.row.names <- intersect(row.names.wk12.KOvsCtrl, row.names.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers)

### Filter dataframes based on common row names
df.wk12.KOvsCtrl <- harmony.wk12.KOvsCtrl.markers[common.row.names, c("avg_log2FC","p_val_adj"), drop = FALSE]
df.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers <- aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers[common.row.names, c("avg_log2FC","p_val_adj"), drop = FALSE]

### Create new dataframe for correlation
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table <- data.frame(
  FC.wk12.KOvsCtrl = df.wk12.KOvsCtrl$avg_log2FC,
  FDR.wk12.KOvsCtrl = df.wk12.KOvsCtrl$p_val_adj,
  FC.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers = df.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers$avg_log2FC,
  FDR.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers = df.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers$p_val_adj,
  row.names = common.row.names
)
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$score.wk12.KOvsCtrl <- sign(harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$FC.wk12.KOvsCtrl) * -log10(harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$FDR.wk12.KOvsCtrl)
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$score.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers <- sign(harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$FC.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers) * -log10(harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$FDR.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers)
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table <- harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table[, c("FC.wk12.KOvsCtrl", "FDR.wk12.KOvsCtrl", "score.wk12.KOvsCtrl",
             "FC.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers", "FDR.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers", "score.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers")]
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table <- harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table %>%
  mutate(sig = case_when(
    score.wk12.KOvsCtrl > -log10(0.05) & score.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers > -log10(0.05) & row.names(.) %in% EndMT.markers.mouse ~ "up",
    score.wk12.KOvsCtrl < log10(0.05) & score.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers < log10(0.05) & row.names(.) %in% EC.markers.mouse ~ "down",
    TRUE ~ "no"
  ))
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$label <- NA
EC.corr.list <- c("Shank3", "Foxp1", "Epas1", "Vegfc", "Postn", "F8", "Fzd4", "Entpd1")
EndMT.corr.list <- c("Bgn", "Fn1", "Mmp2", "Mgp", "S100a4", "Fbln5", "Cdh13", "Col8a1")
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table <- harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table %>%
  mutate(label = ifelse((row.names(.) %in% EC.corr.list) | (row.names(.) %in% EndMT.corr.list), row.names(harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table), NA))
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$sig <- factor(harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$sig, levels = c("no", "down", "up"))
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table <- harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table[order(harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$sig), ]
write.csv(harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Clint Miller collab/carotid scRNA-seq/markers/alsaigh_EC_correlation_KO.wk12.csv")

### Plot correlation
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.correlation1 <- ggplot(data = harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table, aes(x = score.wk12.KOvsCtrl, y = score.aslaigh.EC.ACvsPA.markers, label = label)) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, col = "black") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, col = "black") + 
    geom_smooth(method = lm, formula = y ~ x, aes(group=1)) +
    rasterize(geom_point(data = harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table[harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$sig == "no", ], aes(color = "No"), size = 2), dpi=200) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table[harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$sig == "down", ], aes(color = "EC"), size = 2) +
    geom_point(data = harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table[harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$sig == "up", ], aes(color = "Mes"), size = 2) +
    geom_label_repel(data = harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table[harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$sig == "down", ], xlim = c(0, -300), ylim = c(0, -300), size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    geom_label_repel(data = harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table[harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.corr.table$sig == "up", ], xlim = c(0, 300), ylim = c(0, 300), size = 5.6667, max.overlaps = Inf) +
    NoLegend() +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = c(-300, 300)) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c("deepskyblue3", "firebrick3", "grey"),
        labels = c("EC", "Mes", "No")) +
    stat_cor(aes(group=1, label = paste(..rr.label.., ..p.label.., sep = "~`,`~"))) +
    labs(x = "Mouse ERG KO enrichment score", y = "Human plaque enrichment score",
        title = "Mouse vs. human atherosclerosis")
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.correlation2 <- harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.correlation1 + force_panelsizes(rows = unit(5.24, "in"), cols = unit(5.24, "in")) + theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size=20),
        axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size=20),
        panel.border = element_rect(size=2, colour = "black"),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1),
        panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
        panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank())
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.correlation2
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 6 + supp/alsaigh_EC_plot_correlation.pdf")
harmony.KO.wk12vsaslaigh.EC.correlation2
dev.off()
```

### Augur

```{r}
Aorta.harmony.augur.Sample_ID <- calculate_auc(Aorta.harmony.join, cell_type_col = "harmony_clusters", label_col = "Sample_ID", n_threads = 10)
AUC.Sample_ID <- Aorta.harmony.augur.Sample_ID$AUC
Aorta.harmony.augur.Genotype <- calculate_auc(Aorta.harmony.join, cell_type_col = "harmony_clusters", label_col = "Genotype", n_threads = 10)
AUC.Genotype <- Aorta.harmony.augur.Genotype$AUC
Aorta.harmony.augur.Week <- calculate_auc(Aorta.harmony.join, cell_type_col = "harmony_clusters", label_col = "Week", n_threads = 10)
AUC.Week <- Aorta.harmony.augur.Week$AUC

Aorta.subset.wk4 <- subset(Aorta.harmony.join, subset = Sample_ID %in% c("SRB_01", "SRB_02"))
Aorta.harmony.augur.Genotype.wk4 <- calculate_auc(Aorta.subset.wk4, cell_type_col = "harmony_clusters", label_col = "Genotype", n_threads = 10)
AUC.Genotype.wk4 <- Aorta.harmony.augur.Genotype.wk4$AUC
Aorta.subset.wk12 <- subset(Aorta.harmony.join, subset = Sample_ID %in% c("SRB_03", "SRB_04"))
Aorta.harmony.augur.Genotype.wk12 <- calculate_auc(Aorta.subset.wk12, cell_type_col = "harmony_clusters", label_col = "Genotype", n_threads = 10)
AUC.Genotype.wk12 <- Aorta.harmony.augur.Genotype.wk12$AUC

Aorta.subset.Ctrl <- subset(Aorta.harmony.join, subset = Sample_ID %in% c("SRB_01", "SRB_03"))
Aorta.harmony.augur.Week.Ctrl <- calculate_auc(Aorta.subset.Ctrl, cell_type_col = "harmony_clusters", label_col = "Week", n_threads = 10)
AUC.Week.Ctrl <- Aorta.harmony.augur.Week.Ctrl$AUC
Aorta.subset.KO <- subset(Aorta.harmony.join, subset = Sample_ID %in% c("SRB_02", "SRB_04"))
Aorta.harmony.augur.Week.KO <- calculate_auc(Aorta.subset.KO, cell_type_col = "harmony_clusters", label_col = "Week", n_threads = 10)
AUC.Week.KO <- Aorta.harmony.augur.Week.KO$AUC


lolli1 <- ggplot(AUC.Sample_ID, aes(x = fct_reorder(cell_type, auc), y = auc, color = cell_type)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = fct_reorder(cell_type, auc), yend = auc), 
               y = 0, size = 1.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_point(size = 4, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "SMC 1" = "#F8766D", "SMC 2" = "#E88526", "EC 2" = "#00ADFA", 
    "EC 3" = "#AE87FF", "SMC 3" = "#93AA00", "SMC 5" = "#F564E3", 
    "Macrophage 3" = "#D39200", "EC 1" = "#00BF74", "Fibroblast 2" = "#619CFF", 
    "SMC 4" = "#00BFC4", "Fibroblast 1" = "#FF61C3", "Macrophage 1" = "#DB72FB", 
    "T cell 2" = "#00B9E3", "T cell 1" = "#B79F00", "Macrophage 2" = "#00BA38", 
    "B cell" = "#5EB300", "Prolif. cell" = "#00C19F", "Neutrophil" = "#FF699C"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1)) +
  labs(title = "Sample_ID", x = NULL, y = "AUC") +
  coord_flip() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(4, "in"), cols = unit(2, "in"))
lolli2 <- lolli1 + theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "plain", size=15),
  axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 15, margin = margin(t = 10)),
  axis.text = element_text(size=15),
  axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.75),  
  panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank())
lolli2

pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/Augur/lollipop_Genotype.wk12.pdf", width = 5, height = 5)
lolli10
dev.off()

lolli11 <- ggplot(AUC.Week.Ctrl, aes(x = fct_reorder(cell_type, auc), y = auc, color = cell_type)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.9, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0.8, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray40") +
  geom_segment(aes(xend = fct_reorder(cell_type, auc), yend = auc), 
               y = 0, size = 1.5, show.legend = FALSE) +
  geom_point(size = 4, show.legend = FALSE) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "SMC 1" = "#F8766D", "SMC 2" = "#E88526", "EC 2" = "#00ADFA", 
    "EC 3" = "#AE87FF", "SMC 3" = "#93AA00", "SMC 5" = "#F564E3", 
    "Macrophage 3" = "#D39200", "EC 1" = "#00BF74", "Fibroblast 2" = "#619CFF", 
    "SMC 4" = "#00BFC4", "Fibroblast 1" = "#FF61C3", "Macrophage 1" = "#DB72FB", 
    "T cell 2" = "#00B9E3", "T cell 1" = "#B79F00", "Macrophage 2" = "#00BA38", 
    "B cell" = "#5EB300", "Prolif. cell" = "#00C19F", "Neutrophil" = "#FF699C"
  )) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0.5, 1)) +
  labs(title = "Ctrl: Week", x = NULL, y = "AUC") +
  coord_flip() +
  force_panelsizes(rows = unit(4, "in"), cols = unit(2, "in"))
lolli12 <- lolli11 + theme(plot.title = element_text(face = "plain", size=15),
  axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 15, margin = margin(t = 10)),
  axis.text = element_text(size=15),
  axis.ticks = element_line(size=0.75),  
  panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor.x = element_blank(),
  panel.grid.minor.y = element_blank())
lolli12
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/Augur/lollipop_Week.Ctrl.pdf", width = 5, height = 5)
lolli12
dev.off()
```

### Testing alternative MT thresholds (25%, 40%, 55%)

```{r}
### Fig 3 - Harmony_all_MT_thresholdplot
featurevsMT <- ggplot(featurevsMT.data) +
    rasterize(geom_point(aes(nFeature_RNA, percent.MT, color = density), size = 1), dpi=200) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 25, col = "red", linetype = 'dashed', linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 40, col = "red", linetype = 'dashed', linewidth = 1) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 55, col = "red", linetype = 'dashed', linewidth = 1) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 3000, col = "blue", linetype = 'dashed', linewidth = 1) +
    scale_color_viridis() + NoLegend() +
    labs(x = "Feature count", y = "Mitochondrial transcripts (%)", title = "Mitochondrial thresholds") +
    theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain"),
          panel.border = element_rect(linewidth=2),
          axis.title.x = element_text(face = "plain", size = 20),
          axis.title.y = element_text(face = "plain", size = 20),
          axis.text = element_text(size=20),
          axis.ticks = element_line(size=1))
featurevsMT
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 3 + supp/Harmony_all_MT_thresholdplot.pdf", width = 6.45, height = 6.8)
featurevsMT
dev.off()


### Mitochondrial cut-off: 25%
Aorta.MT25 <- merge(All_Samples[[1]], y= All_Samples[2:length(All_Samples)], merge.data=TRUE, add.cell.ids = alldata_names2, project = "Aortic Intima")
Aorta.MT25 <- subset(Aorta.MT25, subset = percent.MT<25 & nFeature_RNA<3000 & nCount_RNA>500)
table(Idents(Aorta.MT25))
Harmony_all_table_QC_MT25_1 <- table(Idents(Aorta.MT25))
write.csv(Harmony_all_table_QC_MT25_1, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_MT25_table_1.csv")
Aorta.MT25 <- NormalizeData(Aorta.MT25, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 100000)
Aorta.MT25 <- FindVariableFeatures(Aorta.MT25, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures=2000)
all.genes <- rownames(Aorta.MT25)
Aorta.MT25 <- ScaleData(Aorta.MT25, features = all.genes)
gc()
Aorta.MT25 <- RunPCA(Aorta.MT25, features = VariableFeatures(object = Aorta.MT25))
ElbowPlot(Aorta.MT25)
Aorta.MT25 <- FindNeighbors(Aorta.MT25, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:17)
Aorta.MT25 <- FindClusters(Aorta.MT25, resolution = 0.6)
Aorta.MT25 <- RunUMAP(Aorta.MT25, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:17)
total.cells.MT25 <- ncol(Aorta.MT25@assays$RNA)
### Fig 3 - Harmony_all_MT25_plot
dimplot <- DimPlot(Aorta.MT25, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, label.size = 6, pt.size = 3, repel = TRUE, raster = TRUE, raster.dpi = c(1000,1000)) + NoLegend() +
ggtitle(paste("MT threshold: 25% (", total.cells.MT25, "cells)")) +
theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title = element_text(size=20),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_line(size=1),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth=2, colour = "black"))
dimplot
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 3 + supp/Harmony_all_MT25_plot.pdf", width = 6.525, height = 6.7)
dimplot
dev.off()
table(Idents(Aorta.MT25))
Harmony_all_table_QC_MT25_2 <- table(Idents(Aorta.MT25))
write.csv(Harmony_all_table_QC_MT25_2, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_MT25_table_2.csv")
Aorta.MT25.join <- JoinLayers(Aorta.MT25)
Aorta.MT25.join.markers <- FindAllMarkers(Aorta.MT25.join, only.pos = TRUE)
write.csv(Aorta.MT25.join.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_MT25_markers.csv")


### Mitochondrial cut-off: 40%
Aorta.MT40 <- merge(All_Samples[[1]], y= All_Samples[2:length(All_Samples)], merge.data=TRUE, add.cell.ids = alldata_names2, project = "Aortic Intima")
Aorta.MT40 <- subset(Aorta.MT40, subset = percent.MT<40 & nFeature_RNA<3000 & nCount_RNA>500)
table(Idents(Aorta.MT40))
Harmony_all_table_QC_MT40_1 <- table(Idents(Aorta.MT40))
write.csv(Harmony_all_table_QC_MT40_1, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_MT40_table_1.csv")
Aorta.MT40 <- NormalizeData(Aorta.MT40, normalization.method = "LogNormalize", scale.factor = 100000)
Aorta.MT40 <- FindVariableFeatures(Aorta.MT40, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures=2000)
all.genes <- rownames(Aorta.MT40)
Aorta.MT40 <- ScaleData(Aorta.MT40, features = all.genes)
gc()
Aorta.MT40 <- RunPCA(Aorta.MT40, features = VariableFeatures(object = Aorta.MT40))
ElbowPlot(Aorta.MT40)
Aorta.MT40 <- FindNeighbors(Aorta.MT40, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:17)
Aorta.MT40 <- FindClusters(Aorta.MT40, resolution = 0.6)
Aorta.MT40 <- RunUMAP(Aorta.MT40, reduction = "pca", dims = 1:17)
new.cluster.ids.MT40 <- c("0", "1", "6", "4", "3", "7", "2a", "10", "5", "8", "9", "11", "2b", "12", "13", "15", "14", "16", "17", "18", "19", "20")
names(new.cluster.ids.MT40) <- levels(Aorta.MT40)
Aorta.MT40 <- RenameIdents(Aorta.MT40, new.cluster.ids.MT40)
total.cells.MT40 <- ncol(Aorta.MT40@assays$RNA)
### Fig 3 - Harmony_all_MT40_plot
dimplot <- DimPlot(Aorta.MT40, reduction = "umap", label = TRUE, label.size = 6, pt.size = 3, repel = TRUE, raster = TRUE, raster.dpi = c(1000,1000)) + NoLegend() +
ggtitle(paste("MT threshold: 40% (", total.cells.MT40, "cells)")) +
scale_color_manual(values = c("#F8766D", "#EB8335", "#53B400", "#A9A400", "#C49A00", "#00BA38", "#DA8F00", "#00C0B5", "#86AC00", "#00BE6D", "#00C094", "#00BDD2", "#DA8F00", "#00B6EB", "#00ABFD", "#A58AFF", "#619CFF", "#D078FF", "#EC69EF", "#FB61D7", "#FF63B9", "#FF6B96")) +
theme(plot.title = element_text(size=20, face = "plain", hjust = 0.5),
        axis.text = element_text(size=20),
        axis.title = element_text(size=20),
        axis.line = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_line(linewidth=1),
        panel.border = element_rect(linewidth=2, colour = "black"))
dimplot
pdf("/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/pub/fig 3 + supp/Harmony_all_MT40_plot.pdf", width = 6.525, height = 6.7)
dimplot
dev.off()
table(Idents(Aorta.MT40))
Harmony_all_table_QC_MT40_2 <- table(Idents(Aorta.MT40))
write.csv(Harmony_all_table_QC_MT40_2, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_MT40_table_2.csv")
Aorta.MT40.join <- JoinLayers(Aorta.MT40)
Aorta.MT40.join.markers <- FindAllMarkers(Aorta.MT40.join, only.pos = TRUE)
write.csv(Aorta.MT40.join.markers, "/Users/stevenbotts/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-UniversityofToronto/PhD/ERG/ERG KO mice/ERG KO athero/PCSK9 scRNA-seq/scRNA analysis/Harmony/QC/Harmony_all_MT40_markers.csv")


## Mitochondrial cut-off: 55%
```
